tours.tour: Exclusive Private 118 Tocchi Di Puglia Cooking and Wine Experience with Sedan - Otranto
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day private cooking and wine immersion on a four-generation organic farm in Puglia, ideal for food-loving clients wanting a hands-on, story-rich alternative to a standard wine tour.
summaryBullets: 10-hour private experience with a guided tour of the organic farm and its preserve-making laboratory, hosted by a family "Ambassador."
Hands-on pasta class led by Chef Giuseppe of the Lillo family, learning to make traditional Apulian pasta by hand.
Full lunch of the dishes you helped prepare, paired with local wines plus an Apulian wine rated Wine Spectator Top 100.

Inclusions: round-trip luxury sedan/minivan transfer with English-speaking chauffeur and a private on-site guide reserved exclusively for the group; gratuities and alcohol for under-18s are not included.

tours.tour: Exclusive Private 120 Feudo Santa Croce Wine Experience with Sedan - Otranto
tours.summaryIntro: A 9-hour private wine estate visit to Feudo di Santa Croce, the Puglia winery of Venice's Tinazzi family, pairing cellar touring with a seaside fish lunch -- a strong pick for wine-focused clients.
summaryBullets: Private tour of the cellars and winery with storytelling on the estate's history: bought by the Tinazzi family in 2001, named for the Menhir La Croce megalith.
Guided tasting of 7 top wines with a mini-lesson on Apulian wine, accompanied by a charcuterie and cheese plate.
Transfer to the port of Taranto for a full seaside fish lunch paired with the estate's top wines.
Inclusions: private Ambassador guide, welcome aperitif and coffee (plus soft drinks for minors), and round-trip luxury sedan/minivan transfer with English-speaking chauffeur; gratuities not included.

tours.tour: Exclusive Private 121 Essentiae Spirit Experience with Sedan - Otranto
tours.summaryIntro: A private Puglia liqueur-and-culture day built around Ugento's artisanal Essentiae distillery, combining a castle and museum visit with a seafood lunch and a hands-on spirits tasting -- a good offbeat alternative to a standard wine tour.
summaryBullets: Private visit to the Ugento Castle and Museum, the ancient Crypt of the Crucifix, and a walk through the historic village and citrus orchards.
Guided liqueur and distillate tasting with a hands-on mini-masterclass, hosted by the distillery's Emanuele De Gaetani.
Full lunch in a trendy restaurant in Ugento's historic center, paired with the tasting.

Inclusions: private English-speaking Ambassador guide, round-trip luxury sedan/minivan transfer, and a handcrafted leather pocket phial holder with three full phials as a parting gift; gratuities not included.

tours.tour: Exclusive Private 128 Essentiae Sprit Extended Experience with Sedan - Otranto
tours.summaryIntro: A more leisurely full-day version of the Essentiae liqueur experience in Ugento, Puglia, adding extra time to unwind between the castle visit, crypt, orchards, tasting, and lunch -- a good upsell for clients who want the same private spirits itinerary at a relaxed pace.
summaryBullets: Private visit to the Ugento Castle and Museum, the ancient Crypt of the Crucifix, and a walk through the historic village and citrus orchards.
Guided liqueur and distillate tasting with a hands-on mini-masterclass, hosted by the distillery.
Full lunch in a trendy restaurant in Ugento's historic center.

Inclusions: private English-speaking Ambassador guide, round-trip luxury sedan/minivan transfer, and a handcrafted leather pocket phial holder with three full phials as a gift; gratuities not included.

tours.tour: Exclusive Private 129 Essentiae Yacht Experience with Sedan - Otranto
tours.summaryIntro: A 13-hour private Puglia day combining the Essentiae distillery's castle-and-crypt itinerary with a luxury yacht charter for an open-sea seafood lunch and sunset cocktail -- an exceptional pick for clients wanting a one-of-a-kind land-and-sea experience.
summaryBullets: 13-hour private itinerary: Ugento Castle and Museum, the ancient Crypt of the Crucifix, and a walk through the historic village and orchards before transferring to the port of Gallipoli or Leuca.
Embarkation on a luxury yacht for an open-sea tour, with swimming and relaxing time included.
Full Pugliese seafood lunch served on board, paired with Essentiae spirits and Apulian wines, followed by a guided liqueur tasting and a sunset farewell cocktail.
Inclusions: private English-speaking Ambassador guide, round-trip luxury sedan/minivan transfer, and a souvenir gift; gratuities not included.

tours.tour: Certified Guide - 4 Hours
tours.summaryIntro: This is a stand-alone certified-guide booking for clients who want expert commentary for a few hours without a car or driver.
summaryBullets: Certified guide service only — no car or driver included
Duration: 4 hours

tours.tour: Certified Guide - 6 Hours
tours.summaryIntro: This is a stand-alone certified-guide booking for clients who want expert commentary for a few hours without a car or driver.
summaryBullets: Certified guide service only — no car or driver included
Duration: 6 hours

tours.tour: Eagles Nest Tour Non - Guided by Premium Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A private 6-hour drive from Salzburg through the Bavarian mountains to the Eagles Nest, capped by a dramatic bus-and-elevator ascent to one of the region's most striking viewpoints.
summaryBullets: Route passes through the Konigsee River Valley, past romantic farmhouses, and through Obersalzberg
A 20-minute bus ride along steep rock walls and deep gorges, followed by an elevator, brings you to the Eagles Nest itself
Views from the top extend to the Hoher Goell and across the Bavarian mountains
Includes English-speaking driver and car (bookable May 15–Oct 31); guide and entrance tickets are NOT included but can be added at extra cost

tours.tour: Lakes and Mountains Tour Non - Guided by Premium Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A private 4-hour drive from Salzburg into the Lake District, the scenic region once favored by Austrian Emperor Franz Josef for his summer holidays.
summaryBullets: Visits the Lake District just beyond Salzburg's gates, one of Austria's most scenic regions
Historically hosted Emperor Franz Josef and his family's summer vacations, with splendid hunts held there by Salzburg's Prince Archbishops
Includes English-speaking driver and car; guide and entrance tickets are NOT included but can be added at extra cost

tours.tour: Salzburg Tour Non - Guided City Tour by Premium Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A private 4-hour city tour of Salzburg tracing centuries of rule by the Prince Archbishops and the architecture they left behind.
summaryBullets: Covers Gothic, Renaissance, and Baroque architecture built up under the Prince Archbishops' independent principality
Passes through historic walls where Mozart's Magic Flute has been heard since the 18th century
Includes English-speaking driver and car; guide and entrance tickets are NOT included but can be added at extra cost

tours.tour: Sound of Music Tour Non - Guided by Premium Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A private 4-hour drive tracing Sound of Music filming locations around Salzburg, with the movie's original soundtrack playing along the way.
summaryBullets: Passes the landscape where the film's opening scenes were shot, while the original Sound of Music soundtrack plays
Also takes in Salzburg's historical and architectural landmarks and part of the picturesque Lake District
Includes English-speaking driver and car; guide and entrance tickets are NOT included but can be added at extra cost

tours.tour: Bratislava Tour - Guided Tour by Premium Van or Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A 7-hour guided day trip from Vienna to Bratislava's old town, including a stop at Devin Castle.
summaryBullets: Just a one-hour drive from your Vienna hotel to Bratislava
Meets a local guide on arrival for a 3-hour walking tour through the mostly pedestrian old town
Visits Devin Castle, which dominates the townscape, with time for a snack or coffee break if schedule allows
Includes English-speaking driver and car, plus a local certified guide for 4 hours in Bratislava and entrance tickets for Devin Castle

tours.tour: Budapest - Guided Tour Tour by Premium Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A 12-hour guided day trip from Vienna to Budapest, the "Pearl of the Danube," covering the city's iconic landmarks and ending with a traditional Hungarian dinner.
summaryBullets: About a 3-hour drive from Vienna to Budapest, historically the twin cities of Buda and Pest, unified in 1873
Sees Buda's ancient castle district and Fisherman's Bastion, plus the Neogothic Parliament building, the biggest in the world
Visits the Hungarian National Museum, home to the world-famous Crown of St. Stephen
Includes English-speaking driver and car and a local certified guide for 6 hours in Budapest (no entrances planned); evening includes a Hungarian restaurant with local music, food, and wine

tours.tour: Budapest - Guided Tour Tour by Premium Van
tours.summaryIntro: A 12-hour guided day trip from Vienna to Budapest, the "Pearl of the Danube," covering the city's iconic landmarks and ending with a traditional Hungarian dinner.
summaryBullets: About a 3-hour drive from Vienna to Budapest, historically the twin cities of Buda and Pest, unified in 1873
Sees Buda's ancient castle district and Fisherman's Bastion, plus the Neogothic Parliament building, the biggest in the world
Visits the Hungarian National Museum, home to the world-famous Crown of St. Stephen
Includes English-speaking driver and car and a local certified guide for 6 hours in Budapest (no entrances planned); evening includes a Hungarian restaurant with local music, food, and wine

tours.tour: Burgenland - Tour with Lake Neusiedl - Guided Tour by Premium Van or Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: An 8-hour guided drive through Burgenland along the Hungarian border, combining Roman ruins, Haydn history, and Europe's largest steppe lake.
summaryBullets: Passes the archaeological ruins of the Roman fortress Carnuntum, founded by Emperor Marcus Aurelius
Visits Joseph Haydn's birthplace and museum at Rohrau, plus the Esterhazy Palace in Eisenstadt, where Haydn worked for nearly three decades
Continues to Lake Neusiedl, Europe's largest steppe lake and a major bird sanctuary, passing stork-nested villages, with a stop at a local inn for music and wine
Includes English-speaking driver, car, certified guide, and entrance tickets for the Haydn House and Esterhazy Palace; bookable April–October only, not on Mondays

tours.tour: Certified Guide - 4 Hours
tours.summaryIntro: This is a stand-alone certified-guide booking for clients who want expert commentary for a few hours without a car or driver.
summaryBullets: Certified guide service only — no car or driver included
Duration: 4 hours

tours.summaryIntro: This is a stand-alone certified-guide booking for clients who want expert commentary for a few hours without a car or driver.
summaryBullets: Certified guide service only — no car or driver included
Duration: 5 hours

tours.summaryIntro: This is a stand-alone certified-guide booking for clients who want expert commentary for a few hours without a car or driver.
summaryBullets: Certified guide service only — no car or driver included

tours.tour: Certified Guide - 8 Hours
tours.summaryIntro: This is a stand-alone certified-guide booking for clients who want expert commentary for a few hours without a car or driver.
summaryBullets: Certified guide service only — no car or driver included
Duration: 8 hours

tours.tour: Essential City Tour with Schonbrunn Palace - Guided Tour by Premium Van or Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A 4-hour guided introduction to historic Vienna, from the Ringstrasse to St. Stephen's Cathedral, finishing with a visit to Schonbrunn Palace.
summaryBullets: Walks the Ringstrasse, lined with grand buildings reflecting the Habsburg dynasty's rise and its collapse in 1918
Visits St. Stephen's Cathedral, the medieval heart of the city, known for its mix of architectural styles
Concludes at Schonbrunn Palace, the Habsburgs' former summer residence
Includes English-speaking driver and car, certified guide, and entrance tickets for St. Stephen's Cathedral and Schonbrunn Palace

tours.tour: Grand City Tour - Guided Tour by Premium Van or Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A 6-hour guided tour covering Vienna's grandest Ringstrasse landmarks from its days as the seat of a sprawling empire.
summaryBullets: Passes the State Opera, the Hofburg (Imperial Palace), City Hall, the Museums of Natural History and Fine Arts, and the Parliament along the Ringstrasse, built from 1858
Crosses the Danube canal to the Prater, Vienna's historic amusement park
Includes English-speaking driver and car, certified guide, and entrance tickets for the Imperial Palace and Belvedere Palace

tours.tour: Grand City Tour with Schonbrunn Palace - Guided Tour by Premium Van or Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A full 8-hour guided day combining the Grand City Tour with an in-depth visit to Schonbrunn Palace.
summaryBullets: Tours Schonbrunn Palace's more than 1,400 rooms and gardens, a Baroque UNESCO World Heritage Site, including the Great Gallery and Chinese cabinets
Visits the private chambers of Empress Elisabeth ("Sissi") and learns how Emperor Franz Joseph conducted his daily work ruling the dual monarchy
Rounds out with the Grand City Tour's introduction to Vienna's Ringstrasse landmarks
Includes English-speaking driver and car, certified guide, and entrance tickets for the Imperial Palace, Belvedere Palace, and Schonbrunn Palace

tours.tour: Grand City Tour with St Stephans Cathedral - Guided Tour by Premium Van or Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A 7-hour guided day pairing the Grand City Tour with a close look at St. Stephen's Cathedral.
summaryBullets: St. Stephen's Cathedral dates to the early 12th century and houses Europe's second-largest free-swinging church bell, the Pummerin
Final resting place of military commander Prince Eugene of Savoy, Emperor Friedrich III, and founder Duke Rudolf IV
Optional add-on visits to the cathedral's rooftop area and catacombs
Includes English-speaking driver and car, certified guide, and entrance tickets for the Imperial Palace, Belvedere Palace, and St. Stephen's Cathedral

tours.tour: Jewish Vienna - Essential half day tour - Guided Tour by Premium Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A 4-hour guided tour tracing Vienna's Jewish history, from everyday life to the tragedies of the Nazi era.
summaryBullets: Stops at Volkertmarkt in the Second District and the Karmeliterviertel quarter, plus two internationally regarded Jewish museums in the city center
Visits monuments marking the deportation of Vienna's Jewish population, including the former deportation station
Ends at Vienna's Central Cemetery and its Jewish section (no entrances planned on this tour)
Includes English-speaking driver, car, and certified guide; not bookable on Saturdays

tours.tour: Jewish Vienna - Extended full day tour - Guided Tour by Premium Van or Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: An 8-hour guided deep dive into Jewish Vienna, including a kosher lunch and museum visits.
summaryBullets: Visits Volkertmarkt, the Karmeliterviertel quarter, and monuments to the Fascist and Nazi-era deportations from Vienna
Includes a lunch at a kosher restaurant and a visit to the Sigmund Freud Museum
Includes English-speaking driver and car, certified guide, and entrance tickets for the Sigmund Freud Museum, Jewish Museum Judenplatz, and a synagogue; not bookable on Saturdays

tours.tour: Lipizzaner Tour Non - Guided Tour by Premium Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A 10-hour, non-guided full-day trip from Vienna to Piber, Styria — birthplace of the famous Lipizzaner Stallions.
summaryBullets: Visits Piber, about 2.5 hours from Vienna, where roughly 40 Lipizzaner foals are born each year
Includes a carriage ride led by two Lipizzaner mares through the grounds
Foals are born brown, black, or grey and only develop their white coat as adults; occasionally one keeps its dark coat, seen as a lucky charm for the institution
Includes English-speaking driver and car; guide and entrance tickets are NOT included; bookable May–Oct 31, Tuesday through Friday only

tours.tour: Panorama Non - Guided Tour by Premium Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A private 4-hour panoramic drive through Vienna's Prater, the Danube Tower, and the hills above the city.
summaryBullets: Passes the Prater (former imperial hunting grounds and home of the Giant Ferris Wheel) and crosses the Danube to the UN-Centre, Danube Tower, and Danube Island
Climbs Kahlenberg and Leopoldsberg for a scenic view over the city, the point from which the Turks once tried to conquer Vienna
Passes vineyards and villages associated with Beethoven and Schubert, with a chance to stop at a traditional Heurigen wine tavern
Includes English-speaking driver and car; guide and entrance tickets are NOT included but can be added at extra cost

tours.tour: Prague - Guided Tour by Premium Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A 12-hour guided day trip from Vienna to Prague, "The Golden City," covering centuries of architecture and history.
summaryBullets: Crosses the border into the Czech Republic, passing small villages en route to Prague
Visits sites tied to the world's first German-speaking university (14th century), the Gothic architecture of Charles IV, and Art Nouveau landmarks from the early 20th century
Includes English-speaking driver and car and a local certified guide for 4 hours in Prague (no entrances planned)

tours.tour: Salzburg - The Sound of Music Tour - Guided Tour by Premium Van or Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A 12-hour guided day trip from Vienna through the Salzkammergut lake district to Salzburg, following the Sound of Music trail.
summaryBullets: Passes the Benedictine Abbey at Melk and the medieval towns of Ybbs, Linz, and Gmunden before entering the Salzkammergut, a UNESCO World Heritage Site since 1997
Stops in Bad Ischl (once Emperor Franz Josef I's personal spa resort), St. Gilgen, and St. Wolfgang, where Franz Lehar composed some of his operetta melodies
Arrives in Salzburg, the historic "Bishop's City," known for its Romanesque, Gothic, Renaissance, and Baroque architecture
Includes English-speaking driver and car and a local certified guide for a 4-hour walking tour of Salzburg, plus entrance tickets for Hellbrunn Palace

tours.tour: Salzburg The Sound of Music Tour Non - Guided Tour by Premium Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A 12-hour non-guided day trip from Vienna through the Salzkammergut lake district to Salzburg, following the Sound of Music trail.
summaryBullets: Passes the Benedictine Abbey at Melk and the medieval towns of Ybbs, Linz, and Gmunden before entering the Salzkammergut, a UNESCO World Heritage Site since 1997
Stops in Bad Ischl (once Emperor Franz Josef I's personal spa resort), St. Gilgen, and St. Wolfgang, where Franz Lehar composed some of his operetta melodies
Arrives in Salzburg, the historic "Bishop's City," known for its Romanesque, Gothic, Renaissance, and Baroque architecture
Includes English-speaking driver and car

tours.tour: Schonbrunn Palace and Strudel Show - Guided Tour by Premium Van or Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A 4-hour guided visit to Schonbrunn Palace paired with a hands-on Viennese apple strudel-baking show.
summaryBullets: Tours Schonbrunn Palace's over 1,400 rooms and gardens, a Baroque UNESCO World Heritage Site, including the Great Gallery, Chinese cabinets, and Empress Elisabeth's ("Sissi") private chambers
Finishes with a strudel-baking demonstration, including one piece of strudel and a coffee or tea
Includes English-speaking driver and car, certified guide, and entrance tickets for Schonbrunn Palace and the strudel show; bookable April–December

tours.tour: The Low Alps - Semmering and Rax - Guided Tour by Premium Van or Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: An 8-hour guided drive south of Vienna into the Low Alps, ending with a cable car ride up the Rax mountain range.
summaryBullets: Passes Laxenburg Palace (once Empress Maria Theresia's hunting lodge), the spa town of Baden, and Wiener Neustadt, home to the country's oldest elite military academy
Follows the route of the world's first Alpine railway to Reichenau, then rides the cable car up to the Rax summit for Alpine panoramas
Includes English-speaking driver and car, certified guide, cable car ride, and entrance tickets for the Water Main Museum; bookable May–October

tours.tour: Vienna Non - Guided City Tour by Premium Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A private 4-hour drive through historic Vienna, from the Babenberg and Habsburg eras to a visit at Schonbrunn Palace.
summaryBullets: Follows the Ringstrasse's grand buildings and stops at St. Stephen's Cathedral in the medieval heart of the city
Highlight is a visit to Schonbrunn Palace, the former imperial summer residence, with a walk through the royal apartments
Includes English-speaking driver and car; guide and entrance tickets are NOT included but can be added at extra cost

tours.tour: Vienna Woods with Mayerling - Guided Tour by Premium Van or Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A 5-hour guided half-day tour through the Vienna Woods, tracing the region's abbeys, castles, and royal history.
summaryBullets: Visits Liechtenstein Castle (part of Vienna's Danube defenses since the 12th century) and Heiligenkreuz Abbey, a Cistercian monastery with a Gothic cloister
Stops at the Mayerling hunting lodge, where Crown Prince Rudolf died with his mistress, Baroness Mary Vetsera, in an apparent murder-suicide
Passes through Baden, known for sulphur springs drawn from around 1,000 meters below ground
Includes English-speaking driver and car, certified guide, and entrance tickets for the Mayerling Hunting Castle and Heiligenkreuz Abbey

tours.tour: Vienna Woods with Mayerling Non - Guided Tour by Premium Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A private 5-hour, non-guided drive through the Vienna Woods covering the same abbeys, castles, and royal history.
summaryBullets: Visits Liechtenstein Castle and the Cistercian Heiligenkreuz Abbey, which holds the remains of the last Babenberger ruler
Stops at the Mayerling hunting lodge, where Archduke Rudolf died with his mistress, Mary Vetsera
Passes through Baden's sulphur springs, with time on the way back for a stop at a traditional Heurigen wine tavern
Includes English-speaking driver and car; guide and entrance tickets are NOT included but can be added at extra cost

tours.tour: Vienna through a lens - Guided Tour by Premium Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A 4-hour guided tour of Vienna's film history, from The Third Man to modern blockbusters shot in the city.
summaryBullets: Visits filming locations from The Third Man, Woman in Gold, Mission Impossible 5, and Before Sunrise
Includes the giant Ferris wheel, where James Bond rode with a Bond girl in one film, and the State Opera House, featured in another
Includes English-speaking driver and car, certified guide, and a private tour through the Third Man Museum

tours.tour: Wachau - Romantic Danube Valley - Guided Tour by Premium Van or Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A 6-hour guided day trip through the Wachau valley, one of Austria's most picturesque wine regions.
summaryBullets: Visits Melk, home to Austria's most impressive Baroque Benedictine Abbey
Passes through Durnstein, site of the legend of Richard the Lionheart's imprisonment and the troubadour Blondel, and Krems, the heart of the Wachau
Includes English-speaking driver, car, certified guide, and entrance tickets for Melk Abbey

tours.tour: Wachau - Romantic Danube Valley with Boat Ride - Guided Tour by Premium Van or Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: An 8-hour guided Wachau valley tour that adds a Danube boat ride between Melk and Durnstein.
summaryBullets: Visits Melk's Baroque Benedictine Abbey, then boards a boat along the Danube from Melk to Durnstein
Passes Durnstein, tied to the legend of Richard the Lionheart's imprisonment, and Krems, the heart of the Wachau
Evening stop at a Heuriger wine tavern, one of the region's famed wine taverns
Includes English-speaking driver, car, certified guide, entrance tickets for Melk Abbey, and the Danube boat ride from Melk to Durnstein; bookable May–September only

tours.tour: Wachau Romantic Danube Valley Non - Guided Tour by Premium Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: An 8-hour non-guided Wachau valley day trip with an optional Danube boat ride between Melk and Durnstein.
summaryBullets: Visits Melk's Baroque Benedictine Abbey, with an optional boat ride along the Danube from Melk to Durnstein
Passes Durnstein (tied to the Richard the Lionheart legend) and Krems, the heart of the Wachau, with possible time for a Heurigen wine tavern stop
Includes English-speaking driver and car; guide and entrance tickets are NOT included but can be added at extra cost; bookable May–September only

tours.tour: Full-Day Bruges City Tour by Mercedes E
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day private Bruges city tour in a Mercedes E, giving guests an unhurried look at the medieval "Venice of the North" and its UNESCO-listed historic center.
summaryBullets: Sees the Lake of Love, the Begijnhof, Walplein Square, the Basilica of the Holy Blood, and the Grote Markt with its Belfort bell tower
Also visits Old St. John's Hospital, the Church of Our Lady, the Gruuthuse Palace, the Dijver Canal, Rozenhoedkaai, and St. Salvator's Cathedral
Runs 8 hours, with pickup 15 minutes prior directly from the client's hotel
Inclusions: private car and driver

tours.tour: Half-Day Bruges City Tour by Mercedes E
tours.summaryIntro: A half-day private Bruges highlights tour in a Mercedes E, perfect for guests with limited time who still want to see the city's icons.
summaryBullets: Sees Saint John's Hospital, Our Lady Church, the Market Square with the Belfry, the old City Hall, and the Holy Blood Chapel
Runs 3 hours, with pickup 15 minutes prior directly from the client's hotel
Inclusions: private car and driver

tours.summaryIntro: A full-day private Brussels city tour in a Mercedes E, taking guests through the old town's key sights and hidden corners.
summaryBullets: Discovers the main sights of the old town, including the majestic Grand Place
Winds through the alleys and small streets of the city center to find Brussels' most beautiful corners and history

tours.tour: Beyond the Horizon - Elaphiti Islands
tours.summaryIntro: A private motor boat day trip from Dubrovnik to the Elaphiti Islands, a breathtaking thirteen-island archipelago perfect for guests wanting secluded coves and history in one outing.
summaryBullets: Cruises to the Elaphiti Islands, visiting coves, hidden bays, beaches, and fishing villages, with time for swimming in crystal-clear waters
Only three islands — Sipan, Lopud, and Kolocep — are inhabited; aristocratic Dubrovnik families built summer manors here in the 15th century
Runs 8 hours, departing 9:00 AM, with pickup/drop-off at Pile Gate or the client's hotel
Inclusions: round-trip transfer to/from Dubrovnik port, private motor boat, skipper, fuel, and onboard refreshments, plus a private local guide and entrance fees

tours.tour: Culinary Lessons in a Lush Garden - Cooking Class
tours.summaryIntro: A private cooking class in Trsteno, a coastal village once used as a Game of Thrones filming location, giving guests a hands-on taste of Dalmatian cuisine with a local host family.
summaryBullets: Visits the Trsteno Arboretum area and host Katija's traditional family residence
Guests pick vegetables and herbs from Katija's own organic garden for a seasonal menu, with fish sourced from local fishermen
Includes preparing and enjoying a traditional Dalmatian meal in the family home
Inclusions: round-trip transfer from the hotel, hands-on cooking class, and traditional lunch with drinks; runs 4 hours

tours.tour: Discover Dubrovnik Walking Tour
tours.summaryIntro: A private guided walking tour of Dubrovnik's UNESCO-listed Old Town, the fortified city George Bernard Shaw called paradise on Earth.
summaryBullets: Strolls the Stradun, the main pedestrian street lined with cafes, shops, and monuments
Visits the Franciscan monastery, home to one of the three oldest pharmacies in Europe, plus the Orlando Column, Sponza Palace, Church of St. Blasius, and Rector's Palace
Runs 2 hours, with pickup at Pile Gate or the hotel lobby for clients in central Dubrovnik hotels (a transfer fee applies for hotels farther out)
Inclusions: English-speaking private guide and entrance fees

tours.tour: Forgotten in the Tides of Change - Elaphiti Islands
tours.summaryIntro: A private motor boat day trip from Dubrovnik to the Elaphiti Islands, a breathtaking thirteen-island archipelago perfect for guests wanting secluded coves and history in one outing.
summaryBullets: Cruises to the Elaphiti Islands, visiting coves, hidden bays, beaches, and fishing villages, with time for swimming in crystal-clear waters
Only three islands — Sipan, Lopud, and Kolocep — are inhabited; aristocratic Dubrovnik families built summer manors here in the 15th century
Runs 4.5 hours, departing 9:00am or 2:00pm, with pickup/drop-off at the client's hotel
Inclusions: round-trip transfer to/from Dubrovnik port by private motor boat, English-speaking skipper, fuel for 2 hours of active cruising, and light onboard refreshments

tours.tour: Jewels of Montenegro from Dubrovnik
tours.summaryIntro: A private day tour from Dubrovnik to Montenegro's Boka Bay, a UNESCO World Heritage Site since 1979 ringed by mountains and historic villages.
summaryBullets: Visits the Baroque town of Perast and its museum of seafaring, then boards a boat to the island of Our Lady of the Rocks, passing the island of St. George
Continues to Kotor, a walled medieval city with pink-paved streets, bustling markets, and Byzantine and Venetian architectural influences
Runs 7 hours, departing 9:00am, with pickup from the client's hotel in Dubrovnik
Inclusions: all transfers, English-speaking private local guide, and entrance fees

tours.tour: Lush Odyssey
tours.summaryIntro: A private motor boat excursion from Dubrovnik to Mljet, one of the greenest islands in the Adriatic and reputed setting of Homer's Odyssey.
summaryBullets: Explores Mljet National Park independently, including the Great and Small Lakes connected by a narrow channel to the open sea
Visits the Isle of St. Mary in the Great Lake, home to a 12th-century Benedictine Monastery reachable by small boat
Runs 8 hours, with pickup/drop-off at the client's hotel
Inclusions: round-trip transfer to/from Dubrovnik port by private motor boat, English-speaking skipper, fuel for 3 hours of active cruising, and light onboard refreshments

tours.tour: Oysters of Ston
tours.summaryIntro: A private culinary excursion to Ston and Mali Ston, towns famed for their oysters, mussels, wine, and olive oil.
summaryBullets: Learns oyster harvesting from a local host family that has passed down the tradition for generations, including how oysters form, what they eat, and how to shuck them
Finishes with an oyster tasting and light seafood lunch at a private island location
Runs 4 hours, with pickup/drop-off at the client's hotel
Inclusions: all transfers, oyster tasting, and light seafood lunch

tours.tour: Pearl in the Moonlight
tours.summaryIntro: An evening private motor boat cruise around Dubrovnik's city walls and the island of Lokrum, ending with a stroll through the Old Town at night.
summaryBullets: Cruises the waters around the historic city walls and Lokrum island, with local delicacies and refreshments served onboard
Disembarks at the Old Town port for guests to enjoy a Dubrovnik evening on their own
Runs 2 hours, departing 6:30pm, with one-way transfer from the client's hotel to the port
Inclusions: one-way private motor boat transfer, English-speaking skipper, fuel for 1 hour of active cruising, and onboard local delicacies and refreshments

tours.tour: Pearl of the Mediterranean Walking Tour
tours.summaryIntro: A private guided walking tour of Dubrovnik's UNESCO-listed Old Town, the fortified city George Bernard Shaw called paradise on Earth.
summaryBullets: Strolls the Stradun, the main pedestrian street lined with cafes, shops, and monuments
Visits the Franciscan monastery, home to one of the three oldest pharmacies in Europe, plus the Orlando Column, Sponza Palace, Church of St. Blasius, and Rector's Palace
Runs 3 hours, with pickup at Pile Gate or the hotel lobby for clients in central Dubrovnik hotels (a transfer fee applies for hotels farther out)
Inclusions: English-speaking private guide and entrance fees

tours.tour: Sea Kayaking around Dubrovnik City Walls

summaryBullets: Paddles beneath the city walls, across the channel, and around Lokrum, with stops at caves and beaches for swimming and snorkeling

Runs 3 hours (morning departure recommended for favorable weather), with round-trip transfer from the client's hotel
Inclusions: round-trip transfer, expert guide, kayaking equipment, and refreshments

tours.tour: Secrets of Kings Landing - Game of Thrones Walking Tour
tours.summaryIntro: A private Game of Thrones-themed walking tour of Dubrovnik Old Town, tracing filming locations from the show's King's Landing.
summaryBullets: Visits filming locations from the HBO series, with the guide sharing behind-the-scenes stories about the cast and crew's time in Dubrovnik
Guide points out spots where pivotal scenes unfolded
Runs 2 hours, with pickup at Pile Gate or the hotel lobby for clients in central Dubrovnik hotels
Inclusions: local guide and entrance fees

tours.tour: Taste of Tradition - Cooking Class
tours.summaryIntro: A private cooking class at a family-run estate in the Dubrovnik region, pairing a home-cooked meal with local family history.
summaryBullets: Welcomed with a drink and a presentation on the property and family history before heading to the kitchen
Guests stroll the garden to handpick ingredients and learn about cultivation methods before cooking
Meal is enjoyed with wine at the estate
Inclusions: round-trip transfers from the hotel, hands-on cooking class, and traditional lunch/dinner with drinks; runs 5 hours

tours.tour: Tastes of Dubrovnik Walking Tour
tours.summaryIntro: A private walking tour of Dubrovnik that pairs the city's history with its culinary heritage.
summaryBullets: Samples award-winning local olive oils and wines alongside modern and historical dishes as you stroll the Old Town
Guide shares insights into Croatia's winemaking and olive oil traditions
Runs 3 hours, with pickup at Pile Gate or the hotel lobby for clients in central Dubrovnik hotels
Inclusions: local guide plus wine and local delicacies tasting

tours.tour: Where Legend comes to Life - Game of Thrones walking tour
tours.summaryIntro: A private Game of Thrones walking tour of Dubrovnik focused on the city's role as King's Landing, with a boat crossing to Lokrum Island.
summaryBullets: Walks the city walls and views Blackwater Bay, site of the show's iconic battle
Takes a public boat to Lokrum Island to see the Benedictine Monastery used as the House of the Undying at Qarth, with the story of Daenerys Targaryen's escape
Runs 5 hours, with pickup at Pile Gate or the hotel lobby for clients in central Dubrovnik hotels
Inclusions: local guide and entrance fees

tours.tour: Where the Silk Road Begins - Korcula Island
tours.summaryIntro: A private motor boat cruise from Dubrovnik through the Elaphiti Islands to Korcula, birthplace of Marco Polo.
summaryBullets: Visits Korcula, over 2,000 years old and once a Greek colony, exploring narrow cobblestone streets to the Cathedral of St. Marco (Gothic and Renaissance architecture)

Inclusions: round-trip transfer to/from Dubrovnik marina, private motor boat, skipper, fuel, and onboard refreshments

tours.tour: A Tale of Lavender and Olives and Wine

summaryBullets: Explores Hvar Town's Old Town and the Spanish Fortress, then Stari Grad, Croatia's oldest town, home to the Tvrdalj fortress built by Renaissance poet Petar Hektorovic
Visits the UNESCO-listed Stari Grad Plain, an 80-hectare agricultural colony established by the Ancient Greeks
Includes wine tasting in the village of Jelsa and a traditional lunch at a local tavern
Inclusions: car and driver, private English-speaking guide, wine tasting, and traditional lunch; runs 6 hours (morning departure recommended for winery/site hours)

tours.tour: Hvar Island Splendour

summaryBullets: Visits the largest square in Dalmatia, ringed by palaces, and the Cathedral of St. Stephen (Renaissance and early Baroque)
Passes the Franciscan and Benedictine Monastery and the Arsenal, a 13th-century warehouse that houses Europe's oldest theatre, dating from 1612
Option to visit Hvar Fortress, a 16th-century Venetian-era citadel with views over the town
Inclusions: English-speaking private guide and entrance fees per the itinerary; runs 2 hours

tours.tour: Like Jewels in a Crown - Pakleni Islands

summaryBullets: Cruises past sandy coves surrounded by pine forests, with the option to stop for a swim in a hidden bay

Inclusions: private motorboat, English-speaking skipper, fuel for 2 hours of active cruising, and onboard refreshment

In Split, visits the 1,700-year-old Diocletian's Palace, the retirement residence of the Roman Emperor Diocletian after his abdication
Runs 6 hours, with pickup/drop-off at the client's hotel
Inclusions: car and driver, English-speaking private guide, and entrance fees

Passes the Prague Castle complex (Saint Vitus Cathedral, Old Royal Palace) and Charles Bridge over the Vltava River

Pickup and drop-off at the guest's hotel, timed to their request

tours.summaryIntro: This 5-hour private tour pairs a car and guide for an overview of Prague plus a rare visit inside the Strahov Monastery Library, one of the city's most exclusive sights.

Theological and Philosophical Halls hold over 280,000 ancient books; the oldest manuscript, the Strahov Evangeliary, dates to 860

summaryBullets: English-speaking private guide accompanies guests through Prague for 6 hours

tours.tour: 8 hours Car and Driver

summaryBullets: 5-hour tour with a private guide who is an authority on Prague's secrets and cultural history
2 hours with driver and car to reach story-related sites, including the Folimanka Civil Protection Shelter, Crucifix Bastion, and Petrin Tower

tours.tour: Full Day Cesky Krumlov Ceske Budejovice
tours.summaryIntro: This full-day tour through South Bohemia visits the UNESCO-listed town of Cesky Krumlov and the historic city of Ceske Budejovice, home of the original Budweiser beer.
summaryBullets: Cesky Krumlov's complex includes 300 historic houses and the National Castle and Chateau, the second-largest in the country after Prague Castle, known as the "Renaissance Pearl"
Ceske Budejovice features the largest square in the Czech Republic and the first European continental horse railway
Tour concludes with a visit to the Budvar brewery, whose beer inspired the name of the American Budweiser
Includes guide, driver, car, and entrance fees over the 9-hour tour

tours.tour: Full Day Dresden
tours.summaryIntro: This full-day excursion takes guests on a scenic drive to Dresden, Germany, to see the city's rebuilt cultural landmarks following its WWII destruction.
summaryBullets: Old Masters Gallery in the Zwinger displays works by Raphael, Titian, and Canaletto
Visits the Royal Palace and Dresden Castle complex, dominated by the Church of the Virgin Mary, plus the New Green Vault (closed Tuesdays)
Also sees the Blue Wonder steel bridge and the Semper Opera House
Includes guide, driver, car, and entrance fees over the 8-hour tour; lunch is not included

tours.tour: Full Day Karlovy Vary
tours.summaryIntro: This full-day tour introduces guests to Karlovy Vary, a spa town built around hot springs 77 miles from Prague.
summaryBullets: Guests can purchase or rent a drinking pot to sample the mineral waters along the main colonnade
Learn about the "Mattoni" mineral water and "Becherovka" herb liqueur while browsing local shops, restaurants, and cafes
Visits the Moser glass factory, producer of the "Glass of Kings"
Includes guide, driver, car, and entrance fees over the 8-hour tour

tours.tour: Full Day Karlstejn and Konopiste Castles
tours.summaryIntro: This full-day tour covers two of Bohemia's most storied castles — Karlstejn and Konopiste — spanning medieval treasure history and the outbreak of WWI.
summaryBullets: Karlstejn Castle once housed the Royal Treasures and Crown Jewels; the Chapel of the Holy Cross holds one of the world's largest collections of panel paintings
Also explores the Marian and Great Towers, museum of lapidary, picture gallery, and library at Karlstejn
Konopiste Castle, rebuilt in Baroque style, was home to Archduke Franz Ferdinand d'Este until his 1914 assassination sparked WWI; his hunting trophies, weapons, and art collections remain on display
Includes guide, entrance fees, driver, and car over the 8-hour tour

tours.tour: Full Day Prague City Tour
tours.summaryIntro: This full-day private tour gives guests a comprehensive overview of Prague, combining a driving tour with walking visits to the city's most iconic landmarks.
summaryBullets: Walking visit of the Prague Castle complex, including St. Vitus Cathedral, St. George Basilica, and Golden Lane
Drive to Malostranske Square to see the monumental St. Nicholas Cathedral, then through Mala Strana
Crosses Charles Bridge for panoramic views of the Jewish Quarter, Old Town, Powder Tower, Municipal House, and Wenceslas Square
Includes guide, driver, car, and entrance fees over the 7-hour tour

tours.tour: Full Day Prague City Tour Old Town Hall with Underground
tours.summaryIntro: This full-day private tour goes beneath Prague's Old Town Hall for an exclusive look at its ceremonial halls and hidden underground passageways.
summaryBullets: Walks through the Apostles' Chapel, Old Councillors' Hall, and Brozik Hall
Offers a close-up encounter with the Apostles' statues, normally seen only from the street below
Descends into Romanesque underground chambers and passageways beneath Prague's streets
Includes guide, driver, car, and entrance fees over 8.5 hours, plus Tower access with lift included

tours.tour: Full Day Prague City Tour and Strahov Library
tours.summaryIntro: This full-day private tour pairs an overview of Prague with an exclusive visit to the Strahov Monastery Library, one of the city's most restricted sights.
summaryBullets: Private visit to the Strahov Monastery library, founded in 1140 and normally closed to the public
Theological and Philosophical Halls hold over 280,000 ancient books; the oldest manuscript, the Strahov Evangeliary, dates to 860
Continues to the Prague Castle complex: St. Vitus Cathedral, St. George Basilica, Old Royal Palace, and Golden Lane
Includes guide, driver, car, entrance fees, and the private Strahov Library visit over 8 hours

tours.tour: Glass Workshop - Where the Ancient Art Meets Modern Dreams
tours.summaryIntro: A Distinguished Journey from Prague into the Heart of Bohemian Glass Mastery Two Carefully Curated Experiences Designed for Different Desires OPTION I. : The Complete Mastery Experience For those who demand nothing less than perfection â€¢

tours.tour: Half Day Karlstejn Castle
tours.summaryIntro: This half-day tour visits Karlstejn Castle, the fairy-tale fortress built to safeguard the Bohemian Crown Jewels.
summaryBullets: Built in 1348 by King of Bohemia and Holy Roman Emperor Charles IV to store the Royal Treasures and Crown Jewels

Chapel of the Holy Cross features walls of semi-precious stones, gold gilding, and 127 panel paintings of saints by the workshop of Master Theodorik — one of the largest collections of Gothic panel paintings in the world
Also visits the Marian and Great Towers, Church of Our Lady, Chapel of St. Catherine, former Sacristy, and the castle's picture gallery and library
Includes guide, entrance fees, driver, and car over the 5-hour tour

tours.tour: Half Day Konopiste Castle
tours.summaryIntro: This half-day tour visits Konopiste Castle, the former residence of Archduke Franz Ferdinand d'Este whose 1914 assassination triggered WWI.
summaryBullets: Dates to the 14th century, originally French Gothic and later rebuilt as a Baroque chateau
Was home to Archduke Franz Ferdinand d'Este, heir to the Austro-Hungarian throne, until his assassination in 1914
Displays his collections of hunting trophies, weapons, antique furniture, paintings, and tapestry
Includes guide, entrance fees, driver, and car over the 5-hour tour

tours.tour: Half Day Nelahozeves
tours.summaryIntro: This half-day tour visits Nelahozeves Castle, a Renaissance landmark known for its art collection and its connection to composer Antonin Dvorak.
summaryBullets: Renaissance castle located 31 miles north of Prague, high above the Vltava River
Houses one of the largest and most significant private art collections in Europe, including works by Bruegel, Rubens, Veronese, and Panini
Castle curator leads guests through the collection
Birthplace of composer Antonin Dvorak; includes guide, driver, car, and entrance fees over 4 hours

tours.tour: Half Day Prague City Tour
tours.summaryIntro: This half-day private tour gives guests a compact overview of Prague's must-see landmarks by car and on foot.
summaryBullets: Walking visit of the Prague Castle complex, including St. Vitus Cathedral, St. George Basilica, and Golden Lane
Drive to Malostranske Square to see St. Nicholas Cathedral, then through Mala Strana
Crosses Charles Bridge for panoramic views of the Jewish Quarter, Old Town, Powder Tower, Municipal House, and Wenceslas Square
Includes guide, driver, car, and entrance fees over the 4-hour tour

tours.tour: Half Day Prague City Tour and Strahov Library
tours.summaryIntro: This half-day private tour combines an overview of Prague with an exclusive visit to the Strahov Monastery Library.
summaryBullets: Private visit to the Strahov Monastery library, founded in 1140 and normally closed to the public, with Theological and Philosophical Halls holding over 280,000 ancient books
Continues to the Prague Castle complex (St. Vitus Cathedral, Royal Palace, Golden Lane), then Malostranske Square and St. Nicholas Cathedral
Includes guide, driver, car, entrance fees, and the private Strahov Library visit over 4 hours

tours.tour: Half Day Terezin
tours.summaryIntro: This half-day tour visits Terezin, a former fortress converted into a WWII concentration camp, offering a sobering look at this chapter of history.
summaryBullets: Terezin (Theresienstadt) was an 18th-century fort converted into a concentration camp for Jewish people
The site was used to deceive the International Red Cross into believing it was a spa town
Visits the Museum, Crematorium, Magdeburg Barracks, and Hidden Synagogue
Includes guide, driver, car, and entrance fees over the 5-hour tour

tours.tour: Hiking in Bohemian Paradise
tours.summaryIntro: This 6-hour guided hike explores Bohemian Paradise, a UNESCO-protected landscape of sandstone cliffs and fairytale scenery.
summaryBullets: Explores the Prachovske Rocks, a labyrinth of sandstone towers and hidden passages
Includes a scenic 5km (3.1 mile) hiking route
Guided journey covers stunning landscapes, traditional architecture, and local food over 6 hours
Includes guide, driver, and car

tours.tour: Pub Crawl
tours.summaryIntro: This walking pub crawl samples Prague's best pilsners, lagers, and ales across several traditional pubs.
summaryBullets: Guide shares the history of each pub and the story of Czech brewing traditions
Includes unlimited beer tasting and food samples between tastings
Runs 3 hours with hotel pickup and drop-off

tours.tour: Walking Tour of the Jewish Quarter and Old Town
tours.summaryIntro: This walking tour through Prague's Jewish Quarter and Old Town visits the largest preserved complex of synagogues in Europe.
summaryBullets: Visits Maisel Synagogue, Pinkas Synagogue (connected to the Old Jewish Cemetery), Klausen Synagogue, Ceremonial Hall, High Synagogue, and Jewish Town Hall
Sees the Alt-New Schul, the oldest functioning synagogue in Europe, dating to 1376, and the Spanish Synagogue
Continues to Old Town Square and, time permitting, the Royal Way, Powder Tower, and the Art Nouveau Municipal House
Includes guide and entrance fees over the 4-hour, on-foot-only tour

tours.tour: Castle Tour of North Zealand by Mercedes E-class
tours.summaryIntro: This private Mercedes E-class tour explores North Zealand's royal castles and coastal scenery outside Copenhagen.
summaryBullets: Visits Kronborg Castle in Elsinore and Frederiksborg Castle
Also covers the Danish Riviera, Louisiana Art Museum, and countryside
Includes car and an English-speaking driver-guide over the 7-hour tour
Entrance tickets to the sights are not included and should be pre-purchased

Includes car and an English-speaking driver-guide over the 3-hour tour

Includes car and an English-speaking driver-guide over the 10-hour tour

tours.tour: Full Day At Disposal in Dover
tours.summaryIntro: A flexible full-day private car and driver tour of Dover, worth booking for clients who want to combine castles, countryside, and market towns on their own schedule.
summaryBullets: 8-hour itinerary can combine two 4-hour modules: Historic Steam Train ride between Tenterden and Bodiam Castle, Canterbury Cathedral, Leeds Castle, Walmer Castle and free time in Sandwich, or Medieval Rye's Heritage Model
Alternative 7.5-hour combo includes entrance into both Canterbury Cathedral and Leeds Castle (ticket price not included)
Inclusions: car and driver, Classic Welcome sign, English-speaking uniformed chauffeur, bottled water, "Things to do" pamphlet, free Wi-Fi; private guide available for an additional cost

tours.tour: Full Day At Disposal in Dover with Private Guide
tours.summaryIntro: Full-day Dover touring with a private car, driver, and guide included, ideal for clients who want expert commentary while building their own castle-and-countryside day.
summaryBullets: 4-hour modules to combine: Historic Steam Train (Tenterden to Bodiam Castle), Canterbury Cathedral, Leeds Castle, Walmer Castle and Sandwich, or Medieval Rye Heritage Model
7.5-hour option includes entrance to both Canterbury Cathedral and Leeds Castle (ticket price not included)
Inclusions: car, guide, and driver, Classic Welcome sign, uniformed chauffeur, bottled water, pamphlet, free Wi-Fi

tours.tour: Full Day Bath Unguided
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day unguided trip to the UNESCO World Heritage spa city of Bath, a great fit for clients drawn to Roman history and Georgian architecture.
summaryBullets: Visit the Roman period baths, the Bath of Jane Austen, Bath Abbey, and the Royal Pump Room
Located 100 miles west of London; known for hot springs, medieval heritage, Georgian architecture, and the Fashion Museum
Learn the origin of Yankee Doodle's "stuck a feather in his cap and called it macaroni"
Inclusion: private vehicle and driver, 10-hour duration

tours.tour: Full Day Bath with Private Guide visit to Roman Baths
tours.summaryIntro: Same UNESCO-listed Bath itinerary as the unguided version, upgraded with a private guide and included entrance tickets for a deeper visit.
summaryBullets: Roman period baths, the Bath of Jane Austen, Bath Abbey, and the Royal Pump Room
100 miles west of London; hot springs, medieval heritage, Georgian architecture, Fashion Museum
Inclusions: private vehicle, driver, and guide, plus tickets; 10-hour duration

tours.tour: Full Day Canterbury and Dover Castle Unguided
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day unguided pairing of Canterbury's ancient cathedral with Dover's clifftop medieval castle, ideal for history-minded clients.
summaryBullets: Canterbury Cathedral and the ruins of St. Augustine's Abbey; hear the story of Archbishop Thomas Becket's 1170 murder
Dover Castle (12th century) featuring a 289-foot deep well older than the castle, a Roman lighthouse, and an Anglo-Saxon church, all within the castle walls
Dover's famous White Cliffs and its history as the shortest sea crossing to mainland Europe
Inclusion: private vehicle and driver, 9-hour duration

tours.tour: Full Day Canterbury and Dover Castle with Private Guide
tours.summaryIntro: Same Canterbury and Dover Castle full-day itinerary, enhanced with a private guide and included tickets.
summaryBullets: Canterbury Cathedral, ruins of St Augustine's Abbey, and the story of Thomas Becket's 1170 murder
Dover Castle's 289-foot deep well, Roman lighthouse, Anglo-Saxon church, and the White Cliffs of Dover
Inclusions: private vehicle, driver, and guide, plus tickets; 9-hour duration

tours.tour: Full Day Cotswolds Unguided
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day unguided scenic drive through the Cotswolds' countryside villages, a picture-perfect day for clients who love English village charm.
summaryBullets: Route spans four counties — Worcestershire, Gloucestershire, Oxfordshire, and Wiltshire — from Chipping Campden in the north to Bath in the south
May include villages such as Bilbury, Bolton on the Water, Stow on the Wold, and Chipping Campden
Lunch stop at a local pub (meal not included)
Inclusion: private vehicle and driver, 8-hour duration

tours.tour: Full Day Cotswolds with Private Guide
tours.summaryIntro: Same Cotswolds village-hopping day, enhanced with a private guide for added context.
summaryBullets: Route spans Worcestershire, Gloucestershire, Oxfordshire, and Wiltshire, from Chipping Campden to Bath
May include Bilbury, Bolton on the Water, Stow on the Wold, and Chipping Campden
Lunch stop at a local pub (meal not included)
Inclusion: private vehicle, driver, and guide; 8-hour duration

tours.tour: Full Day Hampton Court and Windsor Unguided
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day unguided journey through royal history, visiting Henry VIII's Hampton Court and Windsor Castle — a strong pick for clients drawn to royal heritage.
summaryBullets: Hampton Court Palace: old state apartments, public rooms, and the magnificent grounds
Runnymede, site of the Kennedy Memorial and the historic signing of the Magna Carta, en route to Windsor
Windsor Castle (restored since the 1992 fire), with optional 45-minute River Thames cruise, Eton College playing fields, or Windsor's antique shops and tea rooms
Inclusion: private vehicle and driver, 8-hour duration

tours.tour: Full Day Hampton Court and Windsor with Private Guide
tours.summaryIntro: Same Hampton Court and Windsor day, enhanced with a private guide and included tickets.
summaryBullets: Hampton Court Palace's state apartments and grounds
Runnymede's Magna Carta history, then Windsor Castle with optional Thames cruise, Eton College fields, or Windsor's shops and tea rooms
Inclusions: private vehicle, driver, and guide, plus tickets; 8-hour duration

tours.tour: Full Day Harry Potter Unguided
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day unguided Harry Potter filming-locations tour through London and Oxford, built for fans wanting to see where the movies were made.
summaryBullets: London Zoo (where Harry discovers he can talk to snakes), King's Cross Station (Platform 9¾), and the London Eye for views of Big Ben, the Thames, and Parliament
Drive-by of Australia House on the Strand, near where Gringotts scenes were filmed (the actual filming area is not open to the public), plus Melbourne Place
Oxford: the historic setting of the Hogwarts staircase, dining room, library, and hospital
Inclusion: private vehicle and driver, 8-hour duration; optional lunch stop (meal not included)

tours.tour: Full Day Harry Potter with Private Guide - London Zoo/London Eye Fast Track
tours.summaryIntro: Same full-day Harry Potter tour through London and Oxford, upgraded with a private guide.
summaryBullets: London Zoo, King's Cross Station (Platform 9¾), and the London Eye views of Big Ben, the Thames, and Parliament
Drive-by of Australia House on the Strand and Melbourne Place; Oxford's Hogwarts-inspired staircase, dining room, library, and hospital
Inclusion: private vehicle, driver, and guide; 8-hour duration

tours.tour: Full Day Leeds Castle and Chartwell Unguided
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day pairing of two historic Kent estates — Leeds Castle and Chartwell House — ideal for clients interested in royal history and Churchill's life.
summaryBullets: Leeds Castle: over 900 years of history, an immersive "Queens with Means" cinematic experience, a maze, birds of prey displays, and 500 acres of gardens and parkland
Chartwell House: Sir Winston Churchill's family home from 1924 until his death, preserved in its original state with paintings, maps, documents, and personal mementoes
Inclusion: private vehicle and driver, 9-hour duration

tours.tour: Full Day Leeds Castle and Chartwell with Private Guide
tours.summaryIntro: Same Leeds Castle and Chartwell day, enhanced with a private guide and included tickets.
summaryBullets: Leeds Castle's 900-year history, "Queens with Means" cinematic experience, maze, and 500 acres of gardens and parkland
Chartwell House, Churchill's family home from 1924 until his death, with original rooms, paintings, and mementoes
Inclusions: private vehicle, driver, and guide, plus tickets; 9-hour duration

tours.tour: Full Day London Highlights Unguided
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day unguided private vehicle tour covering London's essential landmarks, a solid orientation day for first-time visitors.
summaryBullets: Buckingham Palace (possible Changing of the Guard), Westminster Abbey, Houses of Parliament, Big Ben, and Parliament Square, plus photo stop at the London Eye

Drive along Fleet Street past St Paul's Cathedral, across Tower Bridge to the Tower of London, then Trafalgar Square, Admiralty Arch, The Mall, St James Palace, and Piccadilly, with time to shop at Harrod's
Inclusions: car and driver, Classic Welcome sign, uniformed chauffeur, bottled water, pamphlet, free Wi-Fi; guide available at additional cost
Lunch stop at a local pub (meal not included)

tours.tour: Full Day London Highlights with Private Guide - Tower of London or Westminster Abbey
tours.summaryIntro: Same full-day London Highlights route, enhanced with a private guide and choice of Tower of London or Westminster Abbey entry.
summaryBullets: Buckingham Palace, Westminster Abbey, Houses of Parliament, Big Ben, London Eye photo stop, St Paul's Cathedral, Tower Bridge, Tower of London, Trafalgar Square, and Piccadilly
Guide accompanies throughout; entrance tickets included
Inclusion: private vehicle, driver, and guide, plus tickets; 8-hour duration

tours.tour: Full Day Stonehenge and Salisbury Unguided
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day unguided pairing of the UNESCO World Heritage site of Stonehenge with historic Salisbury Cathedral.
summaryBullets: Stonehenge: 40-ton stones on Salisbury Hill dating back 5,000 years, with theories ranging from a religious temple to an astronomical clock to a Bronze Age burial ground
Salisbury Cathedral: nearly 800 years of history, home to the finest preserved Magna Carta and Europe's oldest working clock
Climb 332 steps to the base of Britain's tallest spire for sweeping views across Salisbury
Inclusion: private vehicle and driver, 8-hour duration

tours.tour: Full Day Stonehenge and Salisbury with Private Guide - Stonehenge and Salisbury
tours.summaryIntro: Same Stonehenge and Salisbury day, enhanced with a private guide and included tickets.
summaryBullets: Stonehenge's 5,000-year-old stone formation on Salisbury Hill
Salisbury Cathedral's Magna Carta, Europe's oldest working clock, and 332-step climb to Britain's tallest spire
Inclusions: private vehicle, driver, and guide, plus tickets; 8-hour duration

tours.tour: Full Day Vehicle Tour in London Unguided
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day private vehicle at the client's full disposal in London — ideal for guests who prefer to set their own pace between sightseeing and shopping.
summaryBullets: Driver available for 8 hours to visit any preferred London monuments or wait during shopping at Harrod's
Lunch stop at a local pub (meal not included)
Inclusion: private vehicle and driver

tours.summaryIntro: Same full-day at-disposal concept in London, with a private guide directing the day using local knowledge.
summaryBullets: Guide and driver available for 8 hours to visit favorite London monuments or wait during shopping at Harrod's
Lunch stop at a local pub (meal not included)
Inclusion: private vehicle, driver, and guide

tours.tour: Full Day Vehicle Tour outside London Unguided
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day private vehicle at disposal outside London (up to 90 miles), built around Stonehenge and Windsor for guests wanting flexible countryside time.
summaryBullets: Due to travel time, the day is built around Stonehenge and Windsor, with time to explore each leisurely
Lunch stop at a local pub (meal not included); optional Harrod's drop-off on return to London
Inclusion: private vehicle and driver, 8-hour duration

tours.tour: Full Day Vehicle Tour outside London with Private Guide
tours.summaryIntro: Same full-day Stonehenge-and-Windsor at-disposal day outside London, enhanced with a private guide and tickets.
summaryBullets: Itinerary centers on Stonehenge and Windsor, explored leisurely over 8 hours
Lunch stop at a local pub (meal not included); optional Harrod's drop-off on return

tours.tour: Full Day Walking Tour with Private Guide 8 hours
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day walking tour of London led by a private guide, giving clients an on-foot introduction to the city's main highlights.
summaryBullets: 8-hour on-foot tour covering the city's main highlights, including museums, galleries, and main cultural sights
Designed as an introduction that leaves clients confident navigating the city afterward
Inclusion: Private Guide Only, plus Classic Welcome sign, uniformed chauffeur, bottled water, pamphlet, and free Wi-Fi

tours.tour: Full Day Warwick and Stratford Unguided
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day unguided pairing of Warwick Castle and Shakespeare's Stratford-upon-Avon, ideal for clients interested in medieval history and literary heritage.
summaryBullets: Warwick Castle, described as Britain's finest example of a medieval fortress and one of its finest stately homes
Stratford-upon-Avon: Shakespeare's birthplace, largely unaltered from its original state, followed by Anne Hathaway's house
Lunch stop at a local pub (meal not included)
Inclusion: private vehicle and driver, 9-hour duration

tours.tour: Full Day Warwick and Stratford with Private Guide
tours.summaryIntro: Same Warwick Castle and Stratford-upon-Avon day, enhanced with a private guide and included tickets.
summaryBullets: Warwick Castle, Britain's finest example of a medieval fortress and stately home
Shakespeare's birthplace in Stratford-upon-Avon and Anne Hathaway's house
Inclusions: private vehicle, driver, and guide, plus tickets; 9-hour duration

tours.tour: Half Day At Disposal in Dover
tours.summaryIntro: A half-day flexible Dover touring day with private car and driver, letting clients choose castles, countryside, or shopping in a shorter window.
summaryBullets: 4-hour tour can include one of: Historic Steam Train (Tenterden to Bodiam Castle), Canterbury Cathedral, Leeds Castle, Walmer Castle and Sandwich, or Medieval Rye Heritage Model

Pont du Gard: 2,000-year-old Roman and medieval architecture, a UNESCO World Heritage Site
Les Baux de Provence: medieval village with a historic pedestrian centre

Stops in Gordes, famous for its dry-stone architecture, built at the foot of a castle dating to the XI century and rebuilt in the XVI century

Includes a car and English-speaking driver for 6 hours, with pickup/drop-off at your hotel (departs Avignon)

Stops at the Fontaine de Vaucluse and takes in panoramic views of the Alpilles from Baux-de-Provence and the town of St-Remy-de-Provence
Tour ends at the majestic Pont du Gard, a UNESCO World Heritage Site
Includes a car and English-speaking driver for 8 hours, with pickup/drop-off at your hotel (departs Avignon)

tours.tour: Nicoise Cooking Class and City Tour of Nice
tours.summaryIntro: This 2.5-hour Nicoise cooking workshop and city stroll in Nice pairs hands-on culinary tradition with a walk through one of the city's most iconic markets.
summaryBullets: Meet the chef at Cours Saleya, Nice's famous flower market, then stroll the market aisles together before heading to the kitchen.
Prepare traditional Nicoise specialties such as socca, stuffed vegetables, and pissaladiere, using fresh ingredients delivered that same morning.
Menu varies by season based on the freshest available products; an optional tasting of the finished dishes is offered afterward.
Runs 9:30 AM–12:00 PM; pickup/drop-off at the client's location or hotel.

tours.tour: Private Meeting the Cetaceans Coastal Outing by Sedan for 3 Hours
tours.duration: 3:00 hours; From 9 AM to 5 PM( transport time from and to clients hotel / location to Saint-Jeannet)
tours.summaryIntro: This 3-hour private sailing outing from Saint-Jean-Cap-Ferrat lets clients observe Mediterranean cetaceans in the wild while supporting a respected marine conservation nonprofit.
summaryBullets: Sail aboard a boat organized by SOS Grand Bleu, a public-interest nonprofit that has led marine protection and education efforts for over 34 years.
Opportunity to observe dolphins, fin whales, and sperm whales in their natural habitat.
Inclusions: private guided navigation along the coastline, with historical stops like the Trophy of Augustus in La Turbie and traces of Bonaparte, Nelson, and Cousteau's underwater house.
Possible additional sightings include loggerhead turtles, ocean sunfish, and seabirds; scheduled for 9 AM–12 PM or 2 PM–5 PM.

tours.duration: 3:00 hours; From 9 AM to 5 PM( transport time from and to clients hotel / location to Saint-Jeannet)

tours.tour: Private Meeting the Cetaceans Coastal Outing by Sedan for- 8 Hours
tours.duration: 8:00 hours; From 9 AM to 5 PM( transport time from and to clients hotel / location to Saint-Jeannet)
tours.summaryIntro: This full-day (8-hour) sea excursion from Saint-Jean-Cap-Ferrat sails aboard a striking traditional replica vessel, blending maritime history with wildlife observation.
summaryBullets: Sail aboard the Santo-Sospir, a 23-meter traditional sailboat inspired by 16th-century Turkish caiques and Barbary chebecs.
Route passes through the Pelagos Sanctuary, combining maritime heritage discovery with an introduction to ancient navigation techniques.
Inclusions: private guided navigation along the coastline, with historical stops like the Trophy of Augustus in La Turbie and traces of Bonaparte, Nelson, and Cousteau's underwater house.
Possible sightings include dolphins, loggerhead turtles, ocean sunfish, and seabirds.

summaryBullets: Exclusive access to the modern art gallery, the Chateau's elegant interiors, the panoramic tower, gardens, and wine cellar.
Experience concludes with a guided tasting of six wines on a shaded terrace.

tours.tour: Private VIP Perfume Creation Workshop at Galimard in Eze by Sedan
tours.duration: 2 hours (+ transport time from and to clients hotel / location if outside of Eze)
tours.summaryIntro: This 2-hour private VIP perfume workshop at Galimard in Eze, with Sedan transport, lets clients craft their own signature scent under expert one-on-one guidance.
summaryBullets: A perfumer's assistant is entirely dedicated to you, guiding you through top, heart, and base notes at a perfumer's organ of 126 essences.
Compose a bespoke feminine, masculine, or unisex fragrance; the formula is registered in a confidential database for future reorders.
Inclusions: personalized 100ml Eau de Parfum spray bottle, a hot or cold beverage plus a glass of Champagne, and an Apprentice Perfumer certificate.
Also available in Grasse upon request, with an adjustment to transport time.

Departs at 9:30am with pickup from the client's location or hotel

summaryBullets: Cruises from Nice or Monaco (also available from Menton or Villefranche) toward the islands of Cannes to anchor in turquoise water
VIP Pack includes the boat, skipper, fuel, soft drinks, a bottle of rosé, ice cubes, towels, masks and snorkels
Yacht holds up to 9 guests, is 12 meters long with 2 cabins and 1 toilet, and reaches 23 knots with 1 captain
Duration 4 hours, including transport time to/from the client's hotel or location

tours.duration: 1:30 hours ( transport time from and to clients hotel / location to Saint-Jeannet)
tours.summaryIntro: A visit to an authentic, family-run biodynamic vineyard in Saint-Jeannet near Nice, pairing organic wine tasting with local products — a good pick for clients wanting an easy, authentic Riviera wine experience.
summaryBullets: Located at Chateau de Cremat, about a 20-minute drive from central Nice, amid vines, olive trees and Mediterranean views
Includes a tasting of three organic estate wines (rose, white, red) labeled IGP Alpes-Maritimes, made with a traditional sun-aged method
Wines are served alongside local specialty products, plus a visit to the cellar/winemaking area and the biodynamic vines
Duration 1.5 hours including transport time to Saint-Jeannet; pickup at the client's hotel or location

tours.tour: 12 hours guided Tour Caen and Bayeux by MPV
tours.duration: 12 hours (but with some flexibility based on clients preferences)
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day private guided tour from Paris through Normandy's Caen and Bayeux, tracing medieval Norman history and the story behind the Bayeux Tapestry.
summaryBullets: Visits Caen's Ducal Castle fortifications and the tomb of William the Conqueror
Continues to Bayeux, the first French city liberated in WWII, with its 11th-century cathedral and the world-famous Bayeux Tapestry
Inclusions: car, driver and guide (or licensed chauffeur-guide for larger groups), tolls/parking, entrance tickets, water, umbrellas, rain ponchos, WiFi and local madeleines from a producer near Caen
Duration 12 hours (flexible), departing 8-9am from the client's Paris hotel

tours.tour: 12 hours guided Tour D-Day UK and Canadian sector by MPV
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day private guided tour of the British and Canadian D-Day landing sectors from Paris, tracing the Allied advance inland from the coast.
summaryBullets: Focuses on the operation to secure the bridges over the Orne River, including the iconic Pegasus Bridge
Includes visits to memorials and museums dedicated to British and Canadian D-Day contributions
Inclusions: car, driver, tolls/parking, English-speaking private guide, and entrance tickets
Duration 12 hours, departing 8-9am from the client's Paris hotel

tours.tour: 12 hours guided Tour D-Day US sector Utah and Omaha by MPV
tours.duration: 12 hours (but with some flexibility based on clients preferences)
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day private guided tour of the American D-Day sectors from Paris, covering the Normandy American Cemetery, Sainte-Mere-Eglise, Omaha Beach and Utah Beach.
summaryBullets: Visits the American Cemetery at Colleville-sur-Mer, resting place of thousands of fallen soldiers
Stops in Sainte-Mere-Eglise, the first town liberated on June 6, 1944, famed for the paratrooper suspended from the church steeple
Walks Omaha Beach and concludes at Utah Beach, tracing the Allied advance inland

Inclusions: car, driver and guide (or licensed chauffeur-guide for larger groups), tolls/parking, entrance tickets, water, umbrellas, rain ponchos, WiFi and local madeleines from a producer near Caen; 12 hours, departing 8-9am from the client's Paris hotel

tours.tour: 12 hours guided Tour Mont-Saint Michel by MPV
tours.duration: 12 hours (but with some flexibility based on clients preferences)
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day private guided excursion from Paris to Mont-Saint-Michel, exploring the medieval abbey and village rising from its tidal bay.
summaryBullets: Explores the medieval streets and climbs to the abbey overlooking the village, with the guide sharing the site's history and legends
A guided walk across the bay is offered for a unique view of Mont-Saint-Michel's natural setting
Inclusions: car, driver and guide (or licensed chauffeur-guide for larger groups), tolls/parking, entrance tickets, water, umbrellas, rain ponchos, WiFi and local madeleines from a producer near Caen
Duration 12 hours (flexible), departing 8-9am from the client's Paris hotel

tours.tour: 12 hours guided Tour Normandy Gastronomy Tour by MPV
tours.duration: 12 hours (but with some flexibility based on clients preferences)
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day private food-focused tour of Normandy from Paris, sampling the region's signature cider, cheese and calvados-country traditions.
summaryBullets: Depending on season, tastes local specialties such as Normandy cider, Camembert, homemade apple tart, Andouille de Vire, and Pont l'Eveque, plus the traditional Trou Normand
Lunch is included, along with tastings throughout the day and a bottle of local cider
Sites visited vary by season and opening times, confirmed each morning for a smooth itinerary

Inclusions: car, driver and guide (or licensed chauffeur-guide for larger groups), tolls/parking, entrance tickets, water, umbrellas, rain ponchos and WiFi; 12 hours, departing 8-9am from the client's Paris hotel

tours.tour: 12 hours guided Tour Omaha and Arromanches by MPV
tours.duration: 12 hours (but with some flexibility based on clients preferences)
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day private guided tour from Paris focused on the Longues-sur-Mer battery and the fighting at Omaha Beach.
summaryBullets: Visits the Longues-sur-Mer battery, a key Atlantic Wall stronghold, with the guide explaining its strategic role
Continues into the American sector to explain the heavy losses at "Bloody Omaha"
Includes stops at memorials and museums honoring the fallen

Inclusions: car, driver and guide (or licensed chauffeur-guide for larger groups), tolls/parking, entrance tickets, water, umbrellas, rain ponchos, WiFi and local madeleines from a producer near Caen; 12 hours, departing 8-9am from the client's Paris hotel

tours.tour: 12 hours guided Tour Pays dAuge and Honfleur by MPV
tours.duration: 12 hours (but with some flexibility based on clients preferences)
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day private tour from Paris through the Pays d'Auge countryside to Honfleur, the town famed as home to the Impressionist painters.
summaryBullets: Strolls Honfleur's picturesque streets and takes in its distinctive architecture and atmosphere
Itinerary winds through Pays d'Auge villages known for local cheese and cider tastings
Stopping points may vary depending on seasonal openings

Inclusions: car, driver and guide (or licensed chauffeur-guide for larger groups), tolls/parking, entrance tickets, water, umbrellas, rain ponchos, WiFi and local madeleines from a producer near Caen; 12 hours, departing 8-9am from the client's Paris hotel

tours.tour: 12 hours guided Tour The cliffs of Etretat by MPV
tours.duration: 12 hours (but with some flexibility based on clients preferences)
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day private tour from Paris to the dramatic cliffs of Etretat, the former fishing village that became a favorite retreat for painters and writers.
summaryBullets: Includes a leisurely walk along the pebble beach, taking in the coastal scenery and timeless atmosphere
For more adventurous clients, a hillside path leads to Notre Dame de la Garde or the viewpoint the source material calls the "Pandas Eye," with panoramic views
Inclusions: car, driver and guide (or licensed chauffeur-guide for larger groups), tolls/parking, entrance tickets, water, umbrellas, rain ponchos, WiFi and local madeleines from a producer near Caen
Duration 12 hours (flexible), departing 8-9am from the client's Paris hotel

tours.summaryIntro: A half-day chocolate-themed tour through Paris for clients who want a sweet, story-rich excursion, by luxury sedan.
summaryBullets: Visits the chocolate factory of a Michelin-star chef in an offbeat, trendy part of the city and a shop in the historic Marais district by an award-winning chocolate maker
Crosses the Seine from the left-bank St-Germain-des-Pres area to the chocolatiers of the prestigious right bank

Guide covers the history of chocolate from its origins as a sacred Mayan drink to its popularization in Europe by 17th-century queens at the Louvre and Versailles, plus differences between cocoa tree species
Includes car, driver, and English-speaking guide

tours.tour: Half Day Paris Pastry Tour with Car Driver Private Guide by Luxury Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A half-day pastry-themed tour of Paris for clients with a sweet tooth, by luxury sedan.
summaryBullets: Explores the work of France's great patissiers, from chefs unleashing new dessert trends to the classic creators of baba au rhum, eclairs, and Paris-Brest
Guide covers seasonal ingredients, varieties of vanilla, and the latest craze for marshmallows, meringues, and domed cakes
Route runs from the old marketplace of Paris to the Marais, then across the Seine to St-Germain-des-Pres and Place Vendome
Includes car, driver, and English-speaking guide

tours.tour: Half Day Paris Pastry Tour with Car Driver Private Guide by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A half-day private tour through Paris's most celebrated pastry neighborhoods, tracing the history and craft of classic French desserts.
summaryBullets: Explores the old Paris marketplace, the Marais, St-Germain-des-Prés, and Place Vendôme, visiting elegant pastry boutiques along the way.
Guide covers French pastry classics like baba au rhum, éclairs, and the Paris-Brest, plus seasonal ingredients and current trends (vanilla varieties, marshmallows, meringues, domed cakes).
Runs 4 hours, departing 9:00 am or 2:00 pm, with pickup/drop-off at the client's Paris hotel.
Includes private car, driver, and English-speaking guide.

tours.tour: Half Day Tour in Cote de Beaune by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A half-day private wine excursion through Burgundy's Cote de Beaune, one of the world's top regions for Chardonnay and Pinot Noir.
summaryBullets: Visits the villages of Meursault, Puligny-Montrachet, Pommard, and Aloxe-Corton.
Includes two private wine tastings showcasing the diversity of local terroirs; a Beaune village visit with tasting is available upon request.
Runs 4 hours including transport, departing 9:00 am or 2:00 pm (adjustable on request), with pickup at the client's hotel in Dijon, Beaune, or nearby.
Includes vehicle, English-speaking chauffeur-guide, and the two guided tastings (Sedan vehicle).

tours.tour: Half Day Tour in Cote de Nuits by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A half-day private wine excursion into Burgundy's Cote de Nuits, home to the region's finest Pinot Noir.
summaryBullets: Visits iconic villages including Vosne-Romanée, Gevrey-Chambertin, and Nuits-Saint-Georges.
Includes two tastings at renowned wineries, with wine commentary and historical anecdotes from the guide along the way.
Runs 4 hours including transport, departing 9:00 am or 2:00 pm (adjustable on request), with pickup at the client's hotel in Dijon, Beaune, or nearby.
Includes vehicle and English-speaking chauffeur-guide (Sedan vehicle).

tours.tour: Half Day World War II Tour with Car Driver Private Guide by Luxury Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A half-day guided tour of Paris tracing the sites and stories of the WWII Occupation, Resistance, and Liberation.
summaryBullets: Starts near the Hotel Lutetia, once a German Army HQ and later a refugee center for concentration camp survivors, and covers where resistance fighters lived.
Visits the Monument to the Student Resisters in the Luxembourg Gardens and the site of the August 1944 uprising near Place St. Michel and Notre Dame.
Continues to the Hotel Meurice (HQ of General Von Choltitz, who spared Paris from destruction) and the Jeu de Paume Museum, where Nazi-looted art was once stored.
Runs 4 hours, departing 9:00 am or 2:00 pm, with hotel pickup in Paris; includes car, driver, and English-speaking guide (tickets not included; Luxury Sedan).
