Lunch is at Chablis Wine Not, a bistro run by a local entrepreneur and two Japanese chefs.
Runs 12 hours, departing 7:15 am, with pickup at the client's hotel in Paris.
Includes private chauffeured vehicle, expert chauffeur, private guide, entrance fees, tasting, and gastronomic lunch, all included in the tour rate (V Class).

tours.tour: Notre Dame and Sainte Chapelle Private Tour by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A private tour of two of Paris's Gothic masterpieces, Notre Dame Cathedral and Sainte Chapelle, ideal for history and architecture lovers.
summaryBullets: Guide covers the newly restored Notre Dame Cathedral's original construction and details of its recent restoration.
Skip-the-line visit to Sainte Chapelle, known for its soaring architecture and vivid stained-glass windows.
Also takes in the Ile de la Cité, the historic heart of Paris where both monuments stand.

Runs 3 hours, departing 8:00 am, 8:30 am, or 2:30 pm (adjustable on request), with hotel pickup in Paris; includes English-speaking guide, chauffeur with vehicle, and ticket included in the total price (Sedan).

tours.tour: Orsay Museum - VIP Private Tour by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A VIP private tour of the Musee d'Orsay with early access before the museum opens to the public.
summaryBullets: Skip-the-line VIP entry lets guests view masterpieces by Monet, Van Gogh, and others in crowd-free surroundings.
Guide traces the museum's arc from Academic paintings to revolutionary Impressionist works, set in the former railway station building.

Runs 3 hours, departing 9:30 am or 2:30 pm (adjustable on request), with hotel pickup in Paris; includes English-speaking guide, chauffeur with vehicle, and ticket included in the total price (Sedan).

tours.tour: Orsay Museum Private Tour by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A private guided tour of the Musee d'Orsay, set in a former railway station, covering the museum's Impressionist highlights.
summaryBullets: Skip-the-line access to see works by Monet, Degas, Renoir, and Van Gogh, with the guide tracing the shift from Academic tradition to Impressionism.
Runs 3 hours, departing 9:30 am or 2:30 pm (adjustable on request), with hotel pickup in Paris.
Includes English-speaking guide, chauffeur with vehicle, and ticket included in the total price (Sedan).

tours.tour: Palace of Versailles Tour with Private Viewing of the Royal Quarters with Guide by Luxury Sedan with 1 Ticket to Versailles
tours.summaryIntro: An exclusive private tour of Versailles with a rare private viewing of the palace's Royal Quarters, for 1 ticket by Luxury Sedan.
summaryBullets: Guide leads guests through two of the State Apartments' 17 rooms — the King's Chamber and the Council Study — plus the Hall of Mirrors, lined with 357 mirrors.

Visits the Royal Quarters of Louis XV and Louis XVI, including Louis XVI's library, the dining room used for royal dinners, the clock room with its planetary crystal-globe clock, and the "corner room" with its famed cylinder desk.
Runs 6 hours; departure and Royal Quarters visit time are confirmed by the Chabe Limousines team based on availability, with hotel pickup in Paris.
Includes car, driver, tickets, and guide.

tours.summaryIntro: An exclusive private tour of Versailles with a rare private viewing of the palace's Royal Quarters, for 1 ticket by Sedan.
summaryBullets: Guide leads guests through two of the State Apartments' 17 rooms — the King's Chamber and the Council Study — plus the Hall of Mirrors, lined with 357 mirrors.

Visits the Royal Quarters of Louis XV and Louis XVI, including Louis XVI's library, the dining room used for royal dinners, the clock room with its planetary crystal-globe clock, and the "corner room" with its famed cylinder desk.
Runs 6 hours; departure and Royal Quarters visit time are confirmed by the Chabe Limousines team based on availability, with hotel pickup in Paris.
Includes car, driver, tickets, and guide.

tours.summaryIntro: An exclusive private tour of Versailles with a rare private viewing of the palace's Royal Quarters, for 2 tickets by Sedan.

tours.tour: Paris Chocolate Tour by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A private chocolate-tasting walk through the historic, artistic Saint-Germain-des-Prés neighborhood, ending with a curated tasting.
summaryBullets: Visits some of Paris's finest chocolate boutiques, with the guide explaining the neighborhood's cultural significance and the journey from cacao bean to confection.
Tasting includes exquisite French chocolates, macarons, and pastries — suitable for adults and children alike.
Runs 3 hours, departing 10:00 am or 3:00 pm (adjustable on request), with hotel pickup in Paris.
Includes English-speaking guide, chauffeur with vehicle, and 5 different kinds of chocolate tastings (Sedan).

tours.tour: Paris Macarons and Pastry Tour by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A private walking tour through the Marais sampling some of Paris's most celebrated pastry specialties.
summaryBullets: Tastes a curated selection of desserts — macarons, chocolates, sablés, and caramels — while exploring the neighborhood's culinary history.
Visits the Marché des Enfants Rouges, Paris's oldest food market, with stories of legendary pastry chefs Poilâne, Jean-Paul Hévin, Jacques Genin, and Pierre Hermé.
Runs 2 hours, departing 10:00 am, 11:00 am, or 3:00 pm (adjustable on request), with hotel pickup in Paris.
Includes English-speaking guide, chauffeur and vehicle, and 6 different pastry specialties (Sedan).

tours.tour: Private Wine and Cheese Tasting Tour by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: An intimate private wine-and-cheese tasting experience in Le Marais, pairing artisanal French cheese with organic wine in a medieval cellar.
summaryBullets: Begins with a stop at an acclaimed cheesemonger's boutique and a bakery for a fresh baguette.
Tasting takes place in an authentic medieval cellar, pairing organic French wines with cheeses from various regions, with the guide explaining the concept of terroir.
Runs 3 hours, departing 10:30 am (except Sundays) or 2:00 pm (adjustable on request), with hotel pickup in Paris.
Includes English-speaking guide and ticket included in the total price (Sedan).

tours.tour: The Louvre Private Tour by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A private, skip-the-line guided tour of the Louvre, the former royal residence now home to over 6,000 years of art.
summaryBullets: Tour begins at the equestrian statue of Louis XIV in front of the Louvre Pyramid.
Guide covers icons like the Mona Lisa and Venus de Milo as well as hidden gems and overlooked treasures most visitors miss.
Runs 3 hours, departing 9:30 am, 10:00 am, or 2:00 pm (6:00 pm Wednesdays and Fridays only), adjustable on request, with hotel pickup in Paris.
Includes English-speaking guide, chauffeur with vehicle, and ticket included in the total price (Sedan).

tours.tour: The Rebirth of Notre-Dame de Paris with Private Guide by Sedan
tours.duration: 3 hours with the guide (due to a queue to the Chatedral the duration may be longer); 4 hours vehicle
tours.summaryIntro: A private guided tour centered on Notre-Dame de Paris's history and its remarkable post-fire reconstruction.
summaryBullets: Covers the cathedral's history and its 2019 fire, plus its restoration: 340,000 donors, 250 companies, and nearly 2,000 craftsmen (carpenters, stonemasons, blacksmiths, foundry workers) involved.
Runs 3 hours with the guide (may run longer due to cathedral queues), 4 hours for the vehicle; departs 9:00 am or 2:00 pm, with hotel pickup in Paris.
Includes car, driver, entrance ticket to Notre Dame, English-speaking guide, and parking fees (Sedan).

tours.tour: Versailles Full Day Tour by Sedan
tours.duration: 8 hours tour including an hour transfer from Paris to Versailles and 1 hour back
tours.summaryIntro: A private full-day tour to the Palace of Versailles, tracing its transformation from royal hunting lodge to the grandeur of Louis XIV's court.
summaryBullets: Skip-the-line access to the palace, the Hall of Mirrors, the Queen's private estates, and the gardens.
Guide shares stories of the Sun King, Marie-Antoinette, and other notable residents, and time is included to explore beyond the highlights, including the Petit Trianon and Marie-Antoinette's hamlet.
Runs 8 hours including a 1-hour transfer each way, departing 8:00 am, 9:00 am, or 11:00 am (adjustable on request), with hotel pickup in Paris.
Includes English-speaking guide, chauffeur with vehicle, and ticket included in the total price; lunch is paid on-site by clients (Sedan).

tours.tour: Versailles Full Day Tour with Royal Apartment by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A private full-day Versailles tour with exclusive access to the royal family's private apartments, in addition to the palace's main highlights.
summaryBullets: Skip-the-line access includes exclusive entry to hidden rooms and intimate salons of the royal apartments, alongside the Hall of Mirrors, the Queen's private estates, and the gardens.
Guide shares stories of the Sun King, Marie-Antoinette, and other notable residents, with time to explore the Petit Trianon and Marie-Antoinette's hamlet.
Runs 8 hours, departing 8:00 am, 9:00 am, or 11:00 am (adjustable on request), with hotel pickup in Paris.
Includes English-speaking guide, chauffeur with vehicle, and ticket included in the total price; lunch is paid on-site by clients (Sedan).

tours.tour: Welcome to Paris Walking Tour
tours.summaryIntro: A relaxed orientation walk that helps first-time visitors settle into Paris right from their hotel doorstep.
summaryBullets: Local guide meets clients at their hotel and walks the immediate neighborhood, pointing out the nearest boulangerie and useful metro stops.
Guide shares practical tips on getting around and finding Parisian treasures visitors often miss.
Runs 3 hours, with departure time based on the client's arrival, and pickup/drop-off at the client's Paris hotel; includes English-speaking guide.

tours.tour: Entrance fee Sanssouci and Cecilienhof
tours.summaryIntro: This line item covers the pre-booked entrance fee for Sanssouci Palace and Cecilienhof, required since admission times are fixed and tickets are in high demand.
summaryBullets: Sanssouci Palace and Cecilienhof visits are bound to fixed admission times, so tickets must be booked well in advance
This charge is per person and is pre-booked and invoiced separately by Classic Vacations
Excludes lunch and parking fees

tours.tour: Entrance fee to Sanssouci
tours.summaryIntro: This line item covers the pre-booked entrance fee for Sanssouci Palace, with fixed seasonal opening hours travelers should plan around.
summaryBullets: Entrance fees for Sanssouci Palace and Cecilienhof are per person and pre-booked/invoiced separately, as tickets are highly requested
Winter season (Jan 1–Mar 31 / Nov 1–Dec 31): open Tuesday–Sunday, 10:00am–4:30pm
Summer season (Apr 1–Oct 31): open Tuesday–Sunday, 10:00am–5:30pm
Not available December 24–25, with reduced hours on December 31

tours.tour: Full Day Tour to Potsdam and Sanssouci and Cecilienhof with Driver Guide by Minivan
tours.summaryIntro: This full-day minivan tour with driver-guide travels from Berlin to Potsdam, exploring the palaces and history of this former royal residence.
summaryBullets: Potsdam was the residence of the Prussian kings and German Kaiser until 1918, about an hour's drive from Berlin-Mitte
Visits the parks and palaces of Sanssouci, the largest World Heritage Site in Germany
Cecilienhof Palace hosted the Potsdam Conference, the major post-WWII conference among the Allies
Includes car, driver-guide, fuel, and insurance over 8 hours; lunch, entrance fees, and parking fees are not included, and palaces are closed Mondays

tours.tour: Jewish Heritage Walking Tour
tours.summaryIntro: Berlin's Jewish Heritage Walking Tour traces over two centuries of Jewish life in the city, making it a meaningful way for clients to connect with Berlin's cultural and historical depth.
summaryBullets: 3-hour guided walking tour, daily, starting at 10:00am or 2:00pm, meeting at the Hilton Berlin main entrance on Mohrenstrasse 30
Guide covers prominent Jewish philosophers, scientists, entrepreneurs, and artists, plus surviving buildings and traces from before and after the Shoah
Visits poignant memorials and highlights active Jewish institutions in Berlin today
No entrance fees are included; any inside-visit fees are paid on-site by the client directly

summaryBullets: 3-hour tour by minivan, recommended 10:00am start, with pickup/drop-off at the client's hotel
Passes the Kurfurstendamm boulevard and Kaiser Wilhelm Memorial Church, the Tiergarten, Brandenburg Gate, Unter den Linden, Gendarmenmarkt, Museum Island, and Charlottenburg Palace
Includes car, driver guide, fuel, and insurance; entrance and parking fees are excluded
A surcharge of 31 EUR per hour applies on select holiday dates (e.g. Jan 1, May 1, Dec 24-26 and 31)

tours.summaryIntro: The Berlin Classics walking tour is a deep dive into the German capital's must-see landmarks and layered history, led by an expert guide on foot.
summaryBullets: 3-hour walking tour starting at the Brandenburg Gate's Southern Gatehouse (tourist info point)
Covers Unter den Linden boulevard, Berlin Cathedral, the World Heritage Site Museum Island, Gendarmenmarkt, the Reichstag, and Tiergarten Park
Also takes in 20th-century history sites: the Memorial to the Murdered Jews of Europe, the site of Hitler's bunker, Topography of Terror, former Checkpoint Charlie, and original Berlin Wall remnants

tours.tour: Private 3 Hours Berlin Sneak Preview Architecture Walking Tour
tours.summaryIntro: A private 3-hour "sneak preview" walking tour focused on Berlin's striking architectural contrasts, perfect for design-minded clients wanting an off-the-beaten-path perspective.
summaryBullets: 3-hour walking tour starting at 10:00am, meeting inside Hauptbahnhof (Main Station) at the "Washington Platz" entrance, center of the glass wall entrance
Guide selects buildings of exceptional quality clients might not discover on their own
Concludes with a grand vista from the Kollhoff Tower viewing platform

tours.tour: Private 3 Hours Shopping Tour of Berlin - Walking Tour
tours.summaryIntro: A private 3-hour shopping walking tour through Berlin-Mitte's Hackescher Markt quarter, blending historic charm with a curated retail and culinary experience.
summaryBullets: 3-hour tour starting at 10:30am, meeting in front of the Hackescher Hof Restaurant at Rosenthaler Strasse 40
Private guide leads clients to boutiques offering big-label couture and local designer clothing
Also explores art nouveau tiles, costume jewelry, local chocolate makers, and regional food specialties

tours.tour: Private 4 Hour Berlin Tour with Licensed Guide and Driver by Minivan
tours.summaryIntro: A private 4-hour Berlin orientation tour by minivan with both a driver and a licensed Berlin guide, giving clients extra local expertise beyond a standard driving tour.
summaryBullets: 4-hour tour, recommended 10:00am start, with pickup/drop-off at the client's hotel
Passes the Kurfurstendamm boulevard and Kaiser Wilhelm Memorial Church, the Tiergarten, Brandenburg Gate, Unter den Linden, Gendarmenmarkt, Museum Island, and Charlottenburg Palace
Includes car, driver, fuel, insurance, plus a licensed Berlin guide; entrance and parking fees are excluded

tours.tour: Private Berlin Food Sampling Walking Tour - Charlottenburg (WEST BERLIN)
tours.summaryIntro: A private food-sampling walking tour through Berlin's fashionable Charlottenburg district (the "New West"), finishing with a browse of the historic KaDeWe department store's famed food floor.
summaryBullets: Max 3-hour tour (max 6 participants), daily except Sundays/holidays, starting at 11:00am or 2:30pm
Starts in front of the Hard Rock Cafe on Kurfurstendamm 224 and finishes at the KaDeWe department store
Guide offers current options to try German cake, chocolate, coffee, sausages, and other snacks along the way
Food/drink samples are not included in the tour rate; guests pay on-site for what they choose to try

tours.tour: Private Berlin Food Sampling Walking Tour - Mitte (EAST BERLIN)
tours.summaryIntro: A private food-sampling walking tour through Berlin-Mitte, pairing old Berlin flavor with modern culinary discoveries in the city's cosmopolitan eastern center.
summaryBullets: Max 3-hour tour (max 6 participants), daily except Sundays/holidays, starting at 11:00am or 2:30pm
Starts and finishes in front of the Hackescher Hof restaurant at Rosenthaler Strasse 1
Guide offers current options to try locally made chocolate, coffee specialties, German sausages, and beer
Food/drink samples are not included in the tour rate; guests pay on-site for what they choose to try

tours.tour: Private WWII History Walking Tour
tours.summaryIntro: The Private WWII History Walking Tour traces Berlin's role as the seat of Nazi leadership, offering clients a serious, well-documented look at this chapter of the city's past.
summaryBullets: 3-hour tour, daily, starting at 10:00am at the Brandenburg Gate's Southern Gatehouse (tourist info point)
Sees the Reichstag, the Soviet War Memorial, and the Bendlerblock, plus the former office sites of Goering, Goebbels, Himmler, Heydrich, and Hitler, including the site of his bunker
Finishes at the Memorial to the Murdered Jews of Europe
No entrance fees are included; any inside-visit fees are paid on-site by the client directly

tours.tour: Private 3 Hour Frankfurt City tour with Guide and Driver by Minivan
tours.summaryIntro: A private 3-hour Frankfurt city tour by minivan with an English-speaking guide, contrasting the city's modern skyline (its "Manhattan" nickname) with its historic old town.
summaryBullets: Max 3-hour tour, recommended 10:00am start, pickup at the hotel lobby, by minivan (1-5 persons)
Passes St. Paul's Church, Emperor's Cathedral, and Romer City Hall in the old town, plus Frankfurt's modern skyline along the river Main
Includes English-speaking guide, vehicle, driver, and fuel; entrance fees, parking, and tip are excluded
Flexible stops - clients choose whether to get out for photos/info or simply drive past each sight

tours.tour: Private 3 Hour Walking Tour of Frankfurt
tours.summaryIntro: A private 3-hour walking tour of Frankfurt exploring its history as a coronation city for kings and emperors and home to renowned figures like Goethe.
summaryBullets: 3-hour walking tour, daily, recommended 10:00am or 2:00pm start
Meeting point at the client's hotel lobby (if centrally located) or the Tourist Information at Romer (Romerberg 27)
Passes the Romer Town Hall, St. Paul's Church, the Goethe House, and Frankfurt's historic center
Frankfurt was already mentioned by the Romans in the year 794

tours.tour: Admission Castle Courtyard
tours.summaryIntro: Admission to the Heidelberg Castle Courtyard, a straightforward add-on for clients wanting guaranteed entry to one of the city's signature sights.
summaryBullets: Tickets are limited and must be prebooked online in advance by the agency
No cancellation is possible once booked
Admission is charged per person and invoiced separately - it is not included in tour rates

tours.tour: Private Hamburg City Tour with Harbour Cruise - Driving Guide - Minivan
tours.summaryIntro: A private Hamburg city tour by minivan paired with a public harbour cruise, giving clients both a street-level and water-level view of the Hanseatic city.
summaryBullets: 4-hour tour, daily, recommended 9:00am start, with pickup at the client's hotel lobby (if centrally located)
Covers the Town Hall, Jungfernstieg promenade, Inner and Outer Alster Lakes, St. Michael's Church, the Reeperbahn, HafenCity, and the historic harbor warehouse district
A public harbour cruise is included in the tour, offering a water-level view of the city's Hanseatic and contemporary architecture
Any additional tickets for inside visits are paid by the client directly

summaryBullets: 4-hour tour, daily, recommended 9:00am start, with pickup at the client's hotel lobby (if centrally located)
Covers the Town Hall, Jungfernstieg promenade, Inner and Outer Alster Lakes, St. Michael's Church, the Reeperbahn, HafenCity, and the historic harbor warehouse district

tours.tour: Private Hamburg Culinary Tour
tours.summaryIntro: A private culinary walking tour through Hamburg's characterful Karoviertel district, once known as the "poor man's quarter" and now a creative, trendsetting neighborhood.
summaryBullets: 3-hour tour, daily, recommended 10:00am or 2:00pm start, meeting at the S-Bahn station Sternschanze
Expert guide shares the district's history, culture, and distinctive architecture while walking through it
Tastings of a handpicked selection of local snacks are included in the tour

tours.tour: Private Hamburg Walking Tour
tours.summaryIntro: A private walking tour through historic Hamburg tracing the city's rise as a Hanseatic League center and its rebuilding after the Great Fire and World War II.
summaryBullets: 3-hour tour, daily, recommended 10:00am or 2:00pm start, meeting at the client's hotel lobby (if centrally located)
Passes Little Venice at the inner Alster Canal, the Town Hall, the Elbphilharmonie, and the Kontorhauses (office district)

tours.tour: Private Nightwatchman Tour Rothenburg
tours.summaryIntro: An evening Night Watchman tour of Rothenburg, following the town's traditional watchman character through dark medieval alleys for an atmospheric storytelling experience.
summaryBullets: 1-hour tour, daily, recommended 7:00pm start
Meeting point at the client's hotel lobby (only possible if the hotel is located in the old town)
Watchman shares stories of medieval life while leading guests through dark alleyways and dimly lit squares
Old town pedestrian areas are cobblestone; comfortable shoes required and guests should be fairly good walkers

tours.tour: Private Old Town Walking Tour Heidelberg
tours.summaryIntro: A private old town walking tour of Heidelberg giving clients a first impression of the city's history, architecture, and culture.
summaryBullets: 1.5-hour tour, daily, recommended 10:00am or 2:00pm start
Meeting point at the Tourist Information at Neckarmunzplatz (Ob. Neckarstrasse 31-33) or the client's hotel if centrally located
Guide covers the Old Town Hall, the Church of the Holy Spirit, and Heidelberg's main pedestrian street

tours.tour: Private Walking Tour Rothenburg
tours.summaryIntro: A private walking tour through Rothenburg's historic old town, covering the town's most important and beautiful historic buildings across its various eras.
summaryBullets: 1.5-hour tour, daily
Meeting point at the client's hotel lobby (only possible if the hotel is located in the old town)

tours.tour: Private Walking Tour and Castle Heidelberg
tours.summaryIntro: A combined old town and castle walking tour of Heidelberg, pairing the city's historic streets with a funicular ride up to its landmark castle.
summaryBullets: 3-hour tour, daily, meeting at the client's hotel lobby (only possible if the hotel is located in the old town)
Old town portion passes the winding alleys, Germany's oldest university, the Church of the Holy Spirit, and the Jewish Quarter
Continues via funicular railway to Heidelberg Castle, touring the inner courtyard, castle garden, electoral residence ruins, and the famous giant wine barrel
Admission to the castle courtyard (14 EUR per person) is not included in the tour rate

Free time afterward at Obersalzberg to visit the Documentation Center, explore Berchtesgaden, or take a boat tour on Konigssee lake
Includes English-speaking driver guide, vehicle, and fuel; entrance fees, parking, and tip are not included

summaryBullets: 10-hour full-day tour, daily, hotel lobby pickup/drop-off, by Mercedes E-class sedan (1-2 persons)

Highlights include the view from Marienbrucke, a guided tour inside Neuschwanstein Castle (carried out by castle staff, approx. 30 minutes), and time to stroll Linderhof's terrace garden, fountain, and pond
Includes English-speaking driver guide, vehicle, and fuel; entrance fees, parking, and tip are not included
The walk up to Neuschwanstein takes about 30 minutes, with optional horse carriage or shuttle bus alternatives (not reservable, paid directly by clients)

tours.tour: Full Day Private Castle Tour Neuschwanstein and Linderhof with Driver guide by Mercedes S or similar

Includes English-speaking driver guide, vehicle, and fuel; entrance fees, parking, and tip are not included

tours.summaryIntro: A full-day private drive along the Romantic Road by minivan, combining Harburg Castle with a walking tour of Rothenburg ob der Tauber, Europe's most perfectly preserved medieval town.

Guests choose whether to stop for photos and information or simply drive past each sight

tours.tour: Private Munich Christmas Walking Tour
tours.summaryIntro: A festive private walking tour through Munich's Christmas markets, a seasonal highlight for clients visiting in November or December.
summaryBullets: 4-hour tour, available only during the Christmas season (Nov-Dec), starting at 4:00pm
Meeting at the client's hotel lobby (if centrally located) or at the Fish Fountain on Marienplatz Square
Visits several of Munich's most popular markets, including the historic Christkindlmarkt, with stalls of seasonal treats and handcrafted gifts
Includes an English-speaking guide and 1 mulled wine and gingerbread cookie per person

tours.tour: Private Munich Walking Tour
tours.summaryIntro: An easy-paced private walking tour through the heart of Munich, covering the city's most popular and recommended sights along with lesser-known stories.
summaryBullets: 2-hour tour, daily, recommended 10:00am or 2:00pm start
Meeting point at the hotel lobby for Hotel Bayerischer Hof guests, or at the Fish Fountain on Marienplatz Square for guests at The Charles Hotel or Munich Marriott Hotel City West
Covers Munich Cathedral, the City Hall with its Glockenspiel, Marienplatz, the Residenz Palace and Opera House, the Hofbrauhaus and food market, and St. Jakob Platz with its Synagogue and City Museum

tours.tour: Private Third Reich Walking Tour
tours.summaryIntro: A private walking tour tracing Munich's role in the rise of Adolf Hitler and the Nazi Party, giving clients a serious historical perspective on the city.
summaryBullets: 3-4 hour tour, daily, recommended 10:00am or 2:00pm start
Meeting point at the hotel lobby for Hotel Bayerischer Hof guests, or at the Fish Fountain on Marienplatz Square for guests at The Charles Hotel or Munich Marriott Hotel City West
Guests walk at least 3 km (approx. 2 miles); a public transportation group ticket (17 EUR) is recommended if adding more historical building visits

tours.tour: Private Walking Tour for Foodies
tours.summaryIntro: A private "foodie" walking tour of Munich combining a shopping trip for Bavarian Brotzeit staples with a relaxed beer garden (or tavern) tasting session.
summaryBullets: 3-3.5 hour tour, available May 1 - October 1, Monday through Saturday only, starting at 10:00am
Meeting point at the Fish Fountain on Marienplatz Square
Includes an English-speaking guide and tastings of sausages, cheese, pretzel and bread (or a Bavarian cold specialty plate in bad weather), plus 1 beer or soft drink (0.5L)
In case of rain, the tour finishes in a traditional Bavarian tavern instead of a beer garden; vegetarian alternatives available if requested at booking

tours.tour: Beer Sample
tours.summaryIntro: A private tour of Nuremberg's rock-cut cellars, uncovering centuries of hidden history beneath the city's streets, centered on its brewing tradition.
summaryBullets: 75-minute tour, recommended 2:00pm start, meeting at the Hausbrauerei Altstadthof brewery shop, Bergstrasse 19, Nuremberg
Explores "Subterranean Nuremberg," the maze-like cellar system historically used to ripen and store the city's famous red beer, still partly used today by the craft brewery
Includes 1 glass of beer (0.2L) per person
Cellar temperatures run 8-12 degrees Celsius year-round and floors can be rough, so warm clothing and sturdy shoes are recommended

tours.tour: Entrance fee to Memorium Nuremberg Trials
tours.summaryIntro: A private half-day tour of Nuremberg confronting the city's deep ties to National Socialism, from the Nazi Party Rally Grounds to the site of the Nuremberg trials.
summaryBullets: Max 4-hour tour, available Monday and Wednesday-Sunday, recommended 10:00am start with hotel lobby pickup
Visits the former Nazi Party Rally Grounds, including the Zeppelin Feld and the unfinished Congress Hall, plus the Nuremberg Palace of Justice, site of the Nuremberg trials
A visit to Courtroom 600 and the Memorium Nuremberg Trials can be included (admission 12 EUR per person, not included in the tour rate and subject to availability)
Includes English-speaking driver guide, vehicle, and fuel; parking fees and tip are not included

tours.tour: Private City Sausage Walking tour Nuremberg
tours.summaryIntro: A private walking tour celebrating Nuremberg's famous bratwurst, tracing the sausage's history through the city's old town.
summaryBullets: 1.5-hour tour, daily, recommended 10:00am or 2:00pm start
Meeting point at Tourist Information Nuremberg (Hauptmarkt 18) or the client's hotel (if located in the old town)
Learn why the sausages are served small as "Drei im Weggla" (three sausages in a bun); tour finishes with a sausage tasting on a fork
Old town pedestrian areas are cobblestone; comfortable shoes required and guests should be fairly good walkers

summaryBullets: Passes the Anglican and Russian churches, the Kallimarmaron Olympic Stadium, the Royal Palace, the Temple of Zeus, and Hadrian's Arch
Visits the Acropolis and Acropolis Museum (entrance fees not included)
Also sees the Ancient Agora, Constitution Square, the House of Parliament, the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier, and the University
Runs 7 hours with private car and driver included; a guide can be added for an extra cost, booked separately

Includes private guide and entrance fees; runs 7 hours with a coffee or lunch break built in

summaryBullets: Drives via Thebes and Levadia (about 3 hours each way) to Delphi in central Greece
Visits the Archaeological Museum and the Springs of Castalia, tied to myths of eternal youth and poetic inspiration

8-hour tour with car and driver included; guide available at extra cost, booked separately

Visits the Lion Gate, Cyclopean Walls, and Royal Tombs at Mycenae, dating to the second millennium BC
Stops in Nauplia, the first capital of independent Greece, before visiting Epidaurus and its acoustically renowned Ancient Theatre
8-hour tour with car and driver included (driving time approx. 2 hours); guide available at extra cost, booked separately

tours.tour: One Way Private Transfer from ATH - HD Unguided Athens Tour and coffee stop to Sofitel Airport Hotel by Mercedes Sedan
tours.duration: 3 hours tour + 45 minutes transfer time from airport to sites and additional 45 minutes from sites to Airport Hotel. Total about 4 hours and 30 minutes
tours.summaryIntro: An unguided one-way transfer from Athens airport with a self-guided highlights drive-by en route to the Sofitel Airport Hotel, via private Mercedes sedan (provided by Hellenic Transfer Club).
summaryBullets: Includes a private car and driver, plus a coffee stop (no guide)
Passes the Kallimarmaron Olympic Stadium, Royal Palace, Temple of Zeus, and Hadrian's Arch, and visits the Acropolis hill (Parthenon)
Also sees Constitution Square, the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier, the Old University of Athens, and the National Library
Runs about 4 hours 30 minutes total, dropping off at the Sofitel Airport Hotel next to Athens Airport; Acropolis hill entrance fees are excluded, though the coffee stop is included

tours.tour: One Way Private Transfer from Piraeus Port pick up - HD Guided Athens Tour and coffee stop to Athens Hotel by Private Mercedes
tours.duration: 3 hours tour + 45 minutes transfer time from Piraeus Port pick up to sites. Total about 3 hours and 45 minutes.
tours.summaryIntro: A guided one-way transfer from the Piraeus Port pier with a highlights tour en route to the client's Athens hotel, via private Mercedes sedan (provided by Hellenic Transfer Club).
summaryBullets: Includes a private car, driver, and professional English-speaking guide, plus a coffee stop
Passes the Kallimarmaron Olympic Stadium, Royal Palace, Temple of Zeus, and Hadrian's Arch, and visits the Acropolis hill (Parthenon)
Also sees Constitution Square, the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier, the Old University of Athens, and the National Library
Runs about 3 hours 45 minutes total (3-hour tour plus 45-minute transfer from the Piraeus pier); entrance fees to the Acropolis hill and coffee are included

tours.tour: One Way Private Transfer from Piraeus Port pick up - HD Guided Athens Tour and coffee stop to Piraeus Port by Private Mercedes
tours.duration: 3 hours tour + transfer time from Piraeus Port pick up to sites and from sites to Piraeus port. Total duration about 4 hours and 15 minutes
tours.summaryIntro: A guided one-way transfer from the Piraeus Port pier with a highlights tour, returning to Piraeus Port at the end, via private Mercedes sedan (provided by Hellenic Transfer Club).
summaryBullets: Includes a private car, driver, and professional English-speaking guide, plus a coffee stop
Passes the Kallimarmaron Olympic Stadium, Royal Palace, Temple of Zeus, and Hadrian's Arch, and visits the Acropolis hill (Parthenon)
Also sees Constitution Square, the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier, the Old University of Athens, and the National Library
Runs about 4 hours 15 minutes total (3-hour tour, 45-minute transfer to the sites, plus 30 minutes onward to Piraeus Port); entrance fees to the Acropolis hill and coffee are included

tours.tour: One Way Private Transfer from Piraeus Port pick up - HD Guided Athens Tour and coffee stop to Sofitel Airport Hotel by Private Mercedes
tours.duration: 3 hours tour + 45 minutes transfer time from Piraeus Port pick up to sites and additional 45 minutes from sites to Airport Hotel. Total about 4 hours and 30 minutes
tours.summaryIntro: A guided one-way transfer from the Piraeus Port pier with a highlights tour en route to the Sofitel Airport Hotel, via private Mercedes sedan (provided by Hellenic Transfer Club).
summaryBullets: Includes a private car, driver, and professional English-speaking guide, plus a coffee stop
Passes the Kallimarmaron Olympic Stadium, Royal Palace, Temple of Zeus, and Hadrian's Arch, and visits the Acropolis hill (Parthenon)
Also sees Constitution Square, the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier, the Old University of Athens, and the National Library
Runs about 4 hours 30 minutes total (3-hour tour, 45-minute transfer from the pier, plus 45 minutes onward to the hotel); entrance fees to the Acropolis hill and coffee are included

tours.tour: One Way Private Transfer from Piraeus Port pick up - HD Unguided Athens Tour and coffee stop to Athens Hotel by Private Mercedes
tours.duration: 3 hours tour + 45 minutes transfer time from Piraeus Port pick up to sites. Total about 3 hours and 45 minutes.
tours.summaryIntro: An unguided one-way transfer from the Piraeus Port pier with a self-guided highlights drive-by en route to the client's Athens hotel, via private Mercedes sedan (provided by Hellenic Transfer Club).
summaryBullets: Includes a private car and driver, plus a coffee stop (no guide)
Passes the Kallimarmaron Olympic Stadium, Royal Palace, Temple of Zeus, and Hadrian's Arch, and visits the Acropolis hill (Parthenon)
Also sees Constitution Square, the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier, the Old University of Athens, and the National Library
Runs about 3 hours 45 minutes total; Acropolis hill entrance fees are excluded (the other sites have no entrance fees), though the coffee stop is included

tours.tour: One Way Private Transfer from Piraeus Port pick up - HD Unguided Athens Tour and coffee stop to Sofitel Airport Hotel by Private Mercedes
tours.duration: 3 hours tour + 45 minutes transfer time from Piraeus Port pick up to sites and additional 45 minutes from sites to Airport Hotel. Total about 4 hours and 30 minutes
tours.summaryIntro: A one-way private transfer by Mercedes from Piraeus Port that combines a scenic Athens sightseeing loop with a coffee stop before continuing on to Sofitel Airport Hotel.
summaryBullets: Passes the ancient Olympic Stadium "Kallimarmaron," the Royal Palace, the Temple of Zeus, and Hadrian's Arch, then the Acropolis hill/Parthenon.
Also passes Constitution Square, the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier, the old University of Athens, and the National Library.
Total journey is about 4 hours 30 minutes: 3-hour tour with coffee stop, plus 45 minutes to the sites and 45 minutes on to the Airport Hotel.
Includes private car and driver plus coffee; Acropolis entrance fee is excluded (other sites have none).

tours.tour: Private 3000 Years of History Around the Acropolis Rock - Walking Tour
tours.summaryIntro: A private 4-hour walking tour that traces 3,000 years of Athens history along an alternative path around the Acropolis Rock, led by a licensed guide.
summaryBullets: Walks the Pedestrian Road through Plaka to the Hill of the Muses and the Acropolis Rock.
Follows paths designed by architect Dimitrios Pikionis, passes the site known as "Socrates' Prison," and hikes to the hilltop among pine trees.
Guests are picked up and dropped off at their property by luxury car, mini van, or mini bus depending on group size.
Includes a licensed English-speaking guide, Acropolis entrance fees, and a luxurious vehicle with driver; lunch and tips are excluded.

tours.tour: Private A Visit in the Ancient Agora - A Taste of the Modern Agora - Walking Tour
tours.summaryIntro: A private walking tour through Monastiraki Square to the Ancient Agora of Athens, paired with tastings that bring the city's culinary history to life.
summaryBullets: Explores Monastiraki Square and the Ancient Agora of Athens, historically the political, commercial, and religious heart of the ancient city.
Includes a stop at Varvakios Agora with an expert guide to learn the city's culinary history, plus a Tsipouro tasting with Greek delicacies.
Runs daily except Sunday, with a licensed English-speaking guide and entrance fees included.
Lunch, tips, and gratuities are excluded; advance notice is needed for dietary restrictions and the tour isn't recommended for children age 0-5.

tours.tour: Private A Visit of the Acropolis - Dance as all the Greeks do - Wine Tasting
tours.summaryIntro: A private Acropolis tour with skip-the-line access, followed by a Greek dance lesson and wine tasting for a memorable cultural afternoon.
summaryBullets: Explores the Acropolis on foot to see the Parthenon and other highlights, with entrance tickets pre-purchased for a skip-the-line experience.
Includes a Greek dance lesson with an English-speaking dance instructor.
Wine tasting with Greek delicacies is included, along with transport by luxury air-conditioned car or mini van.
Lunch, tips, and gratuities are excluded.

tours.tour: Private Acropolis and New Acropolis Museum
tours.summaryIntro: A private, self-paced visit to the Acropolis and the New Acropolis Museum with a licensed guide, ideal for clients who want depth without a rigid schedule.
summaryBullets: Visits the Acropolis monuments including the Parthenon, the Erechtheion, the Propylaia, and the Temple of Nike, plus the Odeon of Herodes Atticus (still in use today).
At the New Acropolis Museum, guests can view excavations beneath the glass floors and learn about the marble artifacts on display.
Runs daily, about 4 hours or more, with pick-up and drop-off at the client's property.
Includes a licensed English-speaking guide and entrance fees to both the Acropolis and the Acropolis Museum; lunch and tips are excluded.

tours.tour: Private Ancient Agora - Athens Central Market and Food Tour - Walking Tour
tours.summaryIntro: A private walking tour combining the Ancient Agora of Athens with a hands-on taste of the city's modern food culture.
summaryBullets: Visits the Ancient Agora of Athens, the green space between Monastiraki and the Acropolis that was the heart of ancient civic life.
Tastes koulouria (sesame bread rings), drinks Tsipouro with delicacies, and tries traditionally brewed Greek coffee.
Includes a stop at Varvakios Agora with an expert guide to learn the city's culinary history.
Runs daily except Sunday with a licensed English-speaking guide and entrance fees included; lunch, tips, and gratuities are excluded.

tours.tour: Private Ancient Athens Tour
tours.summaryIntro: A private half-day Ancient Athens tour combining Greece's largest museum with two of the city's most iconic landmarks.
summaryBullets: Visits the National Archaeological Museum, the largest museum in Greece, home to more than 20,000 exhibits spanning Prehistory to Late Antiquity.
Drives through Syntagma/Constitution Square and visits the Panathenaic Stadium, the marble stadium that hosted the first modern Olympic Games.
Finishes with a discovery of the Acropolis.
Includes pick-up/drop-off and entrance fees to both the Acropolis and the National Archaeological Museum; lunch and tips are excluded.

tours.tour: Private Bites of History and Gastronomy - Walking Tour
tours.summaryIntro: A private walking tour through Athens' political history in Syntagma Square, paired with tastes of real local street food.
summaryBullets: Visits Syntagma/Constitution Square, the Greek Parliament (the Old Palace for Greek royalty until 1922), and the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier.
Shares the story of the Grande Bretagne Hotel and visits Palia Vouli (Old Parliament) at Kolokotroni Square, with its statue of revolutionary leader Theodoros Kolokotronis.

Along the way, guests taste koulouria, Greek coffee, a Tsipouro or Ouzo at a traditional taverna, and a real souvlaki, plus a stop at Varvakios Agora (a smaller similar market is visited on Sundays when Varvakios is closed).
Includes an English-speaking guide; entrance fees, lunch, and tips are excluded.

tours.tour: Private Discover Ancient and Neoclassical Athens - Walking Tour
tours.duration: Approximately 8 hours (Full-Day Tour; including 2 hours for lunch and rest)
tours.summaryIntro: A private full-day walking tour pairing the Acropolis with the New Acropolis Museum, including a break for lunch and rest.
summaryBullets: Explores the Acropolis and Acropolis Museum, discovering artifacts, sculptures, and architectural elements from the site, including the Parthenon.
Walks along the elegant Dionysiou Areopagitou Street for some of the city's best architecture views.
Runs about 8 hours daily, including 2 hours for lunch and rest, with pick-up/drop-off at the client's property.
Includes a certified English-speaking guide and entrance fees to the Acropolis and Acropolis Museum; lunch itself is excluded, along with tips.

tours.tour: Private Enjoy Greek Cocktails in a Sunset tour in Plaka - Walking Tour
tours.summaryIntro: A relaxed 2-hour private sunset walking tour through Plaka, ending with Greek cocktails and Acropolis views.
summaryBullets: Strolls through the picturesque Plaka neighborhood during golden hour.
Includes handcrafted Greek cocktails at a rooftop bar or traditional cafe while watching the sunset over the Acropolis.
Tour starts at 7:00pm (May-Sep) or 5:00pm (Oct-Apr) and wraps up by 9:00pm.
Includes a licensed professional English-speaking guide; entrance fees, lunch, and tips are excluded.

tours.tour: Private Following the Footsteps of Artists Around the Acropolis Rock - Sunset tour in Plaka - Walking Tour
tours.summaryIntro: A private 2-hour sunset walking tour through Plaka that follows in the footsteps of the artists who have long called the neighborhood home.
summaryBullets: Walks the old alleys of Plaka, passing the Lysicrates Monument, Tripodon Street, old taverns, and well-known residences.
Continues along the Rizokastro wall and up the stairs into the Anafiotika neighborhood.
Starts at 7:00pm (May-Sep) or 5:00pm (Oct-Apr).
Includes a licensed professional English-speaking guide; dinner and tips are excluded.

tours.tour: Private Food Tour - Walking Tour
tours.summaryIntro: A private 4-hour food walking tour that lets clients taste more than 4,000 years of Greek culinary tradition away from the tourist traps.
summaryBullets: Visits the local market to taste olive oil and sample traditional Greek delicacies paired with local wines.
Tastings include authentic Greek cheese pie, koulouria (sesame bread rings), a real souvlaki, and traditional Greek desserts.
Also includes a Tsipouro at a well-known taverna, plus coffee/tea and alcoholic beverages.
Includes an English-speaking guide, snacks, bottled water, and the tastings listed above; lunch and tips are excluded.

tours.tour: Private Skip - the line - Ancient Athens (Including Acropolis) and Food Tour
tours.summaryIntro: A private skip-the-line Ancient Athens tour that pairs the Acropolis with a taste of the city's food culture.
summaryBullets: Visits the Acropolis with pre-purchased, skip-the-ticket-line entrance access (some security-check wait time, typically 0-30 minutes, may still apply).
Includes a stop at Varvakios Agora with an expert guide to learn the city's culinary history, plus a Tsipouro tasting with Greek delicacies at a local taverna.
Runs about 4 hours daily; on Sundays a smaller, similar market is visited since Varvakios is closed.
Includes a licensed English-speaking guide and Acropolis entrance fees; lunch, tips, and personal expenses are excluded.

tours.tour: Private Skip the line - Ancient Athens (Including New Acropolis Museum) and Food Tour
tours.summaryIntro: A private skip-the-line tour pairing the Panathenaic Stadium with the New Acropolis Museum and a taste of local food culture.
summaryBullets: First stop is the Panathenaic Stadium, the marble stadium where the modern Olympic Games began.
Visits the New Acropolis Museum, which spans 25,000 square meters with over 14,000 square meters of exhibition space, ten times the size of the old museum.
Includes a stop at Varvakios Agora with an expert guide, plus a Tsipouro tasting with Greek delicacies at a local taverna.
Includes a licensed English-speaking guide and Acropolis Museum entrance fees; lunch, tips, and personal expenses are excluded.

tours.tour: Private Sunset Escape on a Yacht around the Athens Riviera - Boat Tour
tours.summaryIntro: A private sunset yacht escape along the Athens Riviera and Saronic Gulf, ideal for couples or small groups wanting a relaxed afternoon on the water.
summaryBullets: Cruises the Saronic Gulf along the Athens Riviera as the sun sets.
Includes a traditional light lunch and Greek snacks, plus wine or champagne on board as part of the private sunset cruise.
Guests must provide full names and passport numbers in advance per Coast Guard regulations; booking is non-refundable within 5 days of the date, and cancellations within 14 days incur a 30% charge.
Includes pick-up/drop-off, luxury car transfer, and the private sunset cruise (fuel, alcoholic beverages, soda, and snacks); dinner and tips are excluded.

tours.tour: Private Visit of Acropolis and Wine Tasting in Symposium
tours.summaryIntro: A private half-day tour combining an Acropolis visit with an ancient-style wine tasting experience at "Symposium," a Greek wine cellar.
summaryBullets: Tours the Acropolis and sees the Parthenon and other highlights with a licensed guide.
At Symposium, guests drink authentic Greek wine from a Kylix (the ancient Greek wine-drinking cup) and taste ancient Greek snacks while learning old vinification techniques.
Tour wraps up around 1:00pm.
Includes pick-up/drop-off, a certified English-speaking guide, Acropolis entrance fees, and the wine tasting with Greek delicacies; lunch and tips are excluded.

tours.tour: Special Concierge Service
Chania Heritage and Gastronomy Tour Explore the Past Savor the Present
tours.summaryIntro: A 4-hour heritage and food tour of Chania pairing an archaeological museum visit with a taste of Cretan cuisine.
summaryBullets: Visits the Archaeological Museum of Chania to see artifacts from the Minoan, Roman, and Byzantine periods.
Continues with a food tour sampling fresh Cretan cheeses, olives, savory pies, and sweets.
Includes tasting Cretan raki (tsikoudia), a traditional distilled spirit.
Runs daily except Tuesday; includes hotel pick-up/drop-off, a professional English-speaking guide, all entrance fees, and taxes — personal expenses, gratuities, and lunch are excluded.

tours.tour: Exclusive Private Cruise from Falassarna to Balos and Gramvous
tours.summaryIntro: An exclusive private cruise from Falassarna to two of Crete's most iconic destinations, Balos Lagoon and Gramvousa Island.
summaryBullets: Sails to Balos, known for its powdery white sand and turquoise waters, for swimming and relaxing on the beach.
Continues to Gramvousa Island, home to a Venetian fortress that can be reached by a hike offering panoramic sea views.
Runs daily, about 5 hours, departing from Falassarna Port.
Includes hotel pick-up/drop-off, Cretan snacks, wine, water, sodas, skipper and gas, and liability insurance; lunch and personal expenses are excluded.

tours.tour: Guide tour to Rethymnon and free time
tours.summaryIntro: A 7-hour guided tour to the Venetian town of Rethymnon with free time built in for shopping and relaxing.
summaryBullets: Drives along the coastal road to Rethymnon, known for its Renaissance architecture, the Venetian fortress Fortezza, and its old harbour.
Includes a short city tour of the old town's monuments and buildings, plus free time for shopping.
Guests can relax at a seaside café in the old town.
Includes car, driver, an English-speaking official guide, and Cretan cuisine lunch.

tours.tour: Knossos-Wine Tasting-Heraklion
tours.summaryIntro: An 8-hour tour combining the legendary Palace of Knossos with a village wine tasting and a walk through Heraklion.
summaryBullets: Explores the Palace of Knossos, the largest Minoan palace, tied to the legend of the Minotaur and frescoes dating back to 1900 B.C.
Continues to a village in the wine district (Scalani or Melesses) for a wine tasting.
Finishes with a walking tour of Heraklion's pedestrian streets and market, where guests can shop for olive oil, wine, raki, and herbs.
Includes car, driver, an English-speaking official guide, Knossos Palace entry tickets, and the wine tasting.

tours.tour: Private Authentic Crete Nature Villages and Family Taverna Lunch
tours.summaryIntro: A private full-day journey into Crete's countryside, pairing nature and farm life with a family taverna lunch.
summaryBullets: Drives through the Orange Valley, known for its citrus groves, and the lake district for a scenic stroll and photos.
Visits an organic avocado farm, a rare local crop grown in Chania's fertile soil, to learn about cultivation methods.
Runs daily, about 8 hours, in a private luxury Mercedes-Benz GL SUV with a tour-escort/guide.
Includes all entrance fees, sampling of local products, and a specially designed Cretan meal with wine and raki; personal expenses and gratuities are excluded.

tours.tour: Private Culinary Delights at Dourakis Winery A Cretan Cooking Experience
tours.summaryIntro: A private culinary experience at Dourakis Winery pairing a guided tour with a hands-on Cretan cooking class.
summaryBullets: Includes a guided tour of the winery to learn about Cretan winemaking.
A hands-on cooking class led by expert chefs teaches three authentic Cretan dishes using fresh, local ingredients.
Finishes with a signature wine tasting and a lunch of the dishes prepared, paired with Dourakis wines.
Runs daily, about 6 hours, including pick-up/drop-off, the cooking class, wine tasting, guided winery tour, and lunch; personal expenses and gratuities are excluded.

tours.tour: Private Fire Earth and Olive Oil Cretan Cooking in Nature
tours.summaryIntro: A private, hands-on Cretan cooking class set on a family organic farm near Chania.
summaryBullets: Ingredients are sourced from the family's own organic avocado farm or trusted local farmers.
The cooking class covers Tzatziki, Dakos, Cretan Salad, Gemista or Dolmadakia, Boureki, and Glyka Kalitsounakia (sweet pastries).
Includes a full Cretan lunch of the dishes prepared (2 starters, 1 salad, 2 mains, 1 dessert) with local wine and raki, plus any leftovers packed to take home.
Includes a private round-trip transfer in a luxury Mercedes-Benz GL SUV, cooking equipment, ingredients, and a farm tour; personal expenses and gratuities are excluded.

tours.tour: Private Flavors of Crete Olive Oil Wine and Craft Beer Private Experience
tours.summaryIntro: A private premium tasting journey through Crete's finest olive oil, wine, and craft beer producers.
summaryBullets: Visits an award-winning olive oil estate for a guided tasting of extra virgin olive oil paired with fresh bread and local delicacies.
Continues to two boutique wineries to taste indigenous varieties such as Vidiano and Liatiko.
Also includes a private craft beer tasting.
Runs daily, about 7-8 hours, with a private tour-escort/guide; personal expenses and gratuities are excluded.

tours.tour: Private Half Day Sailing Cruise in Chania with Open Bar and Light Snacks
tours.summaryIntro: A private half-day sailing cruise along the Chania coastline with an open bar and light snacks on board.
summaryBullets: Stops at the hidden cove of Menies on the Rodopou Peninsula, once the port of the ancient site of Diktynna.
Continues to Limnionari Beach for a swim, then Choironisia to explore natural sea caves, and finally the secluded Sfako Beach.
Includes an open bar with local wines, beers, soft drinks, and juices, plus light snacks on board.
Runs daily, about 5 hours, on a 2-cabin luxury boat (Axopar 37 or Saxdor 320 GTO); lunch and personal expenses are excluded.

tours.tour: Private Luxury Cruise from Falassarna to Elafonissi and Kedrodassos Beaches
tours.summaryIntro: A private luxury cruise from Falassarna to two of Crete's most unspoiled beaches, Elafonissi and Kedrodassos.
summaryBullets: Visits Elafonissi, renowned for its soft pink sand and turquoise, protected waters.
Continues to Kedrodassos, known for its cedar trees and secluded swimming spots framed by rugged cliffs.
Runs daily, about 7 hours, departing from Falassarna Port.
Includes Cretan snacks, wine, water, sodas, skipper and gas; lunch and personal expenses are excluded.

tours.tour: Private Zorbas Dance Experience Learn to Dance Like a Greek on Stavros Beach
tours.summaryIntro: A private 3-hour experience at Stavros Beach — the real-life filming location of "Zorba the Greek" — pairing a Greek dance lesson with local tastings.
summaryBullets: Visits Stavros Beach, where the film's iconic "Zorba's Dance" finale was shot, with views of the Akrotiri Peninsula.
Includes a guided lesson in sirtaki (Zorba's dance) from a professional dance instructor.
Also includes tasting a variety of Cretan delicacies and Cretan raki (tsikoudia).
Runs daily starting at 5:30pm; personal expenses, gratuities, and lunch are excluded.

tours.tour: Semi Private Cretan Roots An Authentic Agrotourism Experience in Chania
tours.summaryIntro: A semi-private agrotourism experience in Chania that lets guests live the life of a Cretan farmer for the day.
summaryBullets: Hands-on activities include olive picking, goat milking, and vegetable planting/harvesting depending on the season.
Finishes with a farm-to-table cooking experience and tasting of the flavors of the Cretan farm.
Runs daily, about 4 hours, with pick-up at 9:15am or 3:15pm.
Includes all entrance fees and the farm activities listed; personal expenses, gratuities, and lunch are excluded.

tours.tour: Sunset Cocktails and Chaniaâ€™s Venetian Harbor A Sip of History
tours.summaryIntro: A 2-hour sunset cocktail tour along Chania's historic Venetian Harbor.
summaryBullets: Strolls the picturesque waterfront as the guide shares stories of Chania's Venetian, Ottoman, and Greek history.
Includes 2 Cretan cocktails per person made with local spirits, herbs, and fruits.
Runs daily starting at 7:00pm (May-Sep).
Includes a professional English-speaking guide and all entrance fees; dinner, tips, and personal expenses are excluded.

tours.tour: Sunset Sailing Experience with Greek Champagne Sparkling Greek Wine
tours.summaryIntro: A 2.5-hour sunset sailing experience along the Cretan coast featuring Greek sparkling wine on board.
summaryBullets: Sails as the sky transforms with sunset colors over the Cretan coastline.
Includes a glass of Pink Greek Champagne (Pink Sparkling Greek Wine), Cretan snacks, water, and sodas on board.
Sails on a 2-cabin luxury boat (Axopar 37 or Saxdor 320 GTO), max 10 passengers.
Runs daily starting at 7:00pm (May-Sep); dinner, tips, and personal expenses are excluded.

tours.tour: Sunset Serenity Discover Chania Old Town at Dusk
tours.summaryIntro: A relaxed 2-hour sunset walking tour through Chania's Old Town at dusk.
summaryBullets: Strolls the cobblestone streets and Venetian architecture of the Old Town as the guide shares its Greek, Venetian, and Ottoman history.
Visits the Venetian Harbor and the Egyptian Lighthouse, bathed in golden dusk light — ideal for photography.
Runs daily starting at 7:00pm (May-Sep).
Includes a professional English-speaking guide and all entrance fees; dinner, tips, and personal expenses are excluded.

tours.tour: The Ultimate Village Escape Olive Oil and Wine Tasting Adventure
tours.summaryIntro: A 2-hour village tasting adventure through the Chania countryside focused on olive oil and wine.
summaryBullets: Visits family-owned olive groves to learn the harvesting and production process, then tastes a selection of olive oils paired with traditional bread and herbs.
Continues to a wine tasting in the same countryside setting.
Runs daily, with pick-up anytime between 8:00am and 3:00pm.
Includes the olive oil and wine tastings, plus all entrance fees; lunch, tips, and personal expenses are excluded.

tours.tour: Venetian Rethymno and Charming Chania A Tale of Two Cities
tours.summaryIntro: A private 7-hour "Tale of Two Cities" day trip pairing Venetian Rethymno with charming Chania.
summaryBullets: In Rethymno, strolls past well-preserved mansions, ancient fortresses, and the Venetian harbor, with 1 hour of free time.
In Chania, wanders the Old Town's cobblestone alleys, visits the iconic lighthouse, and takes in the bustling harbor, with 1.5 hours of free time.
Runs daily, with pick-up normally at 9am (flexible 8am-12pm).
Includes bottled water and a professional English-speaking guide; lunch, tips, and personal expenses are excluded.

tours.tour: White Mountains of Crete
tours.summaryIntro: A 7-hour off-road safari through the White Mountains of Crete for clients wanting adventure beyond the coast.
summaryBullets: Travels through picturesque valleys, ancient villages, and secluded shepherd huts in a Land Rover Jeep.
Explores the historic village of Therisso before finishing the day in Chania.
Runs daily, departing around 10:00am.
Includes a Land Rover Jeep and English-speaking driver; a lunch stop may be taken but the meal itself is not included.

tours.tour: Enchanting Tour to Spinalonga Island
tours.summaryIntro: A guided boat tour to Spinalonga Island, a fortress island with a haunting history, departing from Heraklion.
summaryBullets: Boards the boat at the fishing village of Plaka in Elounda's Mirabello Bay.
Explores a 16th-century Venetian fortress and the remnants of Greece's former leper colony on Spinalonga.
Includes a private guided tour on the island lasting about 1.5 hours.
Includes hotel pick-up/drop-off, a professional English-speaking guide, boat ticket, and Spinalonga entrance fees; lunch and personal expenses are excluded.

tours.tour: Exclusive Blue Lagoon Boat Experience
tours.summaryIntro: A private boat trip from Gouves to the Blue Lagoon with a personal captain and time to swim at your own pace.
summaryBullets: Explores hidden coves and secluded spots with a private captain, with the freedom to swim, snorkel, or simply relax.
Includes about 1.5 hours of swimming time.
Runs daily, about 5 hours, max 10 passengers.
Includes Cretan snacks, fruits, cheese, wine, water, and sodas served on the Caique; lunch and personal expenses are excluded.

tours.tour: Exclusive Blue Lagoon Boat Experience
tours.summaryIntro: A private boat trip from Agios Nikolaos to the Blue Lagoon with a personal captain and time to swim at your own pace.
summaryBullets: Explores hidden coves and secluded spots with a private captain, with the freedom to swim, snorkel, or simply relax.
Includes about 1.5 hours of swimming time.
Runs daily, about 4 hours, max 10 passengers.
Includes Cretan snacks, fruits, cheese, wine, water, and sodas served on the Caique; lunch and personal expenses are excluded.

tours.tour: Exclusive Blue Lagoon Boat Experience
tours.summaryIntro: A private boat trip from Heraklion to the Blue Lagoon with a personal captain and time to swim at your own pace.
summaryBullets: Explores hidden coves and secluded spots with a private captain, with the freedom to swim, snorkel, or simply relax.
Includes about 1.5 hours of swimming time.
Runs daily, about 6 hours, max 10 passengers.
Includes Cretan snacks, fruits, cheese, wine, water, and sodas served on the Caique; lunch and personal expenses are excluded.

tours.tour: Exclusive Sunset Yacht Cruise from Agios Nikolaos Marina Luxury Motor Yacht or Catamaran with Open Bar
tours.summaryIntro: An exclusive sunset yacht or catamaran cruise from Agios Nikolaos Marina with an open bar, ideal for a romantic evening.
summaryBullets: Cruises the Aegean at sunset aboard a premium motor yacht or catamaran with skipper and hostess.
Includes Greek champagne (sparkling wine) and other beverages from the open bar, plus Cretan snacks, fruits, and cheese.
No swimming on this cruise, but guests may bring swimsuits if they like.
Runs daily, about 5 hours total (4 hours of cruising), with pick-up at 5:00pm; dinner and personal expenses are excluded.

tours.tour: Exclusive Sunset Yacht Cruise from Agios Nikolaos Marina Luxury Motor Yacht or Catamaran with Open Bar
tours.summaryIntro: An exclusive sunset yacht or catamaran cruise from Heraklion with an open bar, ideal for a romantic evening.
summaryBullets: Cruises the Aegean at sunset aboard a premium motor yacht or catamaran with skipper and hostess.
Includes Greek champagne (sparkling wine) and other beverages from the open bar, plus Cretan snacks, fruits, and cheese.
No swimming on this cruise, but guests may bring swimsuits if they like.
Runs daily, about 5 hours total (4 hours of cruising), with pick-up at 4:30pm; dinner and personal expenses are excluded.

Includes a Land Rover Jeep and English-speaking driver; a lunch stop may be taken but the meal itself is not included.

Hands-on cheese-making, milking goats and preparing "Malaka" and "mizithra" cheese.
Cooking lesson with chef Despoina, finishing with a tasting of homemade olive oil, wine, raki, honey, and carob products.
Inclusions: hotel pickup/drop-off by an English-speaking driver; runs Monday, Wednesday, Friday; tips and gratuities are not included.

tours.tour: Private Tour to Archaeological Site of Knossos Total 4 Hours
tours.summaryIntro: A concise, private 4-hour visit to the Palace of Knossos for guests wanting the Minoan highlights without a full-day commitment, departing from the Elounda area.
summaryBullets: Explore the maze of rooms and ancient frescoes at Knossos, the largest Minoan palace, tied to the legend of the Minotaur and the Labyrinth.
Walk through the East Wing's rooms and workshops, reflecting civilization dating back to 1900 B.C.
Inclusions: car, driver, English-speaking official guide, and entry tickets.
Confirmed 4-hour duration, with pickup from your hotel based on request.

tours.tour: Private Traditional Caique Cruise to Spinalonga with Swimming Stop
tours.summaryIntro: A relaxed private cruise aboard a traditional wooden Greek caique to Spinalonga Island, combining a guided island tour with a swimming break.
summaryBullets: Sail aboard an authentic, old-style wooden caique to Spinalonga, taking in coastal views along the way.
Guided tour of Spinalonga Island (about 1.5 hours) followed by roughly 1.5 hours of swimming.
Inclusions: hotel transfers, an English-speaking guide, entrance fees to Spinalonga, and Cretan snacks/wine/water/sodas served on board.
5-hour tour departing from Gouves; lunch, personal expenses, and gratuities are not included.

tours.tour: Private Traditional Caique Cruise to Spinalonga with Swimming Stop
tours.summaryIntro: The same Traditional Caique Cruise to Spinalonga with Swimming Stop, departing from Agios Nikolaos.
summaryBullets: Sail aboard an authentic wooden caique to Spinalonga, with a guided island tour of about 1.5 hours.
About 1.5 hours of swimming time included.
Inclusions: hotel transfers, an English-speaking guide, entrance fees to Spinalonga, and Cretan snacks/wine/water/sodas served on board.
5-hour tour; lunch, personal expenses, and gratuities are not included.

tours.tour: Private Traditional Caique Cruise to Spinalonga with Swimming Stop
tours.summaryIntro: The same Traditional Caique Cruise to Spinalonga with Swimming Stop, departing from Heraklion.
summaryBullets: Sail aboard an authentic wooden caique to Spinalonga, with a guided island tour of about 1.5 hours and 1.5 hours of swimming.
Inclusions: hotel transfers, an English-speaking guide, entrance fees to Spinalonga, and Cretan snacks/wine/water/sodas served on board.
Note for phone agents: guests must provide full names and passport numbers in advance, per Greek Coast Guard rules for the boat trip.
6-hour tour; lunch, personal expenses, and gratuities are not included.

tours.tour: Semi Private Artisan Cheese Making Experience
tours.summaryIntro: A hands-on, semi-private cheese-making session with a local shepherd, ending in a tasting of homemade and other Cretan cheeses with raki.
summaryBullets: Milk and feed the goats, then help make two traditional Cretan cheeses, "Malaka" and "mizithra," under the shepherd's guidance.
While waiting for the mizithra, taste two other well-known Cretan cheeses, "Gruyere" and "Anthotyros."
Finish by tasting the cheese you helped make, paired with homemade meze, raki, and rakomelo.
Inclusions: hotel pickup/drop-off by an English-speaking driver; runs Tuesday, Thursday, Saturday, departing from Gouves; lunch, tips, and gratuities are not included.

tours.tour: Semi Private Artisan Cheese Making Experience
tours.summaryIntro: The same Semi Private Artisan Cheese Making Experience, departing from Agios Nikolaos.
summaryBullets: Milk and feed the goats, then help make two traditional Cretan cheeses, "Malaka" and "mizithra."
Taste two other well-known Cretan cheeses, "Gruyere" and "Anthotyros," while waiting for the mizithra to set.
Finish by tasting the cheese you helped make, paired with homemade meze, raki, and rakomelo.

Inclusions: hotel pickup/drop-off by an English-speaking driver; runs Tuesday, Thursday, Saturday; guests should flag dietary restrictions at least 72 hours in advance; lunch, tips, and gratuities are not included.

tours.tour: Semi Private Cretan Cooking Masterclass
tours.summaryIntro: A semi-private, hands-on Cretan cooking class with a local chef, departing from Gouves, featuring a different day-specific traditional menu each session.
summaryBullets: Cook alongside the chef using fresh, organic garden ingredients, learning local spices, oils, and cooking methods.

Monday's menu is "Grandma's Authentic Recipes" (wild greens and mizithra pies, zucchini balls, tzatziki, dakos, sizzling goat with green beans, kaltsounia); Wednesday is a "Meat Menu" (moussaka, stuffed vine leaves); Friday is "Seafood Delicacies" (fish soup kakavia, marinated anchovies, steamed mussels, shrimp saganaki, baked sea bream).
Inclusions: hotel pickup/drop-off, the cooking lesson, and lunch; not recommended for children ages 0-5.
Tips and gratuities are not included; dietary restrictions should be flagged at least 72 hours in advance.

tours.tour: Semi Private Cretan Cooking Masterclass
tours.summaryIntro: The same Semi Private Cretan Cooking Masterclass, departing from Agios Nikolaos.
summaryBullets: Cook alongside the chef using fresh, organic garden ingredients, following the same day-specific menus (Monday, Wednesday, Friday).

Monday features wild greens and mizithra pies, zucchini balls, and sizzling goat with green beans; Wednesday is a meat-focused menu with moussaka; Friday is a seafood menu with fish soup kakavia and baked sea bream.
Inclusions: hotel pickup/drop-off, the cooking lesson, and lunch; not recommended for children ages 0-5.
Tips and gratuities are not included; dietary restrictions should be flagged at least 72 hours in advance.

tours.tour: Semi Private Cretan Cooking Masterclass
tours.summaryIntro: The same Semi Private Cretan Cooking Masterclass, departing from Malia.
summaryBullets: Cook alongside the chef using fresh, organic garden ingredients, following the same day-specific menus (Monday, Wednesday, Friday).

Tips and gratuities are not included; dietary restrictions should be flagged at least 72 hours in advance.

tours.tour: Semi Private Panorama of Cretan Culture A Unique Package Olive Harvesting Cheese Making and a Cooking Lesson
tours.summaryIntro: The semi-private version of the olive harvesting, cheese making, and cooking lesson farm experience, departing from Gouves.
summaryBullets: Guided farm tour covering olive oil production, harvesting, and quality assessment, plus Cretan herb, wine/raki, and honey production.
Hands-on cheese making — milk the goats and help prepare "Malaka" and "mizithra" cheese.
Cooking lesson with chef Despoina, finishing with a tasting of the farm's homemade olive oil, wine, raki, honey, and carob products.
Inclusions: hotel pickup/drop-off by an English-speaking driver; runs Tuesday, Thursday, Saturday; not recommended for children ages 0-5; tips and gratuities are not included.

tours.tour: Semi Private Panorama of Cretan Culture A Unique Package Olive Harvesting Cheese Making and a Cooking Lesson
tours.summaryIntro: The same Semi Private Panorama of Cretan Culture experience, departing from Agios Nikolaos.
summaryBullets: Guided farm tour covering olive oil production, harvesting, and Cretan herb, wine/raki, and honey production.
Hands-on cheese making, milking goats and preparing "Malaka" and "mizithra" cheese.
Cooking lesson with chef Despoina, finishing with a tasting of homemade olive oil, wine, raki, honey, and carob products.
Inclusions: hotel pickup/drop-off by an English-speaking driver; 4-hour experience, runs Tuesday, Thursday, Saturday; not recommended for children ages 0-5; tips and gratuities are not included.

tours.tour: Semi Private The Olive Oil Journey From Tree to Table
tours.summaryIntro: A hands-on, traditional olive oil pressing experience in an authentic Cretan grove, recreating the ancestral production process from start to finish, departing from Gouves.
summaryBullets: Weigh and place fresh olives on the olive mill, then push the mill around to crush them the old-fashioned way.
Collect the crushed olives into sacks and transfer them to the press, manually pulling and pushing to extract the oil.
Take home a 100ml bottle of the farm's extra virgin handmade olive oil as a souvenir.
Inclusions: hotel pickup/drop-off by an English-speaking driver; runs Monday, Wednesday, Friday; not recommended for children ages 0-5; lunch, tips, and gratuities are not included.

tours.tour: Semi Private The Olive Oil Journey From Tree to Table
tours.summaryIntro: The same Olive Oil Journey From Tree to Table experience, departing from Agios Nikolaos.
summaryBullets: Weigh, mill, and crush fresh olives yourself, then collect them into sacks and transfer to the press to extract the oil by hand.
Take home a 100ml bottle of the farm's extra virgin handmade olive oil as a souvenir.
Inclusions: hotel pickup/drop-off by an English-speaking driver; runs Monday, Wednesday, Friday; guests should flag dietary restrictions at least 72 hours in advance.
Not recommended for children ages 0-5; lunch, tips, and gratuities are not included.

tours.tour: Semi Private The Olive Oil Journey From Tree to Table
tours.summaryIntro: The same Olive Oil Journey From Tree to Table experience, departing from Malia.

tours.tour: Semi Private Wine Tasting A Journey Through Cretan Wines
tours.summaryIntro: A semi-private wine tasting rooted in Crete's roughly 4,000-year winemaking history, pairing six labels with authentic Cretan delicacies, departing from Gouves.
summaryBullets: Learn about Crete's ancient wine heritage, including the 3,500-year-old wine-press found at Vathipetro and the Law Code of Gortyn's early rules on vine-growing.
Tasting of 6 wine labels spanning whites (Vilana, Thrapsathiri, Moschato spinas, Vidiano), reds (Kotsifali, Liatiko, Mandilaria), and a Liatiko rosé.
Paired with Cretan delicacies: olives and sun-dried tomatoes, marinated anchovies, dakos bread, black-eyed pea salad, dolmades, and tzatziki.
Inclusions: hotel pickup/drop-off by an English-speaking driver; runs Monday, Wednesday, Friday; lunch, tips, and gratuities are not included.

tours.tour: Semi Private Wine Tasting A Journey Through Cretan Wines
tours.summaryIntro: The same Wine Tasting: A Journey Through Cretan Wines experience, departing from Agios Nikolaos.
summaryBullets: Learn about Crete's ancient wine heritage, including the 3,500-year-old wine-press found at Vathipetro and the Law Code of Gortyn's rules on vine-growing.
Tasting of 6 wine labels: whites (Vilana, Thrapsathiri, Moschato spinas, Vidiano), reds (Kotsifali, Liatiko, Mandilaria), and a Liatiko rosé, paired with Cretan delicacies.
Delicacies include dakos bread, marinated anchovies, black-eyed pea salad, dolmades, and tzatziki.
Inclusions: hotel pickup/drop-off by an English-speaking driver; runs Monday, Wednesday, Friday; lunch, tips, and gratuities are not included.

tours.tour: Sitia with Monastery Toplou and Palm Beach of Vai
tours.summaryIntro: A scenic day trip along Mirabello Bay to the historic port town of Sitia, the Monastery of Toplou, and the famous palm-forest beach of Vai.
summaryBullets: Visit Sitia, a coastal town shaped by a Venetian-era past, an earthquake, pirate attack, and Turkish invasion, with time to see its preserved old town or archaeological museum.
Tour the Monastery of Toplou, known for its imposing size and bell tower.
Relax at Vai beach, home to the largest forest of endemic Cretan date palms in Crete.
Inclusions: car, driver, English-speaking guide, entrance to Toplou Monastery, and lunch on Vai beach; 8-hour tour departing from the Gouves area, with pickup based on request.

tours.tour: Spinalonga with Agios Nikoalos with Monastery of Kera and village of Kritsa
tours.summaryIntro: A full day combining a boat trip to Spinalonga, sightseeing in Agios Nikolaos, and visits to a historic Byzantine church and one of Crete's most scenic villages.
summaryBullets: Fishing-boat crossing from Plaka to the former Venetian fortress and leper colony of Spinalonga, exploring its 17th-century ruins.
Sightseeing in Agios Nikolaos, including a glimpse of Lake Voulismeni.
Visit the Byzantine church of Panagia Kera, known for its 14th-century frescoes, then the village of Kritsa, perched above Mirabello Bay with panoramic views.

Inclusions: car, driver, English-speaking official guide, entrance to Spinalonga and Kera Monastery, and return boat tickets to Spinalonga; 5-6 hour tour departing from the Gouves area, with pickup based on request.

tours.tour: Spinalonga with Agios Nikoalos with Monastery of Kera and village of Kritsa 1

Sightseeing in Agios Nikolaos, including a glimpse of Lake Voulismeni.
Visit the Byzantine church of Panagia Kera (14th-century frescoes), then the village of Kritsa above Mirabello Bay.
Inclusions: car, driver, English-speaking official guide, entrance to Spinalonga and Kera Monastery, and return boat tickets to Spinalonga; 5-6 hour tour, pickup based on request.

tours.tour: Spinalonga with Agios Nikoalos with Monastery of Kera and village of Kritsa 12
tours.summaryIntro: A half-day excursion combining Crete's evocative former leper-colony island of Spinalonga with the historic hill town of Kritsa, ideal for guests wanting both dramatic history and scenic Cretan villages in one outing.
summaryBullets: Fishing boat crossing from the village of Plaka across Mirabello Bay to the uninhabited island of Spinalonga, a Venetian fortress turned leper colony in 1903
Explore the ruined 17th-century fortress and the original leper-colony buildings before returning to Plaka
Continue to Agios Nikolaos for a view of Lake Voulismeni, then the Byzantine church of Panagia Kera (14th-century frescoes) and the village of Kritsa on the slopes of Kastellos

Includes car, driver, English-speaking official guide, entrance to Spinalonga and Kera Monastery, round-trip boat tickets, and whisper sets; runs 5-6 hours with hotel pickup/drop-off in the Elounda area

tours.tour: Delos Tour - Half Day Private Tour with Guide and transfers in Luxury Mercedes Vito
tours.summaryIntro: A private half-day excursion from Mykonos to the sacred, uninhabited island of Delos, a UNESCO World Heritage archaeological site — ideal for history-minded guests wanting expert context on ancient Greek religious life.
summaryBullets: Private hotel pickup and drive to the edge of Mykonos Town, where an English-speaking guide meets you and walks you to the ferry port for the approximately 30-minute crossing to Delos
Visit the remains of the Temples of Apollo and the sanctuary of Artemis, the old city, the ancient theatre, and walk down the famed Lion Street
See Archaic and Classical artifacts in the Delos museum
Includes private round-trip hotel transfers, shared boat transfers, entrance fees, and a private English-speaking guide; about 5 hours total, with boats departing 10:00am and returning 13:30

tours.tour: Delos Tour - Half Day Shared Tour with Guide and transfers in Luxury Mercedes Vito
tours.summaryIntro: A shared half-day tour to the ancient sacred island of Delos, a UNESCO World Heritage site, offering the same archaeological highlights as the private version at a shared-guide rate.
summaryBullets: Hotel pickup and drive to the edge of Mykonos Town, where the driver provides boat and tour tickets before you meet your guide at the boat departure point
Ferry crossing of about 30 minutes each way to Delos, the sacred island of Apollo and Artemis and a major political/religious center in antiquity
Visit the remains of the Temples of Apollo, the sanctuary of Artemis, and the old city
Includes private round-trip hotel transfers, shared boat transfers, entrance fees, and a shared English-speaking guide; about 5 hours total, with boats departing 10:00am and returning 13:30

tours.tour: Mykonos Island Full Day Tour With Guide Luxury Mercedes Sprinter 9-13
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day private guided tour of Mykonos combining the island's best beaches with its cultural and religious landmarks — a strong pick for guests who want both relaxation and sightseeing in one day.
summaryBullets: Visit the village of Ano Mera and the Monastery of Panagia Tourliani, home to a gold-plated iconostasis carved in Florence in 1767 and a Byzantine bell tower
Stop at some of Mykonos's most famous beaches, with the option to stay for a swim and/or lunch
Free time to explore the narrow alleys and traditional architecture of Mykonos Town (Chora)
Includes private car, driver, and English-speaking guide; runs 8 hours with pickup/drop-off arranged to your schedule
