tours.tour: Mykonos Island Half Day Tour With Guide Luxury Mercedes Vito 1-8
tours.summaryIntro: A shorter, guided tour of Mykonos's beaches and landmarks for guests with limited time who still want an English-speaking guide along.
summaryBullets: Visit Ano Mera village and the Monastery of Panagia Tourliani, with its gold-plated iconostasis made in Florence in 1767 and Byzantine bell tower
Stop at some of Mykonos's most famous beaches, with the option to stay for a swim and/or lunch
Time in Mykonos Town (Chora) to explore its alleys and architecture
Includes private car, driver, and English-speaking guide; runs 4 hours with pickup/drop-off arranged to your schedule

tours.tour: Mykonos Island Half Day Tour Without Guide Luxury Mercedes Sprinter 14-20
tours.summaryIntro: A private driving tour of Mykonos's beaches and landmarks, with car, driver, and an English-speaking guide included.
summaryBullets: Visit Ano Mera village and the Monastery of Panagia Tourliani, with its gold-plated iconostasis made in Florence in 1767 and Byzantine bell tower
Stop at some of Mykonos's most famous beaches, with the option to stay for a swim and/or lunch
Time in Mykonos Town (Chora) to explore its alleys and traditional architecture
Includes private car, driver, and English-speaking guide; runs 8 hours with pickup/drop-off arranged to your schedule

tours.tour: Mykonos Island Half Day Tour Without Guide Luxury Mercedes Sprinter 9-13
tours.summaryIntro: A shorter private driving tour of Mykonos's beaches and landmarks for guests who prefer to explore independently without a guide.
summaryBullets: Visit Ano Mera village and the Monastery of Panagia Tourliani, with its gold-plated iconostasis made in Florence in 1767 and Byzantine bell tower
Stop at some of Mykonos's most famous beaches, with the option to stay for a swim and/or lunch
Time in Mykonos Town (Chora) to explore its alleys and architecture
Includes a private car and English-speaking driver; runs 4 hours with pickup/drop-off arranged to your schedule

tours.tour: Mykonos Island Half Day Tour Without Guide Luxury Mercedes Vito 1-8
tours.summaryIntro: A shorter private driving tour of Mykonos's beaches and landmarks for guests who prefer to explore independently without a guide.
summaryBullets: Visit Ano Mera village and the Monastery of Panagia Tourliani, with its gold-plated iconostasis made in Florence in 1767 and Byzantine bell tower

tours.tour: Private Full Day Catamaran Excursion to South Naxos or the Paros Coastline
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day private catamaran cruise from Naxos exploring either the calm sandy south coast of Naxos or the dramatic rocky coastline of Paros, suited to guests who want a flexible day of swimming and water sports.
summaryBullets: 7-hour sail with multiple stops for swimming, snorkeling, sunbathing, and cliff jumping along crystal-clear coves and secluded beaches
Route chosen between Naxos's calm sandy shores or Paros's dramatic rocky coastline depending on weather and group preference
Includes snorkeling equipment, a skipper and multilingual crew, snacks, local wine and beer, fresh fruit, and bottled water, with lunch included on morning cruises only
Meets at 10:00am; towels, sunscreen, and transfer are not included

tours.tour: Private Full Day Cruise on a Luxury Catamaran Explore the Coastline of Naxos or Paros
tours.summaryIntro: A private catamaran excursion exploring Naxos or Paros's best beaches, giving guests a relaxed mix of swimming, snorkeling, and onboard refreshments.
summaryBullets: Includes 1 to 2 stops at some of the islands' most stunning, serene beaches for swimming in crystal-clear water and snorkeling among marine life, with a chance to spot dolphins and turtles
Snorkeling equipment and a stand-up paddleboard (SUP) are provided onboard
Includes refreshing drinks, local wine, and snacks throughout the day, plus a professional multilingual crew
Runs about 7 hours, meeting at 9:00am; towels, sunscreen, and transfer are not included

tours.tour: Private Full Day Cruise on a Luxury Catamaran Explore the Coastline of Naxos or Paros for Extra Person
tours.summaryIntro: A private catamaran excursion exploring Naxos or Paros's best beaches — this listing reflects the extra-person supplement for the same itinerary.
summaryBullets: Includes 1 to 2 stops at some of the islands' most stunning, serene beaches for swimming in crystal-clear water and snorkeling among marine life, with a chance to spot dolphins and turtles
Snorkeling equipment and a stand-up paddleboard (SUP) are provided onboard
Includes refreshing drinks, local wine, and snacks throughout the day, plus a professional multilingual crew
Runs about 7 hours, meeting at 9:00am; towels, sunscreen, and transfer are not included

tours.tour: Private Full Day Trip with a Sailing Boat Depart from Naxos and Explore South Naxos or the Coastline of Paros
tours.summaryIntro: A private sailing adventure from Naxos exploring the south coast of Naxos or the coastline of Paros, blending scenic sailing with an authentic taste of Greek hospitality.
summaryBullets: Cruise along the south coast of Naxos or toward Paros to reach remote coves, secluded beaches, and clear blue bays only accessible by boat
Multiple stops along the way for swimming and snorkeling
Includes lunch, local wine and beer, fresh fruit, and a multilingual skipper and crew
Runs about 7 hours, meeting at 10:00am; towels, sunscreen, and transfer are not included

tours.tour: Private Full Day Trip with a Sailing Boat Depart from Naxos and Explore South Naxos or the Coastline of Paros for Extra Person
tours.summaryIntro: A private sailing adventure from Naxos exploring the south coast of Naxos or the coastline of Paros — this listing reflects the extra-person supplement for the same itinerary.
summaryBullets: Cruise along the south coast of Naxos or toward Paros to reach remote coves, secluded beaches, and clear blue bays only accessible by boat
Multiple stops along the way for swimming and snorkeling
Includes lunch, local wine and beer, fresh fruit, and a multilingual skipper and crew
Runs about 7 hours, meeting at 10:00am; towels, sunscreen, and transfer are not included

tours.tour: Private Half Day Cruise on a Luxury Sailing Boat Explore the Cycladic Coastline
tours.summaryIntro: A private half-day sailing tour from Naxos to the island's most beautiful, secluded beaches — a good fit for guests who want a shorter taste of the Cyclades' natural beauty.
summaryBullets: Visit one or two stunning, secluded seaside spots with crystal-clear waters for swimming and snorkeling
Area is known for frequent dolphin and turtle sightings
Includes lunch, snacks, cold refreshments and bottled water, local wine and beer, fresh fruit, snorkeling equipment, and a skipper and multilingual crew
Runs about 4 hours, meeting at 9:00am; towels, sunscreen, and transfer are not included

tours.tour: Private Half Day Cruise on a Luxury Sailing Boat Explore the Cycladic Coastline for Extra Person
tours.summaryIntro: A private half-day sailing tour from Naxos to the island's most beautiful, secluded beaches — this listing reflects the extra-person supplement for the same itinerary.
summaryBullets: Visit one or two stunning, secluded seaside spots with crystal-clear waters for swimming and snorkeling
Area is known for frequent dolphin and turtle sightings
Includes lunch, snacks, cold refreshments and bottled water, local wine and beer, fresh fruit, snorkeling equipment, and a skipper and multilingual crew
Runs about 4 hours, meeting at 9:00am; towels, sunscreen, and transfer are not included

tours.tour: Private Half Day Essence of Naxos A Culinary Journey of Olive Oil Cheese and Wine
tours.summaryIntro: A private half-day culinary tour of Naxos for up to 7 guests, pairing a historic olive press with a shepherd's cheesemaking demonstration and a family-owned winery — ideal for food-and-wine-focused travelers.
summaryBullets: Visit a historic olive press dating to 1880 in the village of Kaloxylos for a tasting of premium local olive oils
Visit a local shepherd to learn traditional cheesemaking and sample handcrafted cheeses
Concludes with a guided tour and tasting at a family-owned winery among the vineyards

Includes an English-speaking tour leader, all tastings and food described, and luxury-car transportation around Naxos Town, Aggidia, Stelida, Agios Prokopios, Agia Anna, Plaka, Orkos, Glinado, and Galanado; runs about 4 hours, meeting at 9:30am (hotel transfer excluded)

tours.tour: Private Half Day Naxos E-bike Tour With Farm Visit and Local Tastings
tours.summaryIntro: A half-day e-bike tour through rural Naxos for small groups, combining light exercise with farm visits and food tastings — well suited to active guests aged 12 and up.
summaryBullets: Small-group e-bike ride (up to 6 people, ages 12+) covering 26 km with a gentle roughly 450-meter climb, running from 9:00am to 1:00pm
Begins in the Melanes Valley among old olive groves and visits the ancient Kouros statue, a large marble figure lying in nature
Continues to the Eggares Valley, once called "paradise on Earth" by Greek writer Nikos Kazantzakis, with a stop at a traditional olive press for olive oil tastings

Includes a farm-to-table lunch with PDO Naxian cheese, salad, olives, homemade pie and farmer's wine, snacks, a professional local escort with e-riding headset, insurance, and a first aid kit; gratuities and transfer are excluded

tours.tour: Private Naxos Sunset Catamaran Sailing Experience Peaceful and Relaxing Time
tours.summaryIntro: A private 2-hour sunset catamaran cruise off Naxos, offering a relaxed, romantic way to close out the day on the water.
summaryBullets: Spacious catamaran cruise timed to the sunset, watching golden light play across the Aegean and the Naxos coastline
Fresh finger food paired with wine served onboard
Includes snacks, cold refreshments and bottled water, local wine and beer, and fresh fruit
Runs about 2 hours; transfer is not included

tours.tour: Private Naxos Sunset Catamaran Sailing Experience Peaceful and Relaxing Time for Extra Person
tours.summaryIntro: A private 2-hour sunset catamaran cruise off Naxos — this listing reflects the extra-person supplement for the same itinerary.
summaryBullets: Spacious catamaran cruise timed to the sunset, watching golden light play across the Aegean and the Naxos coastline
Fresh finger food paired with wine served onboard
Includes snacks, cold refreshments and bottled water, local wine and beer, and fresh fruit
Runs about 2 hours; transfer is not included

tours.tour: Private Naxos Sunset Sailing Cruise A Luxurious Aegean Experience
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day private sailing adventure exploring Naxos's coves and bays, combining swimming and water sports with a taste of local Greek culture.
summaryBullets: Full day on the water with swimming, stand-up paddleboarding (SUP), and snorkeling along Naxos's coves and bays
Includes a taste of local delicacies highlighting the region's flavors
Includes snacks, local wine and beer, fresh fruit, and a skipper and multilingual crew
Runs about 7 hours, meeting at 10:00am; towels, sunscreen, and transfer are not included

tours.tour: Private Naxos Sunset Sailing Cruise A Luxurious Aegean Experience for Extra Person
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day private sailing adventure exploring Naxos's coves and bays — this listing reflects the extra-person supplement for the same itinerary.
summaryBullets: Full day on the water with swimming, stand-up paddleboarding (SUP), and snorkeling along Naxos's coves and bays
Includes a taste of local delicacies highlighting the region's flavors
Includes snacks, local wine and beer, fresh fruit, and a skipper and multilingual crew
Runs about 7 hours, meeting at 10:00am; towels, sunscreen, and transfer are not included

tours.tour: Private Premium Wine Tasting and Mythical Tour
tours.summaryIntro: A one-hour private wine tasting inside historic Naxos Castle, pairing premium island wines with storytelling on Greek mythology and local history — a distinctive add-on for culturally curious guests.
summaryBullets: Held in the 250-year-old former monastery kitchen of the Ursulines at Avaton 1739 in Naxos Castle
Guided tasting of six wines from small island producers, paired with Greek island cheeses, charcuterie, citron olive oil, and traditional rusk bread
Includes a private tour of the Avaton 1739 Museum with stories of Dionysus (the god of wine, said to be born on Naxos), the Venetians, and Kazantzakis
Includes a local wine expert host; runs about 1 hour, meeting at noon (transfers excluded)

tours.tour: Private Traditional Trehantiri Boat Tour from Naxos to South Naxos and Koufonisia with BBQ
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day traditional wooden-boat cruise from Naxos with swimming stops and an onboard barbecue — a scenic, laid-back option for groups wanting an authentic Greek boat day.
summaryBullets: Sails aboard a fully renovated 20-meter traditional trehantiri boat (2025 restoration) departing from the harbor of Agia Anna
3 to 4 swimming and relaxation stops, including the Blue Lagoon, Faneromeni beach (with traditional Greek dakos), and Despotiko, where you can view the ancient Temple of Apollo from the sea
Onboard barbecue of grilled pork, chicken, pies, fresh salads, and traditional tzatziki, with vegan options available
Includes coffee, juice and cookies, drinks (Parian wine, beer, and ouzo), fruit, Greek dakos, and snorkeling equipment; runs about 7.5 hours, meeting at 9:30am (transfer excluded)

tours.tour: Private Vineyard Tour in Naxos with Food and Wine Tasting
tours.summaryIntro: A private vineyard visit and tasting in the village of Kato Sangri, showcasing Naxos's biodynamic winemaking tradition alongside a piece of Venetian history.
summaryBullets: Visits an estate 11 km from Naxos Town, set on a 300-meter plateau with a microclimate suited to grape growing, farmed biodynamically with a zero-waste philosophy
Features the Della Rocca-Grazia Tower, a 16th-century Venetian fortress on the estate grounds
Includes a tasting of three premium local wines paired with a plateau of local cheeses and cold cuts
Runs about 1.5 hours, meeting at 12:30pm (transfers excluded)

tours.tour: Private Vineyard Tour in Naxos with Food and Wine Tasting - Extra Persons
tours.summaryIntro: The extra-person add-on for the private Naxos vineyard tour and tasting in Kato Sangri.
summaryBullets: Visits an estate 11 km from Naxos Town, set on a 300-meter plateau with a microclimate suited to grape growing, farmed biodynamically with a zero-waste philosophy
Features the Della Rocca-Grazia Tower, a 16th-century Venetian fortress on the estate grounds
Includes a tasting of three premium local wines paired with a plateau of local cheeses and cold cuts
Runs about 1.5 hours, meeting at 7:00pm (transfers excluded)

tours.tour: Shared Half Day Wood Cooking Class Experience on a Naxian Farm
tours.summaryIntro: A hands-on farm-to-table experience outside Melanes village, pairing a working farm visit with a wood-fire Naxian cooking class — a memorable option for food-loving guests.
summaryBullets: Meet farm animals (chickens, rabbits, peacocks, pigs), collect fresh eggs, and walk through olive groves, potato fields, and orchards to learn about Naxos's produce
Hands-on cooking class preparing traditional Naxian dishes over a wood fire using freshly picked ingredients
Lunch includes Naxian omelet, zucchini balls, fried graviera cheese with filo, tzatziki, Naxian potatoes, a main dish such as briam or gemista, and local cheeses, plus local wine
Includes participation in traditional Naxian dances and homemade fruit preserves; runs about 4 hours, meeting at 10:00am (transfer excluded)

tours.tour: Shared Naxos Island to Glass A Wine and Cheese Tasting from the Aegean
tours.summaryIntro: A 40-minute private wine and cheese tasting above the Naxos Town marina, spotlighting small producers from across the Greek islands.
summaryBullets: Tasting of five wines from small island producers: Kouros Lefkos (Saint Anna Winery, Naxos), ALO (Ktima Kostaki, Samos), Aidani (Hatzidakis Winery, Santorini), Liatiko Rose (Iliana Malihin, Crete), and Orgion (Sclavos Wines, Kefalonia)
Paired with Naxian cheeses including tulumotyri (matured in goatskin), xinotyro, graviera, and anthotyro
Includes a rich selection of Naxian cheeses (Tulumotyri, Xinotyro, Graviera, Anthotyro, and 2-year aged Graviera) and a local wine expert host
Runs about 40 minutes, meeting at noon (transfers excluded)

tours.tour: Shared Naxos Wine and Cheese Tasting Savor Local Flavors and Hear Ancient Tales
tours.summaryIntro: A shared 35-45 minute wine and cheese tasting at The Locals in Naxos, blending local flavors with stories of history and mythology.
summaryBullets: Features five local wines including Tranambelo Odd Blend, Nikolakis Assyrtiko, Ktima Kir Yianni Fokiano, and Saint Anna Winery Kouros (regular and sweet)
Paired with Naxian artisanal cheeses: Xinomyzithra, Graviera, Kefalotyri, Xinotyro, and Anthotyro
Includes storytelling on local history and mythology, with a traditional presentation featuring the sfouni wine vessel and Potiri tou Dikaiou
Includes a local wine expert host; runs about 45 minutes, meeting at noon (transfers excluded)

tours.tour: Antiparos Highlights 4 hours with Guide 1
tours.summaryIntro: A half-day excursion from your hotel to Antiparos, combining a dramatic cave visit with a stroll through the island's whitewashed main town — a solid pick for guests wanting easy sightseeing with a guide.
summaryBullets: Ferry crossing from the port of Pounta to Antiparos (about 10 minutes), then a visit to the Antiparos Cave, reached via roughly 400 steps down to a chamber about 216 meters long lined with stalactites and stalagmites
Walk through Chora, Antiparos's main town, along its market street to the Kastro
Includes round-trip ferry tickets, entrance fees to the Antiparos Cave, transfers, and an English-speaking guide; runs 4 hours, departing at 9:30am or 1:30pm
Note: cave entry is not permitted for guests with heart conditions, breathing problems, special needs, or pregnant women — worth confirming with clients in advance

tours.tour: Antiparos Highlights 6 hours with Guide 2
tours.summaryIntro: A 6-hour guided excursion from your hotel through Antiparos, combining a scenic ferry crossing with a descent into the island's famous cave and a stroll through the old town of Chora.
summaryBullets: Ferry crossing from the port of Pounta to Antiparos Island (about 10 minutes)
Descend 400 steps into Antiparos Cave, a chamber 216m long and 160m deep filled with stalactites, stalagmites, and centuries-old visitor graffiti
Walk through Chora, the main town, along the market street to the Kastro, tied to the island's Venetian history (built in 1440) and past pirate activity
Inclusions: round-trip ferry tickets, cave entrance fees, transfers, and an English-speaking guide

tours.summaryIntro: A 6-hour guided excursion from your hotel through Antiparos, combining a scenic ferry crossing with a descent into the island's famous cave and a stroll through the old town of Chora.
summaryBullets: Ferry crossing from the port of Pounta to Antiparos Island (about 10 minutes)
Descend 400 steps into Antiparos Cave, a chamber 216m long and 160m deep filled with stalactites, stalagmites, and centuries-old visitor graffiti
Walk through Chora, the main town, along the market street to the Kastro, tied to the island's Venetian history (built in 1440) and past pirate activity
Inclusions: round-trip ferry tickets, cave entrance fees, transfers, and an English-speaking guide

tours.tour: Discover Paros 8 hours with Guide 1
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day private guided tour of Paros in an air-conditioned deluxe vehicle, covering the island's capital, medieval castle, historic church, and mountain village of Lefkes.
summaryBullets: Paroikia, the island's capital, and its medieval Castle built between the 8th and 13th centuries AD using ancient marble from 10 different original buildings
The 6th-century church of Panagia Ekatontapyliani and the archaeological museum, showcasing finds from excavations on Paros and Despotiko islands
Lefkes, a hillside village at 300m altitude surrounded by olive and pine trees with views over Naxos Island
Inclusions: entrance fees to the Ekatontapyliani Museum/Baptistery and the archaeological museum, transfers, and an English-speaking guide

tours.summaryIntro: A 4-hour guided introduction to Paros's capital, castle, historic church, and two of its most charming villages.

The 6th-century church of Panagia Ekatontapyliani

Inclusions: transfers and an English-speaking guide

tours.tour: Paros and Antiparos Highlights 8 hours with Guide 1
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day private tour combining the highlights of both Paros and Antiparos in a single excursion.
summaryBullets: Paroikia, a Cycladic village of whitewashed cubic houses and neoclassical mansions, plus its medieval Castle built between the 8th and 13th centuries AD from marble taken from 10 original ancient buildings
The 6th-century church of Panagia Ekatontapyliani
A short ferry crossing (about 10 minutes) from Pounta port to Antiparos, followed by a walk through Chora's market street to the Kastro
Inclusions: round-trip ferry tickets to Antiparos, entrance fees to the Ekatontapyliani Museum and Baptistery, transfers, and an English-speaking guide

tours.tour: Akrotiri Minoan Excavations and Perivolos
tours.summaryIntro: A 4-hour guided tour pairing the ancient Akrotiri excavations with an afternoon at one of Santorini's most striking beaches.
summaryBullets: Walk through the Akrotiri excavations, one of the Aegean's major archaeological sites, and view its Bronze Age fresco murals
Relax at Perivolos Beach, known for its black volcanic sand and turquoise water
Enjoy a seaside meal at a beachfront taverna serving fresh Greek cuisine
Inclusions: car, driver, licensed guide, and entrance fees

tours.tour: Akrotiri Minoan Excavations and Perivolos - Extra Person
tours.summaryIntro: A 4-hour guided tour pairing the ancient Akrotiri excavations with an afternoon at one of Santorini's most striking beaches.

tours.tour: Akrotiri Minoan Excavations and Winery
tours.summaryIntro: A 4-hour tour combining the Bronze Age Akrotiri excavations with a tasting at a local Santorini winery.
summaryBullets: Explore the Akrotiri excavations, a well-preserved Bronze Age settlement with notable fresco murals
Sample local wine varieties and learn how Santorini's volcanic micro-climate shapes them
Inclusions: car, driver, licensed guide, wine tasting, and entrance fee

tours.summaryIntro: A 4-hour tour combining the Bronze Age Akrotiri excavations with a tasting at a local Santorini winery.

tours.tour: All Time Classic Santorini - Shared
tours.summaryIntro: An 8-hour shared tour covering several of Santorini's signature sights, from a multimedia eruption experience to volcanic beaches and a wine-and-lunch stop.
summaryBullets: 9D experience at the Lost Atlantis Museum recreating the island's great eruption, plus visits to Red Beach and Black Beach for their volcanic landscapes
Pyrgos Village, the oldest village on the island
A tasting of 3 Santorinian wines paired with a 3-course lunch, plus a cocktail
Inclusions: transfers from/to meeting points, entrance fees, and an English licensed guide; clients make their own way to the meeting point at the old Port, Athinios

tours.tour: Archaic and Medieval Santorini
tours.summaryIntro: A 3.5-hour guided tour through Santorini's ancient and Byzantine history.
summaryBullets: The ancient Dorian city of Thera, founded around 1050 B.C., set on the Mesa Vouno promontory
Episcopi Church in Mesa Gonia, Santorini's most significant Byzantine monument, with early 12th-century wall paintings showing Eastern Byzantine influences
Ancient Thera is open 8:30am-2:30pm, so the visit is scheduled around those hours
Inclusions: car, driver, licensed guide, and entrance fees

Inclusions: pickup in a luxury car, driver, entrance fees, and wine tasting

tours.tour: Private - Two Traditional Villages and Akrotiri Excavations with Tickets and Guide
tours.summaryIntro: A private half-day tour pairing two of Santorini's best-preserved traditional villages with a stop at the island's landmark Akrotiri excavation site.
summaryBullets: Visits Pyrgos, a 15th-century Venetian-built village with one of the island's five best-preserved castle ruins
Stops at the Akrotiri excavation, a Late Neolithic prehistoric settlement dating to the 4th millennium BC
Continues to Megalochori village (historic hub of the local Vinsanto wine trade) or Oia
Includes private roundtrip hotel transfers, liability insurance, and a designated driver; conducted in English (no afternoon departure Mon/Thu, when the excavation closes early)

tours.tour: Half Day Budapest City Tour by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A half-day private Budapest city tour by sedan covering the city's grandest landmarks on both sides of the Danube.
summaryBullets: 4-hour tour by sedan, daily, with hotel pickup/drop-off 10 minutes prior to departure
Passes the Citadel on Gellert Hill, Elisabeth Bridge, Rakoczi Street, Heroes' Square, and Andrassy Street, with a walk inside St. Stephen's Basilica, Budapest's largest church
Continues past Parliament and Margaret Bridge to the Castle District, highlighting the Fishermen's Bastion and Matthias Church
Includes car, driver, and English-speaking private guide; entrance fees and gratuity are not included

tours.tour: Half Day Excursion to Godollo and Grassalkovich Castle by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A half-day private excursion by sedan to Godollo's Grassalkovich Castle, the former summer residence of Hungary's Queen Elisabeth, just outside Budapest.
summaryBullets: 4-hour tour by sedan, daily, with hotel pickup/drop-off 10 minutes prior to departure
Visits the baroque Grassalkovich Castle, 20 miles east of Budapest, once the summer residence of Queen Elisabeth, wife of Emperor Franz Joseph
Includes a walk in the castle park, time for souvenir shopping, and a coffee and cake stop at a typical local cafe
Includes car, driver, and English-speaking private guide; entrance fees and gratuity are not included

tours.tour: Szentendre by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A half-day private sedan excursion to Szentendre, the artists' riverside town near Budapest, perfect for clients wanting authentic Hungarian culture without a long day trip.
summaryBullets: Visit the Open Air Village Museum and stroll the Baroque old town

Free time for shopping in the artisan quarter
Includes private car, driver, and English-speaking guide for the 4-hour tour; entrance fees and gratuity are not included

summaryBullets: Round-trip private transport with English-speaking driver guide, about 45 minutes each way from Reykjavik City Center
Comfort Entrance included: Silica Mud Mask, use of a towel, and first drink of choice

tours.tour: Golden Circle tour by Luxury Sedan Mercedes-Benz S-Class or similar
tours.summaryIntro: Iceland's classic Golden Circle route by private Luxury Sedan (Mercedes-Benz S-Class or similar), covering three of the country's most iconic natural and historic sites in one day.
summaryBullets: Thingvellir National Park, a UNESCO World Heritage site since 2004 and home to the Silfra fissure and the original Althing, founding site of the world's oldest parliament
Geysir geothermal area, featuring the dormant Great Geysir and the active Strokkur geyser
Gullfoss waterfall, plunging 32 meters in two stages into a 70-meter canyon
Includes round-trip transport with English-speaking driver guide, free wi-fi, and bottled glacier water; up to 8 hours

tours.tour: Reykjanes Peninsula tour by Luxury Sedan Mercedes-Benz S-Class or similar
tours.summaryIntro: A private Luxury Sedan (Mercedes-Benz S-Class or similar) tour of the Reykjanes Peninsula, showcasing Iceland's raw geothermal landscape just outside Reykjavik.
summaryBullets: Kleifarvatn lake and the Gunnuhver boiling mud pool
The solfatara fields of the Krysuvik geothermal area
Sandvik, where guests can walk the bridge between two continents, plus Reykjanesviti lighthouse and the Krysuvikurbjarg cliffs
Includes round-trip transport with English-speaking driver guide, free wi-fi, and bottled glacier water; up to 4 hours

tours.tour: Reykjavik City tour by Business Minivan Mercedes V-Class
tours.summaryIntro: A private Business Minivan (Mercedes V-Class) city tour covering Reykjavik's top historic and cultural landmarks.
summaryBullets: Hofdi House, site of the 1986 Reagan-Gorbachev summit
Hallgrimskirkja Church, designed to echo Iceland's basalt lava columns
Bessastadir, the home of the President of Iceland

Optional add-on (payable on the spot): Perlan Museum, with viewing platforms and the Wonders of Iceland and Aurora Northern Lights Planetarium show; tour includes round-trip transport and English-speaking driver guide, up to 4 hours

tours.summaryIntro: A full-day South Coast tour by private Luxury SUV (Mercedes-Benz GLS or Cadillac Escalade), covering Iceland's dramatic coastline down to Vik, with Lava Center entry included.
summaryBullets: Reynisfjara black sand beach and Vik, Iceland's southernmost point
Seljalandsfoss waterfall, where guests can walk the path behind the falls
Skogarfoss waterfall, known for its near-permanent double rainbow spray

tours.tour: Castlemartyr Daily Tour by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day private tour from Castlemartyr through East Cork's whiskey, food, and maritime heritage - an easy-going day trip packed with tastings and a slice of Titanic history.
summaryBullets: Visit the world-famous Middleton whiskey distillery for a roughly one-hour tour and tasting, plus on-site shops and cafes.
Stop at Ballymaloe Cookery School's Organic Farm and Gardens in Shanagarry, with the option to join a cookery course or stroll the gardens and shops.
In Ballycotton, sample a pint of Guinness or Murphy's at the Ballycotton Inn, or view the cliffs.
Finish in Cobh to see the Titanic White Star Line museum before returning to Castlemartyr by 5pm; includes an English-speaking driver guide and vehicle for the 8-hour day.

tours.tour: Cobh Blarney Cork City Kinsale by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: An 8-hour private tour of Cobh's emigration history and Cork Harbour landmarks, ideal for clients interested in Ireland's maritime and Titanic-era heritage.
summaryBullets: Explore Cobh (pronounced "Cove"), the deep-water harbor once called Queenstown, from which the majority of Irish emigrants departed for America and Canada.
Visit the Cobh Heritage Centre and the Queenstown Story, which tells the tale of Annie Moore, the first person processed through Ellis Island in New York.
See the bay that is home to the Royal Cork Yacht Club and the headquarters of the Irish Naval Service.
Includes an English-speaking driver guide and vehicle for the 8-hour tour; note that Blarney Castle entrance tickets are NOT included, so pre-purchase is recommended.

tours.tour: Cork - Ring of Kerry Full Day Tour by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day scenic drive around the Ring of Kerry, Ireland's most celebrated coastal route, departing from Cork.
summaryBullets: Drive the Ring of Kerry along the Iveragh Peninsula and the Wild Atlantic Way, widely regarded as Ireland's most popular scenic drive.
Pass through Killorglin, home of the famous Puck Fair festival (held August 10-12), where a wild goat is enthroned in the town centre.
Stop at the Bog Village, a cluster of thatched-roof cottages recreating rural Kerry life in the 1800s.
Includes an English-speaking driver guide and vehicle for the 8-hour day, with hotel pickup in Cork.

tours.tour: Cork City Walking Tour
tours.summaryIntro: A guided walking tour of Cork city's history and heritage on the Shandon Walk, perfect for history-minded travelers with limited time.
summaryBullets: Follow the Shandon Walk, an easy route through Cork city centre, taking in the sites along the way.
Led by a dedicated walking guide included in the tour.
Hotel pickup in Cork, 15 minutes before the scheduled departure.

tours.tour: Killarney - Ring of Kerry Full Day Tour by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day scenic drive around the Ring of Kerry, Ireland's most celebrated coastal route, departing from Killarney.
summaryBullets: Drive the Ring of Kerry along the Iveragh Peninsula and the Wild Atlantic Way, widely regarded as Ireland's most popular scenic drive.
Pass through Killorglin, home of the famous Puck Fair festival (held August 10-12), where a wild goat is enthroned in the town centre.
Stop at the Bog Village, a cluster of thatched-roof cottages recreating rural Kerry life in the 1800s.
Includes an English-speaking driver guide and vehicle for the 8-hour day, with hotel pickup in Killarney.

tours.tour: Killarney Full Day Tour by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day private tour of Killarney's scenic highlights, whiskey tasting, and artisan shopping.
summaryBullets: Take a horse-and-carriage ride through the Gap of Dunloe, a scenic mountain valley, arriving at Kate Kearney's Cottage.
Stop at Ladies View for lunch and panoramic views over the Lakes of Killarney, then drive back via Molls Gap.
Sample whiskey at the Irish Whiskey Experience, a private whiskey collection and cafe bar, followed by a walking tour of Killarney's artisan shops.
Includes an English-speaking, professional uniformed chauffeur, a personalized Classic Welcome sign, tissues, and cold bottled water for the 8-hour day.

tours.tour: Killarney Half Day Tour by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A half-day private tour of Killarney National Park's signature sights, ideal for clients with limited time.
summaryBullets: Take a guided one-hour tour of Muckross House and Gardens.
Visit Torc Waterfall within Killarney National Park, and view Ross Castle.
Optionally cover these stops by traditional Jarvie horse-and-carriage ride, and visit Killarney House and Gardens, recently visited by Prince Charles.
Includes an English-speaking driver guide and vehicle, plus a Classic Welcome chauffeur, tissues, and cold water, for the 4-hour tour.

tours.tour: South Parish Walking Tour
tours.summaryIntro: A walking tour through Cork city's South Parish, a top pick for first-time visitors wanting a broad overview of the city centre.
summaryBullets: Begin at Daunt Square and wind through the streets of Cork's South Parish, passing key attractions and places of interest.
Rated as one of the best walks in and around Cork.
Includes a dedicated walking guide for the 3-hour tour, with hotel pickup in Cork.

tours.tour: 1916 Walking Tour
tours.summaryIntro: A walking tour retracing the 1916 Easter Rising, Ireland's most significant modern historical event, through the streets of Dublin.
summaryBullets: Follow in the footsteps of the 1916 rebels through Dublin, where the bullet holes of the Rising remain visible today.
Visit St. Stephen's Green, the GPO, and the Custom House.
Includes a dedicated walking guide for the 3-hour tour, with hotel pickup in Dublin.

summaryBullets: Visit the world-famous Middleton whiskey distillery for a roughly one-hour tour and tasting, plus on-site shops and cafes.

In Ballycotton, sample a pint of Guinness or Murphy's at the Ballycotton Inn, or view the cliffs.

tours.tour: Cork - Jamieson Distillery Tour
tours.summaryIntro: A guided distillery experience at the historic Jameson site in Cork, featuring whiskey tasting and behind-the-scenes access.
summaryBullets: Enjoy a fully guided distillery tour with premium whiskey tasting across the historic 15-acre site.
See the largest pot still in the world, and visit the micro-distillery and a live maturation warehouse.
Optional add-ons include a cask opening experience or a cocktail-making class.
Includes an English-speaking driver guide and vehicle for the 4-hour tour, with hotel pickup in Cork.

tours.tour: Cork - Jamieson Distillery Tour
tours.summaryIntro: A guided distillery experience at the historic Jameson site in Cork, featuring whiskey tasting and behind-the-scenes access.
summaryBullets: Enjoy a fully guided distillery tour with premium whiskey tasting across the historic 15-acre site, including the largest pot still in the world.
Tour includes distillery entrance, a short film, and a walk through the grounds and key distillery buildings.
Transfer is via a private saloon car with an English-speaking driver guide and vehicle.
Premium whiskey tasting experience is included; hotel pickup in Cork.

tours.tour: Cork - Ring of Kerry Full Day Tour by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day scenic drive around the Ring of Kerry, Ireland's most celebrated coastal route, departing from Cork.
summaryBullets: Drive the Ring of Kerry along the Iveragh Peninsula and the Wild Atlantic Way, widely regarded as Ireland's most popular scenic drive.
Pass through Killorglin, home of the famous Puck Fair festival (held August 10-12), where a wild goat is enthroned in the town centre.
Stop at the Bog Village, a cluster of thatched-roof cottages recreating rural Kerry life in the 1800s.
Includes an English-speaking driver guide and vehicle for the 8-hour day, with hotel pickup in Cork.

tours.tour: Cork City Walking Tour
tours.summaryIntro: A guided walking tour of Cork city's history and heritage on the Shandon Walk, perfect for history-minded travelers with limited time.
summaryBullets: Follow the Shandon Walk, an easy route through Cork city centre, taking in the sites along the way.
Led by a dedicated walking guide included in the tour.
Hotel pickup in Cork, 15 minutes before the scheduled departure.

tours.tour: Dromoland Burren Full Day Tour by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day guided tour of the Burren's dramatic lunar landscape and the Cliffs of Moher, departing from Dromoland Castle.
summaryBullets: Explore The Burren, roughly 500 square kilometers of lunar-like limestone landscape famed for its unique flora, with a farming history dating back to the Stone Age (some 6,000 years).
See the Cliffs of Moher, and pass through Oranmore, Kilcolgan, and Ballyvaughan en route.
Stop at Black Head (also known as Burren Head) at the southern entrance to Galway Bay, and continue to the town of Lisdoonvarna.
Includes an English-speaking driver guide and vehicle for the 8-hour tour, with pickup at Dromoland Castle.

tours.tour: Dromoland Full Day Tour by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day tour from Dromoland Castle to the Burren and the iconic Cliffs of Moher, one of Ireland's most-visited natural landmarks.
summaryBullets: View the Cliffs of Moher, which rise 390 ft above the Atlantic at Hag's Head and reach 702 ft near O'Brien's Tower, a round stone tower built in 1835.
From the cliffs, see the Aran Islands in Galway Bay, the Maumturks and Twelve Pins mountain ranges, and Loop Head to the south.
The day also includes a visit to the Burren.
Includes an English-speaking, professional uniformed chauffeur, a personalized Classic Welcome sign, tissues, and cold bottled water for the 8-hour day from Dromoland Castle.

tours.tour: Dublin - Perfect Pint Tour

summaryBullets: Visit some of Dublin's most iconic and traditional pubs, starting with the home of the best pint of Guinness in the world, located just outside Dublin city centre.
Learn how to pour your own pint of Guinness, with a variety of drinks (beer, cider, wine, liquor, or non-alcoholic) available at each stop.
Enjoy traditional Irish music and a scenic tour of Dublin city, hosted by a local guide described as a "Perfect Pint Connoisseur."
Includes an English-speaking driver guide, luxury transport, and refreshments on transport; the tour does not include tickets to any other attractions.

tours.tour: Dublin - Ring of Kerry Full Day Tour by MPV
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day scenic drive around the Ring of Kerry, Ireland's most celebrated coastal route, departing from Dublin.
summaryBullets: Drive the Ring of Kerry along the Iveragh Peninsula and the Wild Atlantic Way, widely regarded as Ireland's most popular scenic drive.
Pass through Killorglin, home of the famous Puck Fair festival (held August 10-12), where a wild goat is enthroned in the town centre.
Stop at the Bog Village, a cluster of thatched-roof cottages recreating rural Kerry life in the 1800s.
A 10-hour day tour with hotel pickup in Dublin, reflecting the longer drive from the capital to Kerry.

tours.tour: Dublin City Full Day City Tour by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day city tour tracing Dublin's Viking origins through its landmark cathedrals and Georgian-era sites.
summaryBullets: See the site of the original Viking settlement of "Dyflin," including the stronghold that became Dublin Castle.

View Christ Church Cathedral, built on the site of Sitric Silkenbeard's original church, and learn about St. Patrick's Cathedral, where Jonathan Swift (author of Gulliver's Travels) once served as Dean.
Pass the Guinness Brewery, source of the famous porter since 1759, and the Royal Hospital Kilmainham, home to fine gardens and the Museum of Modern Art.

Includes an English-speaking driver guide and vehicle for the 8-hour tour; entrance tickets to sights such as Dublin Castle, the cathedrals, the Guinness Storehouse, Kilmainham Gaol, and Trinity College/Book of Kells are NOT included - pre-purchase is recommended.

tours.tour: Dublin Half Day City Tour by Sedan

summaryBullets: Trace the Viking settlements that gave Dublin its name, and view Christ Church and St. Patrick's Cathedrals.
Visit the Guinness Brewery ("home of the black stuff") and the Royal Hospital Kilmainham and Gardens, near Kilmainham Gaol.
See Phoenix Park - home to the President of Ireland, the US Ambassador, Dublin Zoo, and the largest walled park in Europe - before passing O'Connell Street and the GPO.

Includes an English-speaking driver guide and vehicle for the 4-hour tour; entrance tickets to the cathedrals, the Guinness Storehouse, and Kilmainham Gaol are NOT included - pre-purchase recommended.

tours.tour: Dublin to Malahide Castle Full Day City Tour by Sedan

summaryBullets: Explore Dublin's Viking settlement of "Dyflin," Christ Church and St. Patrick's Cathedrals, the Guinness Brewery, and Royal Hospital Kilmainham.
Stroll the Garden of Remembrance and pass the Gate and Abbey Theatres.
See Dublin's famous Georgian squares, with their colored doors and sash windows, from the era Dublin was known as "the second city of the Empire."

Includes an English-speaking driver guide and vehicle for the 8-hour tour; entrance tickets to sights including Malahide Castle, Dublin Castle, and the cathedrals are NOT included - pre-purchase recommended.

tours.tour: Dublin to Wicklow Full Day Tour by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day tour combining a Dublin city overview with the scenic beauty of County Wicklow.
summaryBullets: Explore Dublin's Viking origins along the River Liffey and the Georgian architecture of the Custom House, Trinity College, and Leinster House.
Walk the city's Georgian squares, once home to James Joyce, Samuel Beckett, G.B. Shaw, and Brendan Behan, among others including Bono.
Drive through the countryside of County Wicklow.
Includes an English-speaking driver guide and vehicle for the 8-hour tour; entrance tickets to Trinity College and Powerscourt Gardens and Waterfall are NOT included - pre-purchase recommended.

summaryBullets: Take in spectacular views from the towering cliffs, with a good chance of spotting puffins, kittiwakes, and razorbills.
Timed to help beat the crowds at one of Ireland's must-see sights.
Includes an English-speaking, professional uniformed chauffeur, a personalized Classic Welcome sign, tissues, and cold bottled water for the 8-hour day, with hotel pickup in Galway.

Coastal drive through Salthill's shops and restaurants, then on to Spiddal's Builin Blasta Cafe and Bakery
Scenic return drive through the Galway mountains, arriving back around 5:30pm

summaryBullets: Vertical tasting of WS Top 100 "Cancelli" plus a vertical of ten-year Reserves or historic vintages of the Supertuscans Sangioveto and Montebello
Guided access to normally-private areas of the Abbey: the Renaissance garden, cloister, frescoed refectory, and the "Engineer's" room
Tasting menu specially paired with 4 Coltibuono top wines

Post-lunch guided vineyard walk; round-trip chauffeured transfer included; runs about 9 hours; gratuities not included

Private tour of the cellars, barrel room, and the exclusive "Salette delle Reserve"
Includes round-trip chauffeured transport, a dedicated on-site guide, and a full traditional Apulian lunch with wine pairing, plus a gifted bottle of Kaloro dessert wine
7-hour private experience with hotel pickup

tours.summaryIntro: A half-day pairing hands-on cheesemaking with a stroll through Alberobello's trulli — an easy add-on for guests who want a taste of Puglia without a full-day commitment.
summaryBullets: Visit a traditional masseria in Valle d'Itria to see the caves where caciocavallo ages, then make mozzarella and burrata with the cheesemaker and taste the results
Guided walk through Alberobello, famed for its whitewashed conical-roofed trulli houses
Includes transportation, driver, the cheese-making tour/tasting, entrance fees, and a private English-speaking guide in Alberobello — 6 hours, pickup from your hotel in Fasano

tours.tour: Puglia - Ceramics of Grottaglie (#3) by Sedan and guide
tours.summaryIntro: A pottery-focused day trip to Grottaglie, Puglia's ceramics capital, with real historic sites built in rather than just workshop shopping.
summaryBullets: Hands-on pottery workshop in Grottaglie, plus admission to the town's museum and Episcopio Castle
Passes Grottaglie's Castello, the 15th-century Palazzo Urselli, and the Church Chiesa del Carmine's "Purgatory" chapel
Includes transportation, driver, the pottery workshop, museum/castle tickets, and a private English-speaking guide in Ostuni
Must be booked at least 20 days in advance

tours.tour: Puglia - Ceramics of Grottaglie (#3) by Sedan and guide

tours.tour: Puglia - Sassi di Matera and Park of the Rupestrian Church Tour by MERCEDES E
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day trip to the UNESCO World Heritage Sassi di Matera — one of Italy's most striking sights and an easy sell for history-minded guests.
summaryBullets: Guided walk through the Sasso Caveoso cave-dwellings, still fitted with period furniture, and the rock-cut Rupestrian Church, the area's first Benedictine monastic settlement
Optional tasting of local products at the end of the tour (fee not included)
Includes transportation, driver, and a 4-hour private guide in Matera plus entrance fees to the Rupestrian Church — 8-hour day, pickup from your hotel in Puglia

tours.tour: Puglia - Sassi di Matera by night Tour by Mercedes E
tours.summaryIntro: An evening version of the Sassi di Matera visit — sell this for atmosphere, since sunset light on the old town is the whole point.
summaryBullets: Guided evening walk through the Sassi as sunset turns the facades and narrow streets a warm red
Includes transportation, driver, and a 2-hour private guide in Matera
6-hour outing departing around 6:00pm, pickup from your hotel in Puglia

tours.tour: Puglia - The white town and the green gold of Apulia (#1) by Sedan and guide
tours.summaryIntro: Pairs an olive-oil tasting on a historic masseria with a walk through Ostuni, the "White City" — a good-value half-day combining food and sightseeing.
summaryBullets: Tour and tasting of biological extra-virgin olive oil at an ancient masseria with centuries-old olive trees
Guided walk through Ostuni, known for its whitewashed houses and Middle Ages architecture overlooking the sea
Includes transportation, driver, the olive oil tour/tasting, and a private English-speaking guide in Ostuni — 6 hours, pickup from your hotel in Fasano

tours.tour: Puglia - The white town and the green gold of Apulia (#1) by Sedan and guide

tours.tour: Puglia - Trani and Castel del Monte by Mercedes E FOR 2 and Guide
tours.summaryIntro: Combines two of Puglia's must-see landmarks in one guided day — Trani's seaside cathedral and the octagonal Castel del Monte.
summaryBullets: Trani's 12th-century Cattedrale di San Nicola Pellegrino sits at the water's edge, with a Romanesque facade and a surviving mosaic of Alexander the Great and Adam and Eve
Castel del Monte, the perfectly octagonal castle completed in 1240
Includes driver, car, an English-speaking guide, and entrance fees for Castel del Monte — 8-hour day with morning departure, pickup from your hotel in Puglia

tours.tour: Unguided - Puglia - Alberobello And Locorotondo Custom Tour 4 Hours By Mercedes E
tours.summaryIntro: A self-driven 4-hour taste of two of Puglia's prettiest towns — best for guests who want flexibility over narration.
summaryBullets: Wander Alberobello's trulli district, the whitewashed conical-roofed houses that define the town
Explore Locorotondo, ranked among Italy's most beautiful villages and known for its wine production
Includes driver and car only, no guide — 4 hours, pickup from Borgo Egnazia

tours.tour: Unguided - Puglia - Alberobello And Martina Franca Custom Tour 6 Hours By Mercedes E
tours.summaryIntro: A self-driven 6-hour combo of Alberobello's trulli and Martina Franca's baroque old town — good for guests who want more town time, less itinerary.
summaryBullets: See Alberobello's iconic trulli, the conical whitewashed houses unique to the region
Wander Martina Franca's old quarter of winding alleys and baroque/rococo buildings, founded in the 10th century by refugees from Taranto and later fortified with 24 bastions
Includes driver and car only, no guide — 6 hours, pickup from Borgo Egnazia

Alberobello's trulli district, the region's signature conical whitewashed houses
Includes driver and car only, no guide — 8 hours, pickup from Borgo Egnazia

summaryBullets: Locorotondo, one of Italy's most beautiful villages, known for its wine
Alberobello's trulli district and Martina Franca's baroque old quarter with its 24-bastion defensive walls

Alberobello's trulli district, the region's signature conical-roofed houses

Alberobello's trulli district, the region's signature conical whitewashed houses

tours.tour: Unguided - Puglia - Polignano A Mare Custom Tour 4 Hours By Mercedes E

tours.tour: Catania (#10) with MPV and guide
tours.summaryIntro: A half-day guided walk through Catania's baroque old town by MPV, showing off a city that's been rebuilt nine times after quakes and eruptions yet still shines with baroque splendor.

Passes the Arch of St. Benedict and the Bellini Theatre
Ends at Dome Square, ringed by baroque palaces and Vaccarini's cathedral, centered on the elephant fountain (the city's symbol)
Includes transportation, driver, and a private English-speaking guide (4 hours)

summaryBullets: Starts with coffee and a walking tour of the city market to pick fresh ingredients and taste local products
Chef leads a hands-on lesson in traditional dishes like parmigiana and home-made pasta
Group prepares and eats a 3-course menu (starter, pasta, fish main) with local wine at the restaurant

Finishes with a wine tasting and 5-course lunch at a local estate
Includes 4WD transportation, driver, wine tasting fees, the 5-course lunch, and a private English-speaking escort (8 hours, pickup at Taormina hotel)

tours.summaryIntro: A guided half-day tour of Messina by MPV, good for guests who want the historic strait city beyond the usual Taormina/Catania stops.
summaryBullets: Sees historic landmarks including Palazzo Zanca (the town hall), the Land Registry Building, the Customs Palace, and the Chamber of Commerce Palace
Timed to catch the Cathedral belltower's noon carousel, where lever mechanisms animate golden statues in an allegory of the soul seeking God
Includes transportation, driver, and a private English-speaking guide (5 hours, recommended in the morning)

tours.tour: Messina (#11) with sedan and guide
tours.summaryIntro: Same guided half-day Messina tour, offered by sedan.

summaryBullets: Crosses onto Ortigia island to walk the old town, seeing the Apollonion, the Fountain of Arethusa, the cathedral, and Maniace Castle
Returns to the mainland to explore the Archaeological Park, including the Greek theatre (one of the finest and largest of its kind) and the Roman amphitheater
Includes transportation, driver, non-refundable entrance tickets to the Cathedral, Maniace Castle, and Archaeological Park, plus a private English-speaking guide (7 hours)

tours.tour: Syracuse - Noto and Modica by sedan and guide
tours.summaryIntro: A sedan day trip from Syracuse pairing two UNESCO-listed baroque towns with a hands-on chocolate factory visit — a nice mix of architecture and a tasty stop for guests.
summaryBullets: Visits Noto, part of the Val di Noto UNESCO World Heritage site since 2002, rebuilt after the 1693 earthquake in golden-toned yellow limestone
Visits Modica, famed for its chocolate — includes a factory tour showing how it's made from bean to bar, with a tasting
Includes transportation, driver, the Modica factory tour and tasting, and an English-speaking guide (8 hours)

tours.tour: Syracuse with Guide
tours.summaryIntro: A guided half-day Syracuse tour for guests already staying there, hitting the old town and the archaeological park without a full-day commitment.
summaryBullets: Walks the baroque old town to see the Apollonion, the Fountain of Arethusa, and the cathedral
Visits the Neapolis Archaeological Park, including the Greek theater and Roman amphitheater
Guide accompanies guests inside both the cathedral and the Archaeological Park
Includes transportation, driver, non-refundable entrance tickets to the Cathedral and Neapolis Archaeological Park, and a private English-speaking guide (4 hours, departs 9am or 2pm)

tours.tour: Taormina (#9) with guide
tours.summaryIntro: A short, easy guided tour of Taormina itself for guests staying there — ideal as a quick orientation walk with real substance, not just a stroll.
summaryBullets: Walks Corso Umberto between the Porta Messina and Porta Catania gates, past the Roman theatre, the Dome, and a bay-view terrace
Guide brings the Ancient Theatre to life — carved into rock, still hosting concerts, operas, and ballets today
Includes roundtrip transportation, non-refundable Greek theatre entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide (2 hours)

tours.tour: Taormina - Taormina coast by private boat
tours.summaryIntro: A private boat tour of the Taormina coastline for guests who want to see the area's famous grottoes and bays from the water instead of on foot.
summaryBullets: Cruises the coast of Isola Bella and Giardini Naxos past unspoiled bays and caves near rocky walls
Explores the Lovers Grotto, the Blue Grotto, and the Coral Grotto
Continues to the Bay of Mazzaro and Bay of the Sirens, with a chance to swim/dive
Includes transportation, driver, the private boat, and an aperitif on board (3 hours; departures at 9am, 11am, 2pm, 4pm, 6pm)

tours.tour: Taormina with Guide
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day guided excursion to Taormina for guests staying in Syracuse — the same signature Taormina walk as the local version, just built out as a day trip given the distance.
summaryBullets: Walks Corso Umberto between the Porta Messina and Porta Catania gates, past the Roman theatre, the Dome, and a bay-view terrace
Guide brings the Ancient Theatre to life — carved into rock, still hosting concerts, operas, and ballets today
Includes transportation, driver, non-refundable Greek theatre entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide (8 hours)

tours.summaryIntro: Enjoy the variety of sites and landscape of Sicily with your private car and driver. A camera is a must as you explore picturesque towns; ancient ruins; waterfalls; and beaches; and discover the unique scenic beauty of this world-renowned area!

tours.tour: 3 Hours Private English Speaking Guide
tours.summaryIntro: Book a 3-hour private English-speaking guide to add expert context to any stop on the itinerary.
summaryBullets: The guide is a licensed professional who explains the art, history, landscape, and culture of the place you're visiting
English-speaking guides get free entrance to all Italian museums
Skip-the-line museum tickets can only be arranged through an English-speaking guide
Each guide is licensed for one specific city or region only

6 Hours Private English Speaking Guide

tours.tour: 6 Hours Private Escort
Art and Science with Guide (#4) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A half-day tour tracing the Medici family's love of science and art, from a Renaissance stone workshop to Galileo's own instruments.
summaryBullets: Visit the Opificio delle Pietre Dure, the Medici-era workshop for semiprecious stone artistry using lapis, mother of pearl, jade, and seashells
See Galileo Galilei's original scientific instruments at the Institute and Museum of the History of Science
Tour closes at Galileo's funeral monument inside Santa Croce, one of Florence's largest churches
Includes transportation by Sedan, driver, non-refundable entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide in Florence for 3 hours

tours.tour: Borgo San Felice - Brunello Winery Tour with Escort (#30) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: An 8-hour day trip into Brunello wine country, visiting the fortress town of Montalcino and stopping at renowned wineries for tastings.
summaryBullets: Explore Montalcino's century-old fortress and the Abbey of St. Antimo
Taste Brunello, made from Sangiovese grapes and considered by many the best wine in the world
Shop for local products and crafts in the area
Includes transportation by Sedan and a private English-speaking escort; wine tasting fees are extra, paid locally in Euros

tours.tour: Borgo San Felice - Off Road adventure to the Chianti with local escort
tours.summaryIntro: An off-road 4x4 adventure into hidden corners of the Chianti countryside that even locals rarely see, paired with a full homemade lunch.
summaryBullets: Ride a 4x4 through remote woods, meadows, lakes, and hidden vineyards reachable only by mule tracks
The off-road excursion itself runs about 2 hours, starting around 10:00am after a 9:00am departure
Enjoy a full homemade lunch expertly paired with local wines
Includes transportation, driver, a local English-speaking escort, lunch, and wine tasting fees

summaryBullets: Walk with your guide to Piazza dei Cavalieri, home to the Scuola Normale, one of the world's most famous universities
See the Leaning Tower, the Duomo, and the Baptistery in the Piazza dei Miracoli
Free time afterward to stroll and grab a bite in Pisa
Includes transportation by Sedan, driver, entrance tickets to the Duomo, Baptistry, Leaning Tower and Cemetery, plus a private English-speaking guide in Pisa for 3 hours

tours.summaryIntro: A hands-on Tuscan cooking class in a Chianti family kitchen, paired with a vineyard visit and wine and olive oil tasting.
summaryBullets: Starts with a tour of a Vernaccia vineyard, one of the oldest in San Gimignano
Learn to make a dessert of your choice — traditional Chocolate Salami, a classic Margherita Cake (secret family recipe), or Cantuccini biscuits
Prepare fresh pasta, either Pici or Ricotta Gnocchi, paired with a seasonal vegetable sauce
Includes roundtrip transportation, driver, cook, a private English-speaking escort, and the meal

tours.tour: Chocolate Factory Amedei Turscany Materclass 004 with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: An exclusive private 9-hour chocolate masterclass at the Amedei factory in Tuscany, pairing a guided tour and tasting with a full Tuscan lunch at a historic restaurant.
summaryBullets: Guided factory tour and hands-on masterclass on how to recognize quality chocolate, including a dark chocolate tasting paired with wines and spirits
Transfer about 35 minutes to a historic restaurant for a full Tuscan lunch themed on chocolate and cocoa, paired with Wine Spectator Top 100 wines
Chance to buy chocolate directly at outlet pricing
Includes private Sedan transportation with an English-speaking uniformed chauffeur, an on-site Ambassador guide, and the lunch with wine pairing; each minor must be accompanied by an adult

tours.tour: Cinque Terre with Escort (#13) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A 10-hour day trip along Italy's Cinque Terre coastline, a UNESCO-protected national park of five clifftop villages linked by a historic footpath.
summaryBullets: Visit the five villages of Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola, and Riomaggiore
Walk the "Sentiero Azzurro" coastal footpath and the famous "Via dell'Amore" (Lover's Lane) linking Manarola and Riomaggiore
Stop for lunch on your own in one of the villages, with time to shop and stroll
Includes transportation by Sedan and an English-speaking escort, departing from your hotel in Viareggio; ferry and train tickets are not included

tours.tour: Cooking Class and Guided our of COLTIBUONO Abbery and Winery with lunch 025 with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: A private Tuscan cooking class held at Badia a Coltibuono, the historic abbey and winery founded by cookbook author and PBS TV personality Lorenza de' Medici — hands-on cooking, wine pairing, and a taste of thousand-year-old history.
summaryBullets: Founded by Lorenza de' Medici, a member of the de' Medici dynasty that created the Italian Renaissance in Florence and shaped art, politics, banking, cuisine, and medicine
Lorenza started the school at Badia a Coltibuono in the early 1980s and later starred in the 14-episode PBS series "The De' Medici Kitchen"
Includes a guided tour of the Abbey, winery, and Villa, a 3-hour cooking lesson, and a 4-course lunch paired with Wine Spectator Top 100 wines

Round-trip transport in a luxury sedan or minivan with an English-speaking chauffeur and an exclusive on-site guide (often a family member, sommelier, or chef); guests take home an apron, recipes, and a "Tuscan Cooking" diploma

Lorenza started the school at Badia a Coltibuono in the early 1980s and later starred in the 14-episode PBS series "The De' Medici Kitchen"
Includes a guided tour of the Abbey, winery, and Villa, a 3-hour cooking lesson, and a 4-course lunch paired with Wine Spectator Top 100 wines

Round-trip transport in a luxury sedan or minivan with an English-speaking chauffeur and an exclusive on-site guide (often a family member, sommelier, or chef); guests take home an apron, recipes, and a "Tuscan Cooking" diploma

tours.tour: Cooking School Experience in AVIGNONESI 008 with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: A private day with an Avignonesi winery chef in the Val di Chiana — the valley made famous by "Under the Tuscan Sun" — picking your own ingredients and cooking a full Tuscan menu from scratch.
summaryBullets: Set in the valley from the novel "Under the Tuscan Sun," guests personally pick ingredients from the winery's own garden before cooking
Learn to make handmade "pici" pasta (Montepulciano style), "sugo all'aglione" garlic-tomato sauce, pecorino flan with Swiss chard puree, and "torta della nonna"
Includes a guided tour of the winery and gardens, a hands-on cooking lesson, and a full four-course lunch paired with Supertuscan and Vino Nobile di Montepulciano wines not sold anywhere else
Round-trip transport in a luxury sedan or minivan with an English-speaking chauffeur and an on-site guide, plus a gift bag with an Avignonesi apron, corkscrew, drop stop, and recipe book

tours.tour: Cooking School Experience in AVIGNONESI 008 with Sedan - Villas in Maremma - Grosseto Area
tours.summaryIntro: A private, full-day cooking class at Avignonesi's own Tuscan winery school, set in the valley made famous by "Under the Tuscan Sun" -- guests cook a full meal from scratch under the winery's chef.
summaryBullets: Guests personally pick ingredients from the winery garden and hand-make a full Tuscan menu, including pici pasta and torta della nonna, guided by the chef

tours.tour: Cooking and wine pairing class in a Renainissance Villa at RUFFINO 039 with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: A private cooking class and wine-pairing experience hosted by Ruffino, one of the world's leading wine producers, inside a Tuscan Renaissance villa.
summaryBullets: A professional chef leads a hands-on class recreating traditional Tuscan dishes -- "dishes for nobles and dishes for peasants" -- followed by a wine-food pairing lesson
Includes a guided tour of the estate's vineyards and cellars, plus a visit to the private residence of the Baron family inside the Castle

Guests then dine at the on-site restaurant, La Locanda Le Tre Rane, on a 5-course Tuscan lunch paired with 4 wines, including a vertical tasting of a Wine Spectator Top 100 wine and a choice of Chianti Classico Castello di Brolio or Casalferro
This 7-hour visit includes round-trip transport in a luxury sedan with an English-speaking chauffeur, plus a private on-site guide reserved for the group

tours.tour: Cortona - Brunello Winery Tour with Escort (#30) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A day tour into Montalcino to explore Brunello, a Sangiovese-based wine many consider the best in the world.
summaryBullets: Visit Montalcino's centuries-old fortress and the historic Abbey of St. Antimo
Stop at some of the world's best wineries to sample Brunello and shop for local products and crafts
Includes round-trip transportation in a sedan, a driver, and a private English-speaking escort for this 8-hour tour departing at 9:00am, with pickup/drop-off at your hotel
Wine tasting fees vary by winery and are paid locally by clients in Euros, not included in the tour price

tours.tour: Dessert Cooking class experience with LORY PASTRY 032 with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: A private dessert-making class at the pastry lab of Loretta Fanella, a former dessert chef at El Bulli, Cracco Peck in Milan, and Enoteca Pinchiorri in Florence.
summaryBullets: Hands-on pastry lesson taught by the starred dessert chef in a real, active high-pastry laboratory with professional-grade equipment
Includes a guided tour of the entire factory and a tasting of products before the cooking lesson begins
Ends with a light lunch featuring the desserts and savory pastries made during the class, paired with wine
This 9-hour experience includes round-trip transport in a luxury sedan with an English-speaking chauffeur and a private on-site guide, and guests keep their recipes and a Pastry Chef apron

summaryBullets: Taught by Mrs. Loretta Fanella, former dessert chef at Adria's El Bulli in Roses, Cracco Peck in Milan, and Enoteca Pinchiorri in Florence
Guests dress as a pro pastry chef and tour the working pastry factory before the hands-on lesson
Ends with a light business lunch of savory pastry and the desserts made in class, paired with wine, plus recipes and a pastry chef apron to take home
Includes round-trip transfer to/from Toscana Resort Castelfalfi in a luxe sedan or minivan with an English-speaking chauffeur, plus a dedicated on-site guide

tours.tour: Exclusive Private 046 Savini the Truffle Academy in Tuscany - Truffle Hunting and Cooking Experience with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: A private truffle hunting and cooking masterclass in the Tuscan woods near Pisa, configured with a sedan for guests at Borgo San Felice.
summaryBullets: Guests join an expert truffle hunter on a guided hunt through centuries-old Tuscan woods, searching for scorzone, bianchetto, or fine white truffle depending on season
Back at the rustic farmhouse with fireplace and open kitchen, the Chef leads a mini cooking class on truffle dishes
Lunch features a truffle aperitif, fresh truffle pasta, truffle egg, and truffle dessert, paired with local wines, plus a surprise gift
Includes round-trip transfer to/from Borgo San Felice in a luxe sedan with an English-speaking chauffeur and a dedicated on-site guide, over an 8-hour experience

tours.tour: Exclusive Private 061 San Polo Wine Experience with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: A private 6-hour Brunello di Montalcino wine and food tour at San Polo in Tuscany, a 93-point Wine Spectator wine, built around a rare vertical tasting and barrel access most visitors never get.
summaryBullets: Guided by the winemaker through a vertical tasting of five vintages (2015-2019) of Brunello di Montalcino Podernovi, San Polo's single-vineyard top cru, in a room overlooking Monte Amiata volcano
Exclusive barrel tasting of two future Brunello di Montalcino vintages plus a visit to the underground cellar
Full 5-course Tuscan lunch with three San Polo wines paired, including Rosso di Montalcino DOC and Brunello di Montalcino San Polo DOCG, then a walk through the vineyard
Door-to-door transport in a luxe sedan or minivan with an English-speaking chauffeur, plus a dedicated on-site Ambassador guide throughout

tours.tour: Exclusive Private 073 IL Borro S Ferragamo Wine Experience with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: A private 7-hour tour of Salvatore Ferragamo's organic Tenuta Il Borro estate in Tuscany, pairing fine wine with the family's art collection for a one-of-a-kind day worth booking for wine-and-culture lovers.
summaryBullets: Guided visit through Il Borro's "Vino and Arte" Gallery, with wine-themed works by Mantegna, Picasso, Goya and Warhol tracing the estate's ties to the Medici family and Italy's Savoy royal house
Private vertical tasting, guided by a sommelier, of four old historical vintages from the Ferragamo family's private collection, held in the reserved Sala Mostra
Tour of the organic vineyards and olive groves, the Orto del Borro garden, and the estate's Chianina cattle, chicken coop and sheepfold
Private 4-course "Wine Masterclass" lunch inside the cellar, plus door-to-door transport in a luxe sedan or minivan with an English-speaking chauffeur and a dedicated on-site Ambassador guide

tours.tour: Exclusive Private 076 Castello DAlbola Wine Experience with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: A private full-day wine experience at Tenuta Le Calcinaie in San Gimignano, hosted personally by winemaker Simone Santini and built around a Wine Spectator Top 100 Vernaccia — a strong pick for wine-loving clients who want direct access to a winemaking family plus a proper Tuscan lunch.
summaryBullets: Winemaker Simone Santini and his English-speaking partner personally guide the winery and vineyard visit and pour a 7-wine tasting.
Headline wine is the Vernaccia di San Gimignano, Wine Spectator Top 100, with additional scores of 90-92 points from Robert Parker's Wine Advocate, Vinous, and Wine Enthusiast.

Full multi-course lunch with wine pairings (including a Chianina fillet main and duck liver pâté starter) at a medieval restaurant in San Gimignano's historic center, followed by a 3-hour guided tour of the town, nicknamed the "Manhattan of the Middle Ages" for its tower skyline.

6 hours package includes a private on-site guide/ambassador and round-trip transport in a private luxury sedan with English-speaking chauffeur (pickup arranged from Borgo San Felice); gratuities not included.

tours.tour: Exclusive Private 086 Castello DAlbola Wine Experience with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: A private Brunello di Montalcino wine and food day — "WFTI's Discover Montalcino" — hosted by the estate's own winemaker, featuring a rare barrel tasting of unreleased vintages and a full Tuscan lunch; the Brunello carries a 93-point Wine Spectator score.
summaryBullets: Winemaker-led tour of the winery, underground cellar, and vineyards, with an exclusive barrel tasting of two future Brunello di Montalcino vintages.
Guided tasting of 3 Brunellos plus a Rosso di Montalcino and an aged Brunello, held in a tasting room overlooking the Monte Amiata volcano.
Full 5-course Tuscan lunch paired with San Polo wines (Amphora Vignamasso, Rosso di Montalcino DOC, Brunello di Montalcino San Polo DOCG), plus a post-lunch walk through the vineyard.

6 hours package includes a dedicated ambassador/winemaker host and round-trip transport in a private luxury sedan with English-speaking chauffeur (pickup arranged from Borgo San Felice); gratuities not included.

Guided tasting of 3 Brunellos plus a Rosso di Montalcino and an aged Brunello, held in a tasting room overlooking the Monte Amiata volcano.
Full 5-course Tuscan lunch paired with San Polo wines (Amphora Vignamasso, Rosso di Montalcino DOC, Brunello di Montalcino San Polo DOCG), plus a post-lunch walk through the vineyard.

6 hours package includes a dedicated ambassador/winemaker host and round-trip transport in a private luxury sedan with English-speaking chauffeur (pickup arranged from Villas in Barberino Tavarnelle Area); gratuities not included.

tours.tour: Exclusive Private 087 Castello DAlbola Wine Experience with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: This exclusive private wine experience takes guests through the Best of Tuscany with a Brunello di Montalcino and Bolgheri tour capped by a full Tuscan lunch, making it a memorable half-day escape into wine country.
summaryBullets: Visit the underground cellar and get an exclusive barrel tasting of two future vintages of Brunello di Montalcino, plus a tasting of 3 Montalcino wines and 4 Bolgheri Poggio al Tesoro wines (Wine Spectator Top100 listed) in a tasting room overlooking Monte Amiata, the ancient volcano.
A dedicated Ambassador and winemaker are reserved exclusively for the group the entire time, answering questions on terroir, winemaking, and aging.
Includes round-trip journey in a luxe sedan or minivan with an English-speaking chauffeur, plus an on-site guide once at the estate.
A full Tuscan lunch (at least 5 courses with appetizers and dessert) paired with 3 San Polo wines is included, followed by a guided walk through the vineyards; total duration is 6 hours.

tours.tour: Exclusive Private 088 Castello DAlbola Wine Experience with Sedan - Villas in Montespertoli Area
tours.summaryIntro: A private 7-hour luxury wine tour to Castello D'Albola's estate in Bolgheri on Tuscany's southern coast, featuring a barrel tasting of a Wine Spectator TOP100 wine and a full Tuscan lunch.
summaryBullets: Guests get a complete tour of the cellar, including a preview taste of the Sondraia Bolgheri Superiore straight from the barrique.
The cellar visit also takes in the section for Whites and Rosés, aged in terracotta amphorae in the ancient Etruscan/Roman style.
Tasting includes "Il Seggio" Bolgheri DOC Rosso 2020, "Sondraia" Bolgheri Superiore 2020, and a preview of Poggio al Tesoro "Dedicated to Walter" 2020.

Includes round-trip transport in a luxe sedan or minivan with an English-speaking chauffeur, an on-site Ambassador guide, and a full 5-course Tuscan lunch with wine pairing in the village of Bolgheri.

tours.tour: Exclusive Private 089 Pogio AL Tesoro TV Wine Experience with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: A private full-day Tuscan wine and food journey through Bolgheri and Brunello di Montalcino country, hosted by a family Ambassador with barrel tastings and a full Tuscan lunch built in.
summaryBullets: Barrique-cellar tasting of the estate's Wine Spectator Top 100 listed Bolgheri Poggio al Tesoro, plus 3 Montalcino wines including a single-vineyard Cru and 4 wines from the Tuscan coast estate
Full guided tour of the winery, underground cellar, and vineyards with an Ambassador (family member, sommelier, or chef) dedicated exclusively to the group
Transfer to a selected tavern in the village of Bolgheri for a full Tuscan lunch of at least 5 courses with aperitif, dessert, and wine pairing
Round-trip hotel transport in a private luxe sedan or minivan with English-speaking chauffeur; runs 10 hours, always private with no other guests

tours.tour: Exclusive Private 091 Castello DAlbola Wine Experience with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: A private hands-on Tuscan cooking class near Montalcino paired with a Brunello di Montalcino winery visit, hosted by chef Raffaella Cova and a dedicated Ambassador guide.

Round-trip hotel transport in a private luxe sedan or minivan with English-speaking chauffeur; runs 6 hours, private only with no other guests

tours.tour: Exclusive Private 093 Castello DAlbola Wine Experience with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day private wine day in the heart of Piedmont's Barolo country, built around an ultra-rare vertical tasting and lunch at the only winery-owned three-Michelin-star restaurant in the world.
summaryBullets: Private Ambassador (a Ceretto family member, sommelier, or in-house expert) leads an exclusive tour of the winery at Tenuta Monsordo Bernardina in Alba.
"More than VIP" tasting of 6 old vintages across two verticals of Barolo Bricco Rocche and Barolo Cannubi San Lorenzo, bottlings long sold out everywhere else.
Lunch at the Ceretto family's own three-Michelin-star restaurant in Alba, paired with their Barolo, plus a gift box with a chef-signed menu and Enrico Crippa hazelnut oil.
Includes round-trip hotel transfer in a private sedan with English-speaking chauffeur plus the dedicated on-site Ambassador guide; a 6-hour experience for guests based at Borgo San Felice.
