tours.tour: Exclusive Private 133 Leonardi Vinegar Experience with Sedan - Florence Hotel
tours.summaryIntro: A hands-on day with the Leonardi family at their historic Modena balsamic vinegar farm, tasting vinegar drawn straight from barrels up to 150 years old.
summaryBullets: Meet a member of the Leonardi family as your private Ambassador for a tour of the vineyards, aging rooms, and the Family Balsamic Museum, home to over 3,000 barrels and centenary antiques.
Taste balsamic vinegar aged 50 and 100 years directly from the barrel, plus the family's oldest vinegar, dating back to 1871.
Experience closes with "The Grand Balsamic Vinegar Pairing Lunch," a full meal of local specialties paired with the vinegars.
Includes round-trip hotel transfer in a private sedan with English-speaking chauffeur plus the dedicated on-site Ambassador guide; a 9-hour experience for guests at the Florence Hotel.

tours.tour: Exclusive Private 134 Marchi Vinegar Experience with Sedan - Florence Hotel
tours.summaryIntro: A private, hands-on visit to the Marchi family's balsamic vinegar estate near Modena, in operation since 1910, where guests draw their own vinegar straight from the barrel.
summaryBullets: Personally guided by Massimiliano Marchi through the Acetaia founded in 1910 and a Family Archive area normally closed to the public.
Guests collect a sample of Traditional Balsamic Vinegar directly from the family's oldest barrels, on the private property of Mr. Maurizio Marchi Senior.

Tasting of the estate's best vinegars plus exclusive Reserves from the "historical archive," followed by a tailor-made lunch built around balsamic vinegar and paired with a Wine Spectator Top 100 wine.
Includes round-trip hotel transfer in a private sedan with English-speaking chauffeur plus the dedicated on-site Ambassador guide; a 9-hour experience for guests at the Florence Hotel.

tours.tour: Exclusive Private 135 Chiarli Lambrusco Wine Experience with Sedan - Florence Hotel
tours.summaryIntro: A private tour and tasting at Cleto Chiarli, the century-and-a-half-old winery behind the only sparkling red lambrusco ever to make Wine Spectator's Top 100, set in Italy's "Motor Valley" near the Ferrari, Lamborghini, Maserati and Pagani factories.
summaryBullets: Private Ambassador guides the cellar and vineyard tour and tells the story of the Chiarli family's winemaking history and awards.
Aperitif of Spumante served with savory pies and Parmigiano Reggiano.
Full lunch of traditional Emilia-Romagna cuisine, wine-paired with Chiarli's award-winning wines.
Includes round-trip hotel transfer in a private sedan with English-speaking chauffeur plus the dedicated on-site Ambassador guide; a 7-hour experience for guests at the Florence Hotel.

tours.tour: Exclusive Private 136 Leonardi Balsamic Vinegar Experience with Sedan - Florence Hotel
tours.summaryIntro: A private visit to the Leonardi family's historic balsamic vinegar farm near Modena, guided by expert Ambassadors through the aging rooms and family museum.
summaryBullets: Guided visit of the Aging Rooms (home to over 3,000 barrels) and the Family Balsamic Museum, filled with antiques and centenary barrels.
Tasting of special reserves of aged balsamic vinegar, plus a visit to the on-site Balsamic store.
Experience closes with "The Grand Balsamic Vinegar Pairing Lunch," a full meal of local specialties paired with the vinegars.
Includes round-trip hotel transfer in a private sedan with English-speaking chauffeur plus the dedicated on-site Ambassador guide; a 7-hour experience for guests at the Florence Hotel.

tours.tour: Exclusive Private 139 Querceto Castle Wine Experience with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: A private day at Castello di Querceto, a noble Chianti estate of French origin, combining a Marquis's private residence with a vertical tasting of a Wine Spectator Top 100 Chianti Classico Riserva.
summaryBullets: Tour includes the Marquis's private residence, Chapel, and Italian Garden, plus the winery's 1,100 A.D. underground cellars, once the estate armory, where century-old bottles are archived.
Aperitif of two Tuscan-made sparkling wines with finger food atop the castle tower, overlooking views to Florence and the Chianti vineyards.
Professional vertical tasting of the Wine Spectator Top 100 Chianti Classico Riserva across vintages 1978, 1999, and 2016.

Includes round-trip hotel transfer in a private sedan with English-speaking chauffeur plus the dedicated on-site Ambassador guide, plus a classic Tuscan country-style lunch at a trattoria in the Castle's vineyards paired with the Riserva; a 5-hour experience for guests based at Borgo San Felice.

tours.summaryIntro: A private full-day wine experience at Castello di Querceto in Chianti, worth booking for its rare vertical tasting of a Wine Spectator Top 100 Chianti Classico Riserva paired with a Tuscan country lunch among the vineyards.
summaryBullets: Guided tour of Castello di Querceto's private Marquis residence, Chapel, Italian Garden, and the 1,100 A.D. cellars (once the castle's armory), which hold bottles over a century old

tours.tour: Exclusive Private 140 Tricherchi Wines Wine Experience with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: A private wine day built around Castello Tricerchi's organic Brunello di Montalcino, notable because guests are hosted personally by owner Mr. Tommaso Squarcia inside a 13th-century pilgrim castle on the Via Francigena.
summaryBullets: Tour the Tricerchi Castle (built in the 1200s, completed in 1441, officially recognized in 1982 as part of Italy's historical and artistic heritage), including the Chapel of the Virgin of the Veil and its ancient medieval cellars
Brunello tasting held in the castle's historic guard room, paired with the estate's own Extra Virgin Olive Oil, charcuterie, and Pecorino (sheep milk) cheese
Tailor-made wine-pairing lunch in a panoramic restaurant atop the hill beside the Castle, on a "Tuscan but creative" menu paired with Castello Tricerchi wines
6-hour private excursion by luxe sedan includes an English-speaking chauffeured transfer from Borgo San Felice and a welcome meeting with private Ambassador Mr. Tommaso Squarcia, the owner

Tailor-made wine-pairing lunch in a panoramic restaurant atop the hill beside the Castle, on a "Tuscan but creative" menu paired with Castello Tricerchi wines
9-hour private excursion by luxe sedan includes an English-speaking chauffeured transfer from the San Miniato Area and a welcome meeting with private Ambassador Mr. Tommaso Squarcia, the owner

tours.tour: Exclusive Private 141 Campo Sughera Wine Experience with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: A private Bolgheri wine experience at Campo alla Sughera, appealing for its exclusive access to the estate and the chance that the winemaker personally hosts the tasting.
summaryBullets: Welcome toast of Arioso Vermentino under the pergola, followed by a guided tour of the main vineyard and the barrel cellar, which is not normally open to the public

Guided tasting of four estate wines: Anima di Arnione 2021 Merlot poured directly from the terracotta amphora, Anima Arnione 2019 Cabernet Sauvignon Limited Edition, Arnione Bolgheri Superiore 2019, and Campo alla Sughera Supertuscan 2019
Transfer to the village of Bolgheri for a 3-course VIP wine-pairing lunch at a traditional restaurant selected by the Knauf family

6-hour private excursion by luxe sedan includes an English-speaking chauffeured transfer from Borgo San Felice and exclusive use of the winery's spaces, with the winemaker present when the production schedule allows

tours.tour: Exclusive Private 141 Campo Sughera Wine Experience with Sedan - Florence Hotel
tours.summaryIntro: A fully private day at the Campo Sughera estate in Bolgheri pairing an insider vineyard and cellar tour with a wine-paired lunch, with round-trip sedan transfer from the Florence Hotel.
summaryBullets: A private Ambassador host welcomes you with a glass of Arioso Vermentino under the pergola, then leads a guided tour of the vineyard, cellar, and barrel cellar not normally open to the public.

Tasting lineup includes Anima di Arnione 2021 Merlot poured straight from the terracotta amphora, Anima Arnione 2019 Cabernet Sauvignon Limited Edition, Arnione Bolgheri Superiore 2019, and Campo alla Sughera Supertuscan 2019.
Transfer to the village of Bolgheri for a VIP wine-paired 3-course lunch (starter, main, dessert) at a traditional restaurant chosen by the Knauf family.

Includes round-trip sedan transport with an English-speaking chauffeur and a dedicated on-site Ambassador guide; 8-hour experience from this hotel; gratuities and under-18 alcohol portions are not included.

tours.tour: Exclusive Private 142 Florence Ice Cream Class Experience with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: A hands-on Florentine gelato-making class tracing the dessert's invention to the Medici court, with round-trip sedan transfer from Borgo San Felice.
summaryBullets: Learn to make the classic Buontalenti Cream ice cream, Cantucci almond cookies, Vin Santo cream, and Zuccotto gelato Fiorentino (nicknamed "l'Elmo di Caterina," created for Queen Caterina de' Medici) at a cooking school run by chefs Bendetta Vitali, Giorgio Pinto, and Meri.
Get a short history lesson on gelato's Renaissance origins (invented by architect Bernardo Buontalenti) plus hands-on training so you can spot real artisanal gelato versus "fakes."
Kitchen staff prepare a full Tuscan lunch paired with Wine Spectator Top 100 wines while you're in class.

Includes round-trip sedan transport with an English-speaking chauffeur, welcome aperitif-coffee, all four cooking classes, and the wine-paired lunch; 8-hour experience from this hotel; gratuities not included.

Includes round-trip sedan transport with an English-speaking chauffeur, welcome aperitif-coffee, all four cooking classes, and the wine-paired lunch; 7-hour experience from this hotel; gratuities not included.

tours.tour: Exclusive Private 142 Florence Ice Cream Class Experience with Sedan - Florence Hotel
tours.summaryIntro: A hands-on Florentine gelato-making class tracing the dessert's invention to the Medici court, with round-trip sedan transfer from a Florence hotel.
summaryBullets: Learn to make the classic Buontalenti Cream ice cream, Cantucci almond cookies, Vin Santo cream, and Zuccotto gelato Fiorentino (nicknamed "l'Elmo di Caterina," created for Queen Caterina de' Medici) at a cooking school run by chefs Bendetta Vitali, Giorgio Pinto, and Meri.
Get a short history lesson on gelato's Renaissance origins (invented by architect Bernardo Buontalenti) plus hands-on training so you can spot real artisanal gelato versus "fakes."

tours.summaryIntro: A hands-on Florentine gelato-making class tracing the dessert's invention to the Medici court, with round-trip sedan transfer from villas in the Regello area.
summaryBullets: Learn to make the classic Buontalenti Cream ice cream, Cantucci almond cookies, Vin Santo cream, and Zuccotto gelato Fiorentino (nicknamed "l'Elmo di Caterina," created for Queen Caterina de' Medici) at a cooking school run by chefs Bendetta Vitali, Giorgio Pinto, and Meri.

Includes round-trip sedan transport with an English-speaking chauffeur, welcome aperitif-coffee, all four cooking classes, and the wine-paired lunch; 6-hour experience from this area; gratuities not included.

tours.tour: Florence - Afternoon Cooking Class in Florence with Escort(#29)
tours.summaryIntro: A private afternoon cooking class in Florence where guests prepare their own four-course Tuscan dinner under a professional chef's supervision.
summaryBullets: Prepare a four-course menu using seasonal products and learn to make fresh handmade pasta.
Midway through class, take a break with a glass of sparkling wine and a Tuscan products tasting.
After the lesson, relax and dine on the dishes you just prepared, paired with a good-quality wine selection.
Includes roundtrip transportation, driver, cook, and a private English-speaking escort, with the meal and regional wines included; 4-hour experience departing around 4:00pm.

tours.tour: Florence - Art and Science with Guide (#4) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A Florence culture tour tracing the Medici family's patronage of art and science, with round-trip sedan transfer, departing at 9:00am.
summaryBullets: Visit the Opificio delle Pietre Dure, a Renaissance workshop founded under the Medici Grand Dukes for artistic work in semiprecious stones like lapis, mother of pearl, slate, jade, and seashells, viewable at its modern conservation centre.
See the Institute and Museum of the History of Science dedicated to Galileo, home to an important collection of scientific instruments including tools Galileo Galilei used himself.
Close the tour at Galileo's funeral monument in the Santa Croce Church, one of Florence's largest churches.
Includes transportation, driver, entrance tickets to the Opificio delle Pietre Dure, the Museum of the History of Sciences, and Galileo's tomb, plus a private English-speaking guide; 3-hour tour.

tours.tour: Florence - Brunello Winery Tour with Escort (#30) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A day trip by sedan into Montalcino wine country to taste Brunello, widely regarded by many as one of the world's best wines.
summaryBullets: Visit the town of Montalcino with its century-old fortress and the Abbey of St. Antimo.
Stop at some of the region's best wineries to sample prestigious Brunello wines made from Sangiovese grapes (tasting fees vary by winery and are paid locally in Euros).
Shop for local products and crafts in the area.
Includes transportation, driver, and a private English-speaking escort; 8-hour tour departing at 9:00am.

tours.tour: Florence - CHIANTI TOUR BY MERCEDES E AND DRIVER AND GUIDE
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day Chianti countryside tour by Mercedes sedan with a driver/guide, passing through the region's most prestigious vineyards and historic villages.
summaryBullets: Stop in the village of San Donato, then drive to the church of San Leolino and the village of Panzano through the heart of the Chianti vineyards.
Visit the towns of Greve and Montefioralle, whose 12th-century streets have seen little change.
Walk dirt roads amid the vineyards to the 10th-century Romanesque church of San Cresci before being driven back to your hotel.
Includes a driver/guide (a Licensed Tour Conductor) and car; wine tasting and regional cuisine are available but not included in the price; 8-hour tour with departure time based on request.

tours.tour: Florence - Cinque Terre with Escort (#13) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A sedan day trip to the Cinque Terre, the UNESCO-protected string of five cliffside villages along Liguria's coast.
summaryBullets: Visit Monterosso al Mare, Vernazza, Corniglia, Manarola, and Riomaggiore, a national park since 1999 and UNESCO site since 1997, historically reachable only by sea.

Discover 3 of the villages, traveling between them by ferry or train (tickets not included) along the ancient "Sentiero Azzurro" coastal path with its panoramic views of terraced vineyards and the sea.
Stop for lunch in one of the villages (meal not included) with time to shop and stroll.
Includes transportation, driver, and an English-speaking escort; ferry and train tickets not included; 10-hour tour departing at 9:00am.

tours.tour: Florence - Cinque terre by private yacht
tours.duration: 12 hours (approx. 5 hrs. travel time + 7 hrs. cruise)
tours.summaryIntro: A private yacht excursion to the Cinque Terre, viewing the cliffside villages from the water with a swim break built in.
summaryBullets: Admire the colored buildings and fortresses on the rocks of Manarola, Riomaggiore, and Monterosso from a private yacht for a different vantage point than the usual land tour.
Stop at Vernazza to see its spectacular seaside church and stroll its cheerful streets.
During the cruise, take a dive into the sea to refresh, snorkel, or simply sunbathe on the prow.

Includes round-trip car transportation, the private yacht, an aperitif on board, an English-speaking skipper, and lunch (appetizer, first course, and a side dish); 12-hour outing (about 5 hours travel plus 7 hours cruise), departing 7:30am, offered May through September.

tours.tour: Florence - Florence Jewish Tour with Guide (#9) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A sedan tour of Jewish Florence, tracing a history that dates back to the 15th century through synagogues, landmarks, and Renaissance masterpieces.
summaryBullets: Visit the Synagogue and Jewish Museum of Florence, built in 1882 in a monumental Byzantine style with Moorish influence, featuring lacy wood and bronze carvings, inlaid marble floors, mosaics, and stained glass.
See Jewish historical connections at famous Florence landmarks, including the Baptistery's Golden Doors, Piazzale della Repubblica, Ponte Vecchio, and Piazzale della Signoria.
Tour the Accademia to see Michelangelo's David, described on this tour as a famous statue of a Jewish Biblical figure.

Includes transportation, driver, entrance tickets to the Synagogue and the Accademia Gallery, and a private English-speaking guide; 4-hour tour, with pickup time (morning or afternoon) arranged based on ticket availability.

tours.tour: Florence - Florence Shopping Outlets with Escort (#22b) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A sedan shopping outing combining a fashion outlet run south of Florence with free time back in the city center, escorted throughout.
summaryBullets: Visit "the Mall," a fashion outlet in the Chianti region south of Florence, with elegant shops and well-known branded stores.
Optionally have lunch at the Gucci Café Restaurant at the outlet (meal not included).
In the afternoon, drive back to Florence's historical center, where your private escort assists with purchases or helps you discover the city's piazzas, avenues, or churches.
Includes transportation, driver, and an English-speaking escort; 7-hour outing with departure time based on request.

tours.tour: Florence - Florence Shopping Tour with Escort (#19) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: An escorted shopping tour that puts guests minutes away from Florence's top fashion houses and artisan workshops.
summaryBullets: Just a short drive to Gucci, Prada, Armani, Ferragamo, and Fendi, plus traditional Florentine "bottega" handicraft shops.
3-hour tour with pick up from the guest's hotel in Florence.
Includes transportation, driver, and an English-speaking escort.
Pick-up time between 12:00pm and 1:30pm is not suggested.

tours.tour: Florence - Half Day Tour with Accademia Gallery with Guide (#2) by MPV by 3
tours.summaryIntro: A half-day Florence tour pairing sweeping city views with Michelangelo's David at the Accademia Gallery.
summaryBullets: Stop at Piazzale Michelangelo for panoramic views, then exterior views of the Duomo, Giotto's Bell Tower, and the Baptistry's bronze doors.
Visit the Accademia Gallery to see Michelangelo's David, the four unfinished Prisoners, and St. Matthew.
Also features a collection of Gothic and Renaissance paintings once in the Medici collections.
Includes transportation, driver, Accademia Gallery entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide; 3-hour duration.

tours.tour: Florence - Half Day Tour with Accademia Gallery with Guide (#2) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A half-day Florence tour pairing sweeping city views with Michelangelo's David at the Accademia Gallery.
summaryBullets: Stop at Piazzale Michelangelo for panoramic views, then exterior views of the Duomo, Giotto's Bell Tower, and the Baptistry's bronze doors.
Visit the Accademia Gallery to see Michelangelo's David, the four unfinished Prisoners, and St. Matthew.
Also features a collection of Gothic and Renaissance paintings once in the Medici collections.
Includes transportation, driver, Accademia Gallery entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide; 3-hour duration.

tours.tour: Florence - Half Day Tour with Uffizi Gallery with Guide (#3) by MPV by 3
tours.summaryIntro: A half-day Florence tour centered on the Uffizi Gallery, one of the world's most famous art museums.
summaryBullets: Stop at Piazzale Michelangelo, then see the exterior of Santa Croce Church and visit Piazzale della Signoria.
Explore the Uffizi's Primitive and Renaissance masterpieces, including works by Giotto, Piero della Francesca, Filippo Lippi, and Leonardo da Vinci.
Includes transportation, driver, Uffizi Gallery entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide; 3-hour duration.

tours.tour: Florence - Half Day Tour with Uffizi Gallery with Guide (#3) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A half-day Florence tour centered on the Uffizi Gallery, one of the world's most famous art museums.
summaryBullets: Stop at Piazzale Michelangelo, then see the exterior of Santa Croce Church and visit Piazzale della Signoria.
Explore the Uffizi's Primitive and Renaissance masterpieces, including works by Giotto, Piero della Francesca, Filippo Lippi, and Leonardo da Vinci.
Includes transportation, driver, Uffizi Gallery entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide; 3-hour duration.

tours.tour: Florence - Highlights of Florence and Pisa with Guide (#27b) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day combination tour covering Florence's essential monuments and galleries plus the university town of Pisa.
summaryBullets: View Florence from Piazzale Michelangelo, then see the 14th-century Ponte Vecchio and visit the Uffizi Gallery (Giotto, Botticelli, Raphael, Da Vinci, Michelangelo).
Pause at Palazzo Vecchio and see Cellini's Perseus under the Loggia dei Lanzi, then visit the Accademia Gallery to see Michelangelo's David.
See the Piazza del Duomo with its 15th-century cathedral.
8-hour tour including transportation, driver, Uffizi and Accademia entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide (3 hours in Florence, 2 hours in Pisa).

tours.tour: Florence - Medicis Florence Tour with Guide(#5) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A tour tracing the Medici family's rise to power and their lasting mark on Renaissance Florence.
summaryBullets: Visit Palazzo Medici Riccardi, the Medici family home for 100 years starting in 1444, now government offices.
See the Chapel of the Magi, decorated by Benozzo Gozzoli with The Procession of the Magi depicting Medici family members.
3-hour tour including transportation, driver, Palazzo Medici entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide.

tours.tour: Florence - Medieval Atmosphere of S Gimignano Volterra and Monteriggioni with Guide (#10) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A scenic Tuscan countryside excursion linking three distinct medieval towns.
summaryBullets: Drive through Tuscan countryside covered with vineyards and olive groves to reach San Gimignano.
Continue (30 minutes) to Volterra, the Etruscan town on a rocky plateau protected by medieval ramparts.
Includes a stop at Monteriggioni Castle (exterior only), one of the most powerful castles of the Italian Middle Ages.
10-hour tour including transportation, driver, and a private English-speaking guide on site.

tours.tour: Florence - Michelangelo with Guide (#1) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A tour dedicated to Michelangelo's life and work across Florence's most significant sites.
summaryBullets: Exterior visit of Basilica di Santa Croce, once Michelangelo's home and now his tomb.
See the unfinished "Pieta" at the Opera del Duomo.
Visit the Medici Chapels and New Sacristy of San Lorenzo, where Michelangelo carved the Medici tombs with the reclining figures of Dawn, Dusk, Night, and Day.
6-hour tour including transportation, driver, entrance tickets to the Duomo complex, Santa Croce Church, Medici Chapels, and San Lorenzo Church, plus a private English-speaking guide.

tours.tour: Florence - Morning Cooking Class in Florence with Escort(#29)
tours.summaryIntro: A hands-on morning cooking class that starts at Florence's central market and ends with a homemade Tuscan meal.
summaryBullets: Visit the central market to learn about Italian shopping and food traditions, then shop for fresh ingredients.
Prepare a four-course Tuscan lunch, including fresh handmade pasta, supervised by a professional chef.
Enjoy a break with sparkling wine and a Tuscan products tasting, then dine on the dishes you prepared.
4.5-hour experience departing at 9:00am with hotel pick-up in Florence.

tours.tour: Florence - Night Walking Tour (33) by sedan and guide
tours.summaryIntro: An evening walking tour that shows off Florence's lit-up landmarks without the daytime crowds.
summaryBullets: Walk among the city's Renaissance highlights in the relaxed atmosphere of the evening.
Take photos of the illuminated Dome and Ponte Vecchio without the daytime crowds.
3-hour tour departing 7:00pm (Nov-Mar) or 8:00pm (Apr-Oct).
Includes transportation, driver, and a private English-speaking guide.

tours.tour: Florence - Off Road adventure to the Chianti with local escort
tours.summaryIntro: An off-road adventure into remote corners of the Chianti countryside, paired with a homemade lunch.
summaryBullets: Explore woods, meadows, lakes, and hidden vineyards reachable only by mule tracks, by 4x4.
Enjoy a full homemade lunch paired with typical Chianti wines, plus a wine tasting.
8-hour experience departing 8:45am, with the off-road excursion itself starting at 10:00am (2 hours, plus tasting and lunch).
Includes transportation, driver, local English-speaking escort, lunch, and wine tasting fees.

tours.tour: Florence - PIENZA AND MONTEPULCIANO AND MONTALCINO BY MERCEDES E AND DRIVER AND GUIDE
tours.summaryIntro: A Tuscan hill-town tour through Montalcino, Pienza, and Montepulciano, rich in medieval and religious history.
summaryBullets: Visit the Abbey of St. Antimo in Montalcino, renowned for its Gregorian Chants.
See Pienza's hilltop views and the Corso Rosellino, with optional entry to the private apartments of Palazzo Piccolomini (tickets bought on site).
Visit the churches of Sant'Agnese and Santa Maria dei Servi in Montepulciano.
9-hour tour including a driver/guide (a Licensed Tour Conductor) and car.

tours.tour: Florence - PISA AND LUCCA BY MERCEDES E AND DRIVER AND GUIDE
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day tour through Pisa and Lucca showcasing Tuscany's Renaissance architecture.
summaryBullets: See Pisa's Piazza dei Miracoli, including the famous Leaning Tower (tickets not included), marble Baptistery, and interior of the Duomo.
Walk Lucca's old city walls, gates, and ramparts for panoramic views of the town.
Visit the oval Piazza dell'Anfiteatro, the tree-topped Giunigi Tower with its hanging gardens, and the Cathedral of St. Martin.
8-hour tour including a driver/guide and car.

tours.tour: Florence - Pisa with Guide (#11) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A guided excursion to Pisa, home to the celebrated Leaning Tower and a historic university.
summaryBullets: Visit Piazza dei Cavalieri, site of the Scuola Normale, one of the world's most famous universities.
See the Leaning Tower, the Duomo, and the Baptistery at Piazza dei Miracoli.
6-hour tour including transportation, driver, entrance tickets to the Duomo, Baptistry, Leaning Tower, and Cemetery, plus a private English-speaking guide for 3 hours in Pisa.

tours.tour: Florence - Pitti Palace and Boboli Gardens with Guide (#7) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A guided visit to Pitti Palace and the Boboli Gardens, two of Florence's most storied sights.
summaryBullets: See spectacular paintings by Camille Corot depicting Florence at Pitti Palace.
Walk the Boboli Gardens between Pitti Palace and the Belvedere Fort, said to be among the most beautiful gardens in Italy.
Stop at an 18th-century coffeehouse and the Neptune Fountain, with panoramic views of Florence.
3-hour tour departing 12:00pm, including transportation, driver, entrance tickets, and a private guide.

tours.tour: Florence - Religious Heart of Florence with Guide (#8) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A tour of Florence's three main churches, symbols of Faith and Wealth in the city's history.
summaryBullets: Visit Basilica di Santa Croce, with its funerary monuments and Cimabue's crucifixion restored after the 1966 flood.
See the exterior of the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore and its famous Dome, one of the largest Catholic churches in the world.
Visit Basilica di Santa Maria Novella, home to the Holy Trinity by Masaccio, the Crucifixion by Giotto, and choir frescoes by Ghirlandaio.
3-hour tour departing 10:00am or 2:00pm, including transportation, driver, entrance tickets to Santa Croce and Santa Maria Novella, and a private English-speaking guide.

tours.tour: Florence - Rome Day Trip with Guide (#31a) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day trip from Florence to Rome covering the city's most iconic landmarks.
summaryBullets: Drive down Via Sistina to see the Spanish Steps, then view the Roman Forum from Capitoline Hill.
Visit the Pantheon and Piazza Venezia (Monument to the first king of Italy, Mussolini's balcony), the Trevi Fountain, and the Colosseum.
Stop for lunch on the Appian Way or at a city cafe (meal not included).
12-hour tour including transportation, driver, Colosseum entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide for 6 hours in Rome.

tours.tour: Florence - SIENA AND ASSISI BY MERCEDES E AND DRIVER AND GUIDE
tours.summaryIntro: A day trip pairing the walled medieval city of Siena with the historic pilgrimage town of Assisi.
summaryBullets: Stroll Siena's Palazzo del Campo, Palazzo Pubblico, the Duomo & Cathedral, and St. Catherine's Sanctuary.
Visit Assisi's Basilica of St. Francis, with its impressive collection of frescoes, and the Basilica of St. Maria degli Angeli, where St. Francis lived and died.
Lunch stop in a local restaurant (meal not included).
8-hour tour including a driver/guide (a Licensed Tour Conductor) and car.

tours.tour: Florence - SIENA AND ASSISI BY MERCEDES E AND DRIVER AND GUIDE
tours.summaryIntro: A day trip pairing the walled medieval city of Siena with the historic pilgrimage town of Assisi.
summaryBullets: Stroll Siena's Palazzo del Campo, Palazzo Pubblico, the Duomo & Cathedral, and St. Catherine's Sanctuary.
Visit Assisi's Basilica of St. Francis, with its impressive collection of frescoes, and the Basilica of St. Maria degli Angeli, where St. Francis lived and died.
Lunch stop in a local restaurant (meal not included).
10-hour tour including a driver/guide (a Licensed Tour Conductor) and car.

tours.tour: Florence - SIENA AND SAN GIMIGNANO BY MERCEDES E AND DRIVER AND GUIDE
tours.summaryIntro: A day trip combining the walled city of Siena with the UNESCO-listed towers of San Gimignano.
summaryBullets: Stroll Siena's Palazzo del Campo, Palazzo Pubblico, the Duomo & Cathedral, and St. Catherine's Sanctuary.
Visit San Gimignano, a UNESCO World Heritage site ringed by three sets of historic walls, known for its skyline of medieval towers.
See Torre Grossa, the Collegiata, and the church of Sant'Angelo in San Gimignano; lunch stop in a local restaurant (meal not included).
8-hour tour including a driver/guide (a Licensed Tour Conductor) and car.

tours.tour: Florence - Siena with Guide (#12) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A guided drive through the Chianti countryside into the medieval streets of Siena.
summaryBullets: Pass vineyards and olive trees through the Chianti hills en route to Siena.
Visit Siena's Cathedral, including the Libreria Piccolomini and the adjacent Museo dell'Opera Metropolitana, and stroll the Piazza del Campo.
On the return, view the medieval walled town of Monteriggioni, its fortifications intact after eight centuries.
6-hour tour including transportation, driver, Cathedral entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide for 3 hours in Siena.

tours.tour: Florence - Souvenir of Florence with Guide (#6) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A panoramic sightseeing drive covering Florence's most famous landmarks from the outside.
summaryBullets: Drive the Viale dei Colli up to Piazzale Michelangelo for a panoramic view of the city.
Pass the Duomo, Baptistery, Giotto's Belltower, Piazza della Signoria, and the shop-lined Ponte Vecchio.
This is a panoramic tour and does not include any inside visits.
3-hour tour including transportation, driver, and a private English-speaking guide.

tours.tour: Florence - Symbols and Legends with Guide (#15) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A storytelling tour uncovering the heraldic symbols and legends hidden throughout Florence.
summaryBullets: See the heraldic symbols of Florence's patrician families on building facades: the Medicis' balls, the Pazzis' dolphins, and the Strozzis' moons.
Learn the stories and legends behind the city's past while getting a feel for its modern layout.
3-hour tour including transportation, driver, and a private English-speaking guide.
Pick-up between 12:00pm and 1:30pm is not suggested.

tours.tour: Florence - Truffle Hunting and Lunch experience in San Miniato by sedan and guide
tours.summaryIntro: A hands-on truffle hunting excursion in San Miniato, followed by a truffle-based lunch.
summaryBullets: Join an expert truffle hunter (and dog) in the woods, learning the tradition's history and how to tell a good truffle from an inferior or fake one.
Enjoy a truffle-based lunch, then have free time to visit the city of San Miniato.
10-hour experience departing 9:30am.
Includes transportation, driver, truffle hunting with an expert and dog, lunch, and an English-speaking escort.

tours.tour: Florence - Uffizi and Palazzo Vecchio with Guide (#16) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A guided visit combining the Uffizi Gallery's masterpieces with rarely accessible rooms of Palazzo Vecchio.
summaryBullets: Tour the Uffizi Gallery, built by Giorgio Vasari (1560-1580), featuring works by Botticelli, Michelangelo, Leonardo da Vinci, Raffaello, Giotto, Cimabue, and Masaccio.

Visit Palazzo Vecchio's special rooms — the Stairway of the Duke of Athens, Studiolo of Francesco I, Tesoretto di Cosimo I, and the trusses of the Salone dei Cinquecento ceiling — open to small groups of up to 12 with an expert guide since 2000.
4-hour tour including transportation, driver, Uffizi Gallery and Palazzo Vecchio entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide.

tours.tour: Florence - Volterra with Guide (#14) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A guided visit to Volterra, the Etruscan hill town known for its ancient ruins and as a "New Moon" film setting.
summaryBullets: See the archaeological ruins and ancient palazzi of Volterra, once a center of the cremation rite in ancient times.
Visit the Etruscan Guarnacci Museum, home to a display of over 600 funerary urns.
At noon, hear the midday bell toll from Piazza dei Priori under the Bell Tower; visit to the Museum of Torture is optional.
6-hour tour departing 8:30am or 1:00pm, including transportation, driver, Etruscan Museum entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide for 3 hours in Volterra.

tours.tour: Florence Duomo (#17) by Sedan and guide
tours.summaryIntro: A focused visit to Florence's iconic Duomo, the third-largest church in the world.
summaryBullets: See the medieval cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore, faced in white, pink, and green marble, alongside Giotto's belltower.
View the Brunelleschi Dome, decorated inside with a monumental fresco by Vasari and Zuccari.
Visit the Baptistry to see its portal stories and the gold-mosaic Final Judgement.
3-hour tour including transportation, driver, non-refundable Duomo and Baptistry entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide.

tours.tour: Florence Highlights Walking Tour (#21) with Guide
tours.summaryIntro: This 6-hour walking tour packs in three of Florence's must-see art landmarks with a private guide, ideal for clients who want the city's Renaissance highlights in one outing.
summaryBullets: Inside visit of the Basilica of Santa Maria Novella
Accademia Gallery visit to see Michelangelo's David, the four unfinished Prisoners, St. Matthew, and Gothic/Renaissance paintings once in the Medici collections
Uffizi Gallery visit featuring works by Giotto, Piero della Francesca, Filippo Lippi, and Leonardo da Vinci
Includes entrance tickets to Santa Maria Novella, Accademia, and Uffizi, plus a private English-speaking guide

tours.tour: Florence Jewish Tour with Guide (#9) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A specialized 6-hour tour tracing Florence's Jewish history back to the 15th century, giving clients a distinct angle on the city beyond the usual Renaissance stops.
summaryBullets: Visit the Synagogue and Jewish Museum of Florence, built in 1882 in a Byzantine style with Moorish influence, with interior lacy wood/bronze carvings, inlaid marble floors, and stained glass
See Jewish history landmarks including the Baptistery's Golden Doors, Piazzale della Repubblica, Ponte Vecchio, and Piazzale della Signoria
Tour inside the Accademia to see Michelangelo's David
Includes transportation, driver, non-refundable entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide in Florence (3 hours)

tours.tour: Fragrance masterclass by sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A hands-on perfume-making class in an atmospheric Florence workshop dating back to the 18th century, appealing to clients wanting a unique, take-home experience.
summaryBullets: Held in a historic lab that once mixed medical care with the healing properties of herbs, flowers, and fruits, tracing back to Caterina de' Medici and her master perfumer Renato Bianco
A Master guides participants through creating their own unique, personal fragrance
Participants take home a 50ml perfume bottle (or 100ml reed diffuser), the formula they created, and a certificate of attendance
Includes transportation, driver, the fragrance workshop, and a coffee break with complimentary coffee, tea, and/or soft drinks

tours.tour: Half Day Tour with Accademia Gallery with Guide (#2) by MPV by 3
tours.summaryIntro: This half-day tour combines a panoramic overlook of Florence with entry to the gallery holding Michelangelo's David, a strong pick for first-time visitors short on time.
summaryBullets: Drive up to Piazzale Michelangelo for panoramic views over the city of Florence
See the exterior of the Basilica of Santa Maria del Fiore, Giotto's Bell Tower, and the Baptistry with its famous bronze doors
Visit the Accademia Gallery to see Michelangelo's David, the four unfinished Prisoners, St. Matthew, and Gothic/Renaissance paintings once in the Medici collections
Includes transportation, driver, non-refundable entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide in Florence (3 hours)

tours.tour: Half Day Tour with Accademia Gallery with Guide (#2) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: This half-day tour combines a panoramic overlook of Florence with entry to the gallery holding Michelangelo's David, a strong pick for first-time visitors short on time.
summaryBullets: Drive up to Piazzale Michelangelo for panoramic views over the city of Florence
See the exterior of the Basilica of Santa Maria del Fiore, Giotto's Bell Tower, and the Baptistry with its famous bronze doors
Visit the Accademia Gallery to see Michelangelo's David, the four unfinished Prisoners, St. Matthew, and Gothic/Renaissance paintings once in the Medici collections
Includes transportation, driver, non-refundable entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide in Florence (3 hours)

tours.tour: Half Day Tour with Uffizi Gallery with Guide (#3) by MPV by 3
tours.summaryIntro: This half-day tour pairs a panoramic city overlook with the Uffizi Gallery, one of the world's most famous museums, ideal for clients focused on Renaissance masterpieces.
summaryBullets: Drive up to Piazzale Michelangelo for panoramic views over the city of Florence
See the exterior of the Franciscan Church of Santa Croce and visit Piazzale della Signoria
Explore the Uffizi Gallery, with works by Giotto, Piero della Francesca, Filippo Lippi, and Leonardo da Vinci
Includes transportation, driver, non-refundable entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide in Florence (3 hours)

tours.tour: Half Day Tour with Uffizi Gallery with Guide (#3) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: This half-day tour pairs a panoramic city overlook with the Uffizi Gallery, one of the world's most famous museums, ideal for clients focused on Renaissance masterpieces.
summaryBullets: Drive up to Piazzale Michelangelo for panoramic views over the city of Florence
See the exterior of the Franciscan Church of Santa Croce and visit Piazzale della Signoria
Explore the Uffizi Gallery, with works by Giotto, Piero della Francesca, Filippo Lippi, and Leonardo da Vinci
Includes transportation, driver, non-refundable entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide in Florence (3 hours)

tours.tour: Highlights of Florence and Pisa with Guide by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: This full-day tour combines Florence's top art and monuments with a stop in the university town of Pisa, a good option for clients who want both cities covered in one trip.
summaryBullets: Panoramic pause at Piazzale Michelangelo overlooking Florence and the countryside
See the 14th-century Ponte Vecchio, visit the Uffizi Gallery (works by Giotto, Botticelli, Raphael, Da Vinci, Michelangelo), and pass Palazzo Vecchio and Cellini's Perseus under the Loggia dei Lanzi
Visit the Accademia Gallery, home to Michelangelo's David, and see the Piazza del Duomo with its early 15th-century cathedral

Includes transportation, driver, entrance tickets to the Uffizi and Accademia Gallery, and a private English-speaking guide in Florence (3 hours) and Pisa (2 hours); total duration 8 hours (5 hrs tour + 3 hrs transfer)

tours.tour: Liquer Tasting private experience in Emilio BORSI Liquori 010 with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: A private 7-hour visit to an artisan liqueur distillery near Borgo San Felice, appealing to clients who want an authentic, small-batch craft experience paired with a Tuscan meal.
summaryBullets: Visit the "Emilio Borsi Liquori" distillery, in operation since the 1800s, known for its Cinchona Digestive Elixir China Calisaja and entirely hand-made liqueurs (a maximum of 5,000 bottles per year)
Meet owners Anna Maria and/or Nicola, who explain their artisanal, all-by-hand production process using inherited recipes
Includes a guided tour of the factory, tasting of the full line of liqueurs paired with homemade cakes, and a full Tuscan-themed lunch with wine pairing on a panoramic terrace
Includes transportation in a luxe sedan with an English-speaking chauffeur, plus an on-site guide (an Ambassador such as a family member, sommelier, or chef)

tours.tour: Livorno Pier - Chianti Region and Florence with Escort (#26) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: This 9-hour shore excursion from Livorno Pier combines a scenic Chianti countryside drive with time to explore Florence, a strong pick for cruise clients wanting both wine country and city sights in one day.
summaryBullets: Drive to Greve in Chianti (approx. 1 hr 40 min) along a scenic road lined with vineyards, olive groves, and sunflower fields
Visit Piazza Matteotti in Greve, with its Tuscan arcades, handicraft stores, wineries, and beef/sausage shops; optional wine tasting at an old Chianti castle (fees not included)
Approximately 3 hours in Florence to browse shops or see the city's piazzas, avenues, or churches, with a stop at the panoramic terrace of San Miniato al Monte
Includes transportation, driver, and a private English-speaking escort

tours.tour: Livorno Pier - Florence Shopping Outlets with Escort (#22a) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: This 9-hour shore excursion from Livorno Pier takes cruise clients to a fashion outlet and Florence's historic center, a good fit for shopping-focused travelers.
summaryBullets: Visit "the Mall," a fashion outlet in the Chianti region south of Florence, with elegant shops and well-known branded stores
Option to have lunch at the Gucci Cafe Restaurant (meal not included)
Afternoon time in Florence's historical center, with the driver on hand to assist with purchases or help discover the city's piazzas, avenues, or churches
Includes transportation from/to Livorno Pier, driver, and an English-speaking escort

tours.tour: Livorno Pier - Florence Walking Tour with Guide(#24a) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: This 7-hour Livorno Pier shore excursion is a guided walking tour hitting Florence's essential landmarks, ideal for cruise clients who want the core sights without a full-day commitment.
summaryBullets: See Piazzale Santa Maria Novella with its Dominican Church, then the Croce al Trebbio square and Palazzo Strozzi
Walk to Ponte Vecchio, the "Jewelers' Bridge," and enter Piazza della Signoria, an open-air sculpture museum overlooked by Palazzo Vecchio
Visit Dante Alighieri's house and church, finishing at the Cathedral complex in Piazza del Duomo
Includes transportation from/to Livorno Pier, driver, entrance tickets to the Duomo complex, and a private English-speaking guide in Florence (4 hours); vehicle not at disposal in Florence

tours.tour: Livorno Pier - Highlights of Florence and Pisa with Guide (#27a) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: This 9-hour Livorno Pier shore excursion combines Florence's top monuments and galleries with a visit to Pisa, a strong two-city option for cruise clients.
summaryBullets: Panoramic pause at Piazzale Michelangelo overlooking Florence and the countryside
See the 14th-century Ponte Vecchio, visit the Uffizi Gallery (works by Giotto, Botticelli, Raphael, Da Vinci, Michelangelo), and pass Palazzo Vecchio and Cellini's Perseus under the Loggia dei Lanzi
Alternatively visit the Accademia Gallery, home to Michelangelo's David, and see the Piazza del Duomo
Includes transportation, driver, entrance tickets to the Accademia OR Uffizi Gallery, and a private English-speaking guide in Florence (3 hours) and Pisa (1 hour 30 minutes)

tours.tour: Livorno Pier - Pisa from Livorno Pier with Guide (#25a) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A 4-hour private shore excursion from Livorno Pier to Pisa, ideal for cruise guests who want to see the Leaning Tower and its surrounding monuments with a dedicated English-speaking guide.
summaryBullets: Visit Piazza dei Cavalieri, home to the historic Scuola Normale university
See the Leaning Tower, Duomo, and Baptistery in the Piazza dei Miracoli
Entrance tickets for the Leaning Tower, Duomo, and Baptistery are included
Includes round-trip transportation from Livorno Pier, a driver, and a private English-speaking guide in Pisa (2.5-3 hours)

tours.tour: Livorno Pier - Trip to the Cinque Terre with Escort (#23) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day, 9-hour excursion from Livorno Pier to the Cinque Terre, showcasing one of Italy's most breathtaking coastlines.
summaryBullets: Explore five miles of Liguria's rocky coast, from olive groves and vineyards to fishing villages with colorful rooftops
The Cinque Terre was named a national park in 1999 and a UNESCO World Heritage Site in 1997
Departs between 8:00am and 9:00am, with pick-up 15 minutes before departure
Includes round-trip transportation from Livorno Pier, a driver, and an English-speaking escort

tours.tour: Masterclass on Chocolate and pairing with lunch 041 with Sedan - Castello Del Nero
tours.summaryIntro: A 10-hour exclusive private chocolate experience at the Amedei chocolate factory in Tuscany, pairing a behind-the-scenes tour with a professional tasting masterclass and a full Tuscan lunch.
summaryBullets: Guided tour of the Amedei chocolate factory, housed in a former cast-iron foundry, with the production process explained by an on-site Ambassador
PRO masterclass on "how to recognize a quality chocolate," including a dark chocolate tasting paired with wines and spirits
Chef-prepared classic Tuscan full lunch built around a chocolate-and-cocoa menu in a historic restaurant, with Wine Spectator Top 100 wines
Includes round-trip chauffeured transportation, an exclusive on-site guide/Ambassador, the factory tour, tasting masterclass, and lunch with wine pairing

tours.tour: Medicis Florence tour with Guide (#5) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A 6-hour private tour from Viareggio into Florence tracing the Medici family's rise to power through their palaces, chapels, and art patronage.
summaryBullets: Visit Palazzo Medici Riccardi, the family's home for 100 years starting in 1444, including the Chapel of the Magi with Benozzo Gozzoli's Procession of the Magi fresco
See Michelangelo's design and decoration in the Laurentian Library
Tour concludes at San Lorenzo and the Medici Chapels, featuring work by Brunelleschi, Donatello, and Michelangelo
Includes round-trip transportation, a driver, non-refundable entrance tickets to Palazzo Medici, and a private English-speaking guide in Florence for 3 hours

tours.tour: Medieval Atmosphere of S Gimignano Volterra and Monteriggioni with Escort (#10) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A 10-hour countryside journey through three of Tuscany's most iconic medieval towns, departing from your Viareggio hotel.
summaryBullets: Visit San Gimignano, reached through rolling Tuscan countryside covered in vineyards and olive groves
Continue to Volterra, an Etruscan town on a rocky plateau protected by medieval ramparts
Stop at Monteriggioni Castle, described as the most majestic and powerful castle of the Italian Middle Ages
Includes round-trip transportation, a driver, and a private English-speaking escort

tours.tour: Michelangelo with Guide (#1) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: An 8-hour private Michelangelo-themed tour of Florence, departing your Viareggio hotel at 8:00am, tracing the sculptor's life and greatest works.
summaryBullets: Begin at the Basilica of Santa Croce, once Michelangelo's home and now the site of his tomb
View Michelangelo's unfinished "Pieta" at the Opera del Duomo
See the Medici tombs Michelangelo carved in the New Sacristy of San Lorenzo, with their reclining figures of Dawn, Dusk, Night, and Day

Includes round-trip transportation, a driver, non-refundable entrance tickets to the Opera del Duomo, Medici Palace, and San Lorenzo Church, and a private English-speaking guide in Florence for 5 hours

tours.tour: Montaione - Brunello Winery Tour with Escort (#30) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: An 8-hour escorted wine tour through Montalcino, home of the celebrated Brunello wine, departing your hotel at 9:00am.
summaryBullets: Visit the town of Montalcino with its century-old fortress and the Abbey of St. Antimo
Sample Brunello, made from Sangiovese grapes, at some of the world's best wineries in the area
Wine tasting fees vary by winery and must be paid locally by clients in Euros (not included)
Includes round-trip transportation, a driver, and a private English-speaking escort

tours.tour: Montalcino - Brunello Winery Tour with Escort (#30) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: An 8-hour escorted wine tour through Montalcino, home of the celebrated Brunello wine, departing your hotel at 9:00am.
summaryBullets: Visit the town of Montalcino with its century-old fortress and the Abbey of St. Antimo

tours.tour: Organic Farm visit with Jeep ride in vineyards with wine tasting and lunch in FELSINA 027 with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: A 4-hour private visit to the Felsina organic farm in Tuscany, combining a Jeep ride through the vineyards with a rare wine tasting and light lunch.
summaryBullets: Take a Jeep ride through the vineyards and tour the organic farm, winery, and historical cellars, including the "Vincentia"
Enjoy a guided vertical tasting of 3 rare vintages of Colonia Gran Selezione
Felsina completed its organic conversion in March 2015, certified by ICEA (Institute for Ethical and Environmental Certification)
Includes round-trip chauffeured transportation, an exclusive on-site guide/Ambassador, the Jeep and farm/winery tour, wine tasting, and a light lunch with wine pairing (plus grappa)

tours.tour: Organic Farm visit with Jeep ride in vineyards with wine tasting and lunch in FELSINA 027 with Sedan - Castel Monastero

tours.tour: Organic Farm visit with Jeep ride in vineyards with wine tasting and lunch in FELSINA 027 with Sedan - Rosewood Castiglion del Bosco
tours.summaryIntro: A private 5-hour visit to the organic Felsina wine estate in Chianti — a Wine Spectator Top 100 producer whose Chianti Classico was named one of The Wall Street Journal readers' Top 5 Best Everyday Wines — a strong pick for wine-focused clients.
summaryBullets: Jeep ride through the vineyards plus guided tours of the farm, winery, historical cellars, and the "Vincentia," hosted by a family Ambassador (a family member, sommelier, or chef)
Vertical tasting of 3 rare vintages of the estate's Colonia Gran Selezione, followed by a light lunch with wine pairing and grappa
Felsina completed its organic certification (ICEA) on 7 March 2015; the estate keeps goats, hens, quail, ducks, and guinea fowl alongside its vineyards and olive groves
Includes round-trip English-speaking chauffeured transfer (sedan or minivan) from the hotel plus a dedicated on-site guide; gratuities and alcohol for guests under 18 are not included

Vertical tasting of 3 rare vintages of the estate's Colonia Gran Selezione, followed by a light lunch with wine pairing and grappa
Felsina completed its organic certification (ICEA) on 7 March 2015; the estate keeps goats, hens, quail, ducks, and guinea fowl alongside its vineyards and olive groves
Includes round-trip English-speaking chauffeured transfer (sedan or minivan) from the hotel plus a dedicated on-site guide; gratuities and alcohol for guests under 18 are not included

tours.tour: Organic Farm visit with Jeep ride in vineyards with wine tasting and lunch in FELSINA 027 with Sedan - Villas in Regello Area

tours.tour: Perugia - Brunello Winery Tour with Escort (#30) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day 10-hour excursion to taste Brunello — made from Sangiovese grapes and considered by many the best wine in the world — departing your hotel at 9:00am with a private English-speaking escort.
summaryBullets: Visit the town of Montalcino, home to a century-old fortress, plus the Abbey of St. Antimo
Stop at some of the world's best wineries to sample prestigious local wines, and shop for local products and crafts
Wine tasting fees vary by winery and are paid locally by clients in Euros (not included in the package)
Includes transportation, driver, and a private English-speaking escort for the full day

tours.tour: Pisa with Guide (#11) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A 5-hour guided drive from your hotel in Viareggio through the Tuscan countryside to Pisa, home to the world-famous Scuola Normale university and the iconic Leaning Tower.
summaryBullets: Walking tour of the Piazza dei Cavalieri, where the university is located, then on to the Piazza dei Miracoli
See the Leaning Tower, the Duomo, the Baptistery, and other monuments in the square
Includes a private English-speaking guide in Pisa for 4 hours plus transportation and driver from your Viareggio hotel
Non-refundable entrance tickets to the Duomo, the Baptistery, and the Leaning Tower are included

tours.tour: Pitti Palace and Boboli Gardens with Guide (#7) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A 7-hour outing from your hotel in Viareggio to Florence's Pitti Palace and the Boboli Gardens, pairing Medici-era grandeur with one of Italy's most beautiful gardens.
summaryBullets: See Camille Corot's paintings of Florence and walk through the Royal Apartments, reopened to the public after major restoration
Explore the Boboli Gardens on Boboli Hill between Pitti Palace and Belvedere Fort, with a stop at an 18th-century coffeehouse and a rest by the Neptune Fountain for panoramic views of Florence
Includes transportation and driver from your Viareggio hotel, non-refundable entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide in Florence for 3 hours

tours.tour: Religious Heart of Florence with Guide (#8) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A 6-hour tour from your hotel in Viareggio through Florence's three landmark churches, each once a symbol of Faith and Wealth in the city.
summaryBullets: Basilica di Santa Croce: funerary monuments, family chapels, medieval frescoes, and Cimabue's crucifixion, restored after the 1966 flood
The Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore (exterior only) with its famous Dome, one of the largest Catholic churches in the world
Basilica of Santa Maria Novella: the Holy Trinity by Masaccio, the Crucifixion by Giotto, and choir frescoes by Ghirlandaio
Includes transportation and driver from your Viareggio hotel, non-refundable entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide in Florence for 3 hours

tours.tour: Rosewood Castiglion del Bosco - Off Road adventure to the Chianti with local escort
tours.summaryIntro: An 8-hour off-road adventure into the hidden corners of Chianti, reaching remote woods, meadows, and vineyards that even longtime locals rarely see.
summaryBullets: 2-hour off-road excursion in a 4x4 to unspoilt areas reachable only by mule tracks climbing Chianti's hills, departing 8:15am with the off-road portion starting at 10:00am
Full homemade lunch paired with typical local wines, with each course expertly matched to a different wine
Includes transportation, driver, a local English-speaking escort, lunch, and wine tasting fees

tours.tour: Siena - Brunello Winery Tour with Escort (#30) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day 8-hour excursion to taste Brunello — made from Sangiovese grapes and considered by many the best wine in the world — departing your hotel at 9:00am with a private English-speaking escort.

summaryBullets: 2-hour off-road excursion in a 4x4 to unspoilt areas reachable only by mule tracks climbing Chianti's hills, departing 8:45am with the off-road portion starting at 10:00am

Includes transportation, driver, a local English-speaking escort, lunch, and wine tasting fees

tours.tour: Siena with Guide (#12) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: An 8-hour drive from your hotel in Viareggio through the Chianti countryside to Siena's medieval heart, with a stop at a walled town nearly a thousand years old.
summaryBullets: Walk the medieval streets to Siena's Cathedral, visiting the interior including the Libreria Piccolomini and the adjoining Museo dell'Opera Metropolitana
Stroll the Piazza del Campo, considered one of the most beautiful squares in the world
On the return drive, view the medieval walled town of Monteriggioni, its fortifications still intact after eight centuries
Includes transportation and driver from your Viareggio hotel, non-refundable Cathedral entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide in Siena for 4 hours

tours.tour: Souvenir of Florence with Guide (#6) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A 6-hour panoramic introduction to Florence, from a scenic overlook above the city to a walk through its Renaissance heart, departing your Viareggio hotel.
summaryBullets: Drive the Viale dei Colli up to Piazzale Michelangelo for a panoramic view of Florence
See the Duomo, Baptistery, Giotto's Belltower, Piazza della Signoria, and the shop-lined Ponte Vecchio, with your guide narrating the city's Renaissance history
This is a panoramic, outside-only tour — it does not include any inside visits
Includes transportation and driver from your Viareggio hotel and a private English-speaking guide in Florence for 3 hours

tours.tour: Taste a wine used in exorism in SCACCIADAVOLI esteate with lunch 048 with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: A private 7-hour visit to the historic Scacciadiavoli winery in Umbria — founded in 1884 and named for a local exorcist who once used its wine in his rituals — for a tasting of an Italian Wine Spectator Top 100 vintage.
summaryBullets: Guided tour of the estate's vineyards, winery, and cellars, hosted by a family Ambassador (a member of the family, sommelier, chef, or expert)
Exclusive tasting of the 2011 vintage of Montefalco Sagrantino, one of the few Italian wines named a Wine Spectator TOP 100
Light lunch with wine pairing, followed by spirits and coffee before departure
Includes round-trip English-speaking chauffeured transfer from the hotel plus a dedicated on-site guide; gratuities and alcohol for guests under 18 are not included

tours.tour: Truffle Hunting and Cooking Experience by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A hands-on Tuscan truffle hunting excursion by private sedan that pairs an authentic countryside tradition with a chef-led lunch and wine tasting.
summaryBullets: A local truffle hunter and his trained dog lead guests through the Tuscan woods to search for fresh truffles.
The hunter explains truffle history, legends, and culinary uses, and teaches how to distinguish a quality truffle from an inferior or artificial one.
The day includes a cooking class and lunch with Tuscan wine tasting (any truffles found during the hunt can be purchased afterward, not included).
Includes a private driver and car for the 6-hour experience, with pickup from the guest's Florence hotel.

tours.tour: Uffizi and Palazzo Vecchio with Guide (#16) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A guided Florence tour by private sedan that pairs the Uffizi Gallery's masterpieces with the Medici's secret passages inside Palazzo Vecchio.
summaryBullets: The Uffizi Gallery, built by Giorgio Vasari between 1560 and 1580, houses works by Botticelli, Michelangelo, Leonardo da Vinci, Raffaello, Giotto, Cimabue, and Masaccio.
At Palazzo Vecchio, a guide leads a tour of the private passages the Medici family built to escape enemies safely.
Includes transportation, driver, non-refundable entrance tickets to the Uffizi and Palazzo Vecchio, and a private English-speaking guide in Florence for 3 hours.
6-hour tour with pickup from the guest's hotel in Viareggio.

tours.tour: Unguided - Borgo San Felice - Chianti Tour by Mercedes E
tours.summaryIntro: An 8-hour unguided private drive through the Chianti countryside from Borgo San Felice, tracing prestigious vineyards and villages untouched by time.
summaryBullets: Stops in the village of San Donato before driving into the heart of Chianti, passing prestigious vineyards to the church of San Leolino and Panzano.
Visits the towns of Greve and Montefioralle, noted for 12th-century streets that have seen little change.
A walk on dirt roads through the vineyards leads to the 10th-century Romanesque church of San Cresci.
Includes a private car and driver; wine tasting and regional cuisine along the way are available but not included.

tours.tour: Unguided - Borgo San Felice - Florence Tour by Mercedes E
tours.summaryIntro: An 8-hour unguided private car tour of Florence's landmark sights, self-paced from a Borgo San Felice pickup.
summaryBullets: See the Duomo with Brunelleschi's Dome and the Baptistery with its famous Gates of Paradise.
Visit Piazza San Marco and the Ponte Vecchio.
Stop at Piazzale Michelangelo, described as offering the most spectacular view of the city.
Includes a private car and driver for the day.

tours.tour: Unguided - Borgo San Felice - Siena San Gimignano by Mercedes E
tours.summaryIntro: An 8-hour unguided private car tour from Borgo San Felice combining medieval Siena with the towers of San Gimignano.
summaryBullets: In Siena, stroll the Palazzo del Campo, the Palazzo Pubblico, the Duomo & Cathedral, and St. Catherine's Sanctuary.
Continue to San Gimignano, a UNESCO World Heritage Site ringed by three sets of historic walls and known for its skyline of medieval towers.
In San Gimignano, see Torre Grossa, the Collegiata, and the church of Sant'Angelo.
Includes a private car and driver; lunch at a local restaurant is part of the day but the meal itself is not included.

tours.tour: Unguided - Borgo San Felice - Winery Tour by Mercedes E
tours.summaryIntro: An 8-hour unguided private car winery tour from Borgo San Felice through the Chianti region's countryside.
summaryBullets: Stop at a local winery for a staff-guided tour of the cellars and an explanation of the winemaking process.
The first winery visit ends with lunch and a wine tasting.
A second winery stop offers another cellar tour and tasting under a local expert's guidance.
Includes a private car and driver; winery fees are paid on the spot and not included.

tours.tour: Unguided - Castello Del Nero - 10 Hours Pisa Siena by Mercedes E
tours.summaryIntro: A 10-hour unguided private car day trip from Castello Del Nero covering the Leaning Tower of Pisa and medieval Siena.
summaryBullets: See the Leaning Tower of Pisa (tickets not included) and stroll the Piazza dei Miracoli.
Continue to Siena to explore the Palazzo del Campo, the Palazzo Pubblico, the Duomo & Cathedral, and St. Catherine's Sanctuary.
Includes a private car and driver; lunch at a local restaurant is part of the day but the meal itself is not included.

tours.tour: Unguided - Castello Del Nero - Chianti Tour by Mercedes E
tours.summaryIntro: An 8-hour unguided private car drive through the Chianti countryside from Castello Del Nero, tracing prestigious vineyards and villages untouched by time.

A walk on dirt roads through the vineyards leads to the 10th-century Romanesque church of San Cresci.
Includes a private car and driver; wine tasting and regional cuisine along the way are available but not included.

tours.tour: Unguided - Castello Del Nero - Florence by Mercedes E
tours.summaryIntro: An 8-hour unguided private car tour of Florence's landmark sights, self-paced from a Castello Del Nero pickup.

tours.tour: Unguided - Castello Del Nero - Pisa Lucca by Mercedes E
tours.summaryIntro: An 8-hour unguided private car tour from Castello Del Nero exploring the Renaissance architecture of Pisa and Lucca.
summaryBullets: In Pisa, marvel at the marble monuments of the Piazza dei Miracoli, including the Leaning Tower (tickets not included), the marble Baptistery, and the Duomo.
In Lucca, walk the old city walls with their gates and ramparts for panoramic views of the alleys, towers, and palazzos.
See the oval Piazza dell'Anfiteatro, once the center of entertainment in Roman times, and the tree-topped Giunigi Tower with its hanging gardens.
Visit the Cathedral of St. Martin and browse streets full of antique shops. Includes a private car and driver.

tours.tour: Unguided - Castello Del Nero - San Gimignano by Mercedes E
tours.summaryIntro: A 4-hour unguided private car visit to the medieval hill town of San Gimignano from a Castello Del Nero pickup.
summaryBullets: San Gimignano is a UNESCO World Heritage Site ringed by three sets of historic walls, known for its skyline of medieval towers.
Highlights include Torre Grossa, the Collegiata, and the church of Sant'Angelo.
Includes a private car and driver.

tours.tour: Unguided - Castello Del Nero - Siena San Gimignano by Mercedes E
tours.summaryIntro: An 8-hour unguided private car tour from Castello Del Nero combining medieval Siena with the towers of San Gimignano.

summaryBullets: Stop at a local winery for a staff-guided tour of the cellars and an explanation of the winemaking process.
The first winery visit ends with lunch and a wine tasting.
A second winery stop offers another cellar tour and tasting under a local expert's guidance.
Includes a private car and driver; winery fees are paid on the spot and not included.

summaryBullets: See the Leaning Tower of Pisa (tickets not included) and stroll the Piazza dei Miracoli.
Continue to Siena to explore the Palazzo del Campo, the Palazzo Pubblico, the Duomo & Cathedral, and St. Catherine's Sanctuary.
Includes a private car and driver; lunch at a local restaurant is part of the day but the meal itself is not included.

tours.summaryIntro: An 8-hour unguided private car tour of Florence's landmark sights, self-paced from a Castello di Casole pickup.
summaryBullets: See the Duomo with Brunelleschi's Dome and the Baptistery with its famous Gates of Paradise.
Visit Piazza San Marco and the Ponte Vecchio.
Stop at Piazzale Michelangelo, described as offering the most spectacular view of the city.
Includes a private car and driver; entrance tickets are not included.

See the oval Piazza dell'Anfiteatro, once the center of entertainment in Roman times, and the tree-topped Giunigi Tower with its hanging gardens.
Visit the Cathedral of St. Martin and browse streets full of antique shops. Includes a private car and driver.

Also explore the Baptistry of S. John and the Campo Santo within the same complex.
Includes a private car and driver.

tours.tour: Unguided - Cortona - CHIANTI SENESE TOUR by Mercedes E Class
tours.summaryIntro: An 8-hour unguided private car tour of southern Chianti from La Corte dei Papi, tracing Etruscan history through quaint hill villages.
summaryBullets: In Castellina, see the 15th-century Rocca Comunale that dominates the historic center and visit the Etruscan Museum, home to Etruscan finds from the area.
Nearby is the Hypogeum of Mount Calvary, considered the most important Etruscan tomb found in Chianti.

After 12 km on the SR429, arrive in Radda in Chianti and Gaiole in Chianti, with stops at the parish church of Santa Maria in Spaltenna, the village of Vertine (once owned by the Ricasoli family), and the Castle of Brolio.
Includes a private car and driver.

tours.summaryIntro: An 8-hour unguided private car day trip from La Corte dei Papi through Umbria, pairing the sacred sites of Assisi with the old Etruscan city of Perugia.
summaryBullets: In Assisi, the hometown of Saint Francis, visit historical treasures dating to Etruscan and Roman times, including the Basilica of Saint Francis, his burial site, known for its Giotto frescoes.
Local lunch specialties available include pasta with truffle sauce, cured meat from Norcia, and the "Rocciata" dessert (meal not included).
In Perugia, an old Etruscan city known today for chocolate production, walk through the historical centre.
Includes a private car and driver.

In Pienza, see the private apartments of Palazzo Piccolomini (tickets bought on site) or stroll the Corso Rosellino.

tours.tour: Unguided - Florence - Chianti Tour by Mercedes E
tours.summaryIntro: An 8-hour unguided private car drive through the Chianti countryside departing from the guest's Florence hotel, tracing prestigious vineyards and villages untouched by time.
summaryBullets: Stops in the village of San Donato before driving into the heart of Chianti, passing prestigious vineyards to the church of San Leolino and Panzano.
Visits the towns of Greve and Montefioralle, noted for 12th-century streets that have seen little change.
A walk on dirt roads through the vineyards leads to the 10th-century Romanesque church of San Cresci.
Includes a private car and driver; wine tasting and regional cuisine along the way are available but not included.

tours.tour: Unguided - Florence - Outlet Tour by Mercedes E
tours.summaryIntro: An 8-hour unguided private car shopping excursion to Tuscany's premier designer outlet, departing from the guest's Florence hotel.
summaryBullets: Shop at The Mall, described as the most refined outlet in Tuscany, home to fashion brands including Fendi, Cavalli, and Gucci.
The day is unhurried, with a private driver on hand throughout.
Includes a private car and driver.

tours.tour: Unguided - Florence - Pisa Lucca by Mercedes E
tours.summaryIntro: This private unguided car tour pairs Pisa and Lucca in one day, giving clients the Leaning Tower's famous skyline alongside Lucca's walled medieval old town.
summaryBullets: See Pisa's Piazza dei Miracoli, including the Leaning Tower, marble Baptistery, and a look inside the Duomo (Leaning Tower tickets not included).
In Lucca, walk the old city walls, gates, and ramparts, and see the oval Piazza dell'Anfiteatro, once a Roman-era entertainment center.
Visit the tree-topped Giunigi Tower with its hanging gardens and the Cathedral of St. Martin, plus streets of antique shops.
Inclusions: private car and driver for the 8-hour tour; pickup 15 minutes prior from the client's Florence hotel.

tours.tour: Unguided - Florence - Siena San Gimignano by Mercedes E
tours.summaryIntro: A full day by private car through Siena and San Gimignano, two of Tuscany's best-preserved medieval towns, each a UNESCO-recognized old town.
summaryBullets: In Siena, stroll the Palazzo del Campo, Palazzo Pubblico, the Duomo & Cathedral, and St. Catherine's Sanctuary.
Continue to San Gimignano, a UNESCO World Heritage site ringed by three sets of historic walls and known for its medieval tower skyline.
Stop to see Torre Grossa, the Collegiata, and the church of Sant'Angelo (lunch stop included in itinerary, meal itself not included).
Inclusions: private car and driver for the 8-hour tour; pickup 15 minutes prior from the client's Florence hotel.

Visit a local winery for a staff-guided tour of the cellars and an explanation of the winemaking process, ending with lunch and wine tasting (paid on spot).
Visit a second winery for another cellar tour and wine tasting (paid on spot), learning the history of Tuscan wines from a local expert.
Inclusions: private car and driver for the 8-hour tour, departing based on the client's request from their Florence hotel.

tours.tour: Volterra with Guide (#14) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A guided full-day tour of Volterra combining "New Moon" movie-set atmosphere with genuine Etruscan history and archaeology.
summaryBullets: Walk among the archaeological ruins and the ancient palazzi that served as filming locations for "New Moon" (2009).
See a unique display of over 600 funerary urns at the Etruscan Guarnacci Museum, with the guide leading the visit.
At noon, the guide takes clients to Piazza dei Priori to hear the midday bell toll from the Bell Tower; a visit to the Museum of Torture is optional.

Inclusions: transportation, driver, non-refundable entrance tickets to the Etruscan Museum, and a private English-speaking guide in Volterra for 5 hours, for the 8-hour tour departing from the client's hotel in Viareggio.

tours.tour: White wine experience in CAPRAI Estate with lunch 015 with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: An exclusive private white wine experience at the Caprai Estate in Umbria, home to a "Grechetto" white wine ranked in Wine Spectator's Top 100.
summaryBullets: Wine Spectator listed Arnaldo Caprai's white "Grechetto" in its 2016 Top 100, and Wine Enthusiast named the estate European Winery of the Year in 2012.
The visit includes a welcome aperitif, storytelling on the winery's history and territory, and guided tours of the vineyards, cellars, and winery/factory.
The experience concludes with a wine tasting in "Light Lunch" mode, pairing wines with zero-miles food at the winery's terrace restaurant.

Inclusions: round-trip journey in a luxe sedan with an English-speaking chauffeur, an on-site private guide/Ambassador for the visit, a welcome aperitif with appetizer, full winery/cellar/vineyard tour, and tasting of the estate's full wine line paired with a light lunch, with pickup from the client's hotel.

tours.tour: Wine Experience in SETTE PONTI with lunch on the background of Leonardo Da Vinciâ€™s Monna Lisa 049 with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: A private day at Tenuta Sette Ponti in Chianti, whose supertuscans Crognolo and Oreno have made Wine Spectator's Top 100 five times, set on the stretch of the Arno whose Buriano Bridge appears in the background of Leonardo da Vinci's Mona Lisa.
summaryBullets: 6-hour private visit to the Sette Ponti estate in Chianti, between Arezzo and Florence, home to the Buriano Bridge seen in the background of the Mona Lisa.
Includes a champagne welcome aperitif, guided tours of the vineyards, winery, cellars, and villa, plus a vertical tasting of old vintages of the estate's Oreno supertuscan.
Full Tuscan lunch prepared show-cooking style at the owners' private villa, paired with the estate's Wine Spectator Top 100 wines.
Private English-speaking chauffeur transport plus an on-site Ambassador guide reserved exclusively for the group; the estate's Crognolo and Oreno wines have made Wine Spectator's Top 100 five times.

Includes a champagne welcome aperitif, guided tours of the vineyards, winery, cellars, and villa, plus a vertical tasting of old vintages of the estate's Oreno supertuscan.
Full Tuscan lunch prepared show-cooking style at the owners' private villa, paired with the estate's Wine Spectator Top 100 wines.
Private English-speaking chauffeur transport plus an on-site Ambassador guide reserved exclusively for the group; the estate's Crognolo and Oreno wines have made Wine Spectator's Top 100 five times.

tours.tour: Wine Experience private at Altesinos Brunello Di Montalcino Wine Experience 003 with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: This 5-hour private wine experience at Altesino brings guests to one of Italy's most celebrated Brunello di Montalcino producers, pairing history and tasting with a gourmet Tuscan lunch.
summaryBullets: Altesino's Brunello di Montalcino has ranked in Wine Spectator's TOP 100 five times and is called "one of the MOST REPRESENTATIVE vineyards in ITALY."
Guided tour of the vineyards, cellars, and winery, followed by a vertical tasting of old vintages and a tasting of the top wines.
Gourmet wine-paired lunch at "Il Passaggio" restaurant, led by chef Andrea Barcia.
Includes round-trip hotel transfer in a luxe sedan/minivan with an English-speaking chauffeur, a dedicated on-site Ambassador guide, and a tasting of 6 wines plus Grappa di Brunello and Vin Santo.

tours.tour: Wine Experience private in AVIGNONESI winery Supertuscan and Vino Nobile 007 with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: This 5-hour private wine experience at Avignonesi takes guests through the valley made famous by Frances Mayes's "Under the Tuscan Sun," pairing an exclusive vintage tasting with a gourmet Tuscan lunch.
summaryBullets: Located near Cortona, the village made famous by Frances Mayes's "Under the Tuscan Sun" novel.
Guided visit of the most iconic vineyard plot in Italy, the ageing cellars, and the Vinsantaia.
Exclusive private tasting of Supertuscans and Vino Nobile di Montepulciano, bottles available nowhere else in the world and only for WFTI guests.

Includes round-trip hotel transfer in a luxe sedan/minivan with an English-speaking chauffeur, a dedicated on-site Ambassador guide, and a gourmet wine-paired full Tuscan lunch in the elegant Foresteria.

tours.tour: Wine Private Experience at ARCANUM Toscana with IL FAUNO 005 with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: A private, full-day Tuscan wine estate visit pairing a rare vertical tasting of a Wine Spectator Top 100 supertuscan with a chef-prepared lunch — a step above a standard winery stop for guests seeking a hosted, family-estate-level experience.
summaryBullets: Full guided tour of ARCANUM Toscana "Il Fauno" (TENUTA di ARCENO, a Jackson Family Wines estate) - winery, vineyards, cellars, and farm - located halfway between Florence and Siena.
Vertical tasting of 3 old vintages of the Wine Spectator Top 100 supertuscan ARCANUM Toscana IL FAUNO IGT, hosted by a private on-site Ambassador guide (family member, sommelier, or chef).
Chef-prepared full Tuscan lunch with wine pairing - sample menu: bruschetta or pecorino with honey compote, pappa al pomodoro, chicken in citrus sauce or pork loin, and tiramisu or panna cotta.

Includes round-trip sedan transport with English-speaking chauffeur from Borgo San Felice, the on-site guide, and the full lunch with wine pairing; runs about 4 hours. Gratuities and alcohol for minors are not included.
