tours.tour: Wine and Olive Oil tasting as a Professional at RUFFINO with lunch 040 with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: A "PRO" Tuscan wine day for guests who want to go deeper than a tasting room - a barrel-side tasting at Ruffino's Poggio Casciano estate followed by a Top 100 supertuscan flight and a course-by-course wine-paired lunch.
summaryBullets: Private professional tasting straight from the barrique barrel of the aging wine, followed by a tasting of 4 prestigious wines (including limited editions) alongside extra virgin olive oil.
Guided tour of the vineyards, winery, historical villa and palace, and cellars with an Ambassador guide reserved exclusively for the group.
Full Tuscan lunch at La Locanda Le Tre Rane Ruffino, with a different wine paired to each course, including the Wine Spectator Top 100 supertuscan MODUS.

tours.tour: Wine experience and Full Tuscan lunch in CAPRINETO winery 017 with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: This is a private, full-day (~7 hours) wine experience at Carpineto's Montepulciano estate, featuring a Vino Nobile di Montepulciano Riserva that has ranked in Wine Spectator's Top 100 three times — a strong choice for wine-focused clients wanting a rare, personal Tuscan tasting.
summaryBullets: Private vertical tasting of old-vintage Vino Nobile di Montepulciano Riserva DOCG, a wine that has made Wine Spectator's Top 100 three times
Guided tour of the vineyards, winery, and cellar, including the barrel-aging and bottle-refinement areas, led by an on-site Ambassador (a family member, sommelier, or expert)
Full Tuscan lunch with wine pairing at an underground restaurant in the historic center of Montepulciano, with a menu tailored by Marco Tenerini and the estate chef
Includes round-trip private chauffeured transport from Borgo San Felice and a celebrative wooden box with 3 bottles of the Top 100 vintage wines to take home

tours.tour: Wine experience at CASTELLO di QUERCETO with lunch 021 with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: This is a private, ~5-hour audience with the Marquis at Castello di Querceto in Chianti, blending centuries of family wine history with an aristocratic lunch — a compelling, exclusive-access story for clients who want more than a standard winery visit.
summaryBullets: Private tour of the Marquis's residence, Chapel, and Italian Garden, plus the estate's 1,100 A.D. underground cellars (once the family armory) holding bottles over a century old
Aperitif atop the Castle tower with a panorama toward Florence, paired with two Tuscan sparkling wines and finger food
Vertical tasting of the Wine Spectator Top 100 Chianti Classico Riserva across the 1978, 1999, and 2016 vintages

Full lunch as personal guests of the Marquis François family at their table in the hall of honor, paired with the Castle's Supertuscans, plus round-trip private chauffeured transfer from Borgo San Felice

tours.tour: Wine experience at VIlla Capezzana with Lunch 013 with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: This private, full-day Wine Spectator's TOP 100 experience at Villa di Capezzana in Carmignano pairs a guided cellar tour with a vertical tasting of decades-old vintages and a wine-paired Tuscan lunch, a rare, professional-level tasting most guests never get access to.
summaryBullets: Private guided tour of the cellar, oil mill, and "vinsantaia," followed by a vertical tasting of Wine Spectator's TOP 100 "Villa di Capezzana Carmignano DOCG" (vintages 2018, 2010, 2007, and 2005).
4-course wine-paired lunch at the estate's "La Vinsantaia" Wine Bar, matched with the full line of Capezzana wines.
Hosted on-site by an Ambassador (a member of the family, a sommelier, or a chef) for the entire visit.

Includes round-trip private chauffeured transport (luxe sedan or minivan) with an English-speaking driver, a personalized welcome sign, tissues, and cold water; runs about 7 hours door-to-door, with gratuities not included.

tours.tour: Wine experience at the COLTIBUONO monastery and estate with lunch 023 with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: This private, full-day visit to the historic Coltibuono Abbey estate in Tuscany combines a guided tour of a winery with more than 500 years of history with a vertical tasting of Wine Spectator's TOP 100 wines and a specially paired tasting menu.
summaryBullets: Guided tour of the Abbey, Villa, winery, and cellars, with access to private areas including the Renaissance garden, the cloister, the frescoed refectory, and the "Engineer's" room with billiards and an antique cabreo document.
Vertical tasting of Wine Spectator's TOP 100 "Cancelli," a ten-year Reserve vertical tasting, and a historical Riserva or notable vintage of the Supertuscans "Sangioveto" and "Montebello."
Tasting menu at the estate restaurant, specially paired with 4 Coltibuono top wines.

Includes round-trip private chauffeured transport (luxe sedan or minivan) with an English-speaking driver, a personalized welcome sign, tissues, and cold water; runs about 8 hours door-to-door, with gratuities not included.

Vertical tasting of the Wine Spectator Top 100 "Cancelli" plus ten-year Reserves and a historical Riserva or vintages of the Supertuscans "Sangioveto" and "Montebello"
Full lunch at the estate's in-house restaurant, paired with 4 top Coltibuono wines
Includes round-trip chauffeured transport from the hotel and a dedicated on-site guide (often a family member, sommelier, or chef); private experience runs about 5 hours

tours.tour: Wine experience in Bolgheri with Lunch and wine pairing 060 with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: A private wine and food tour pairing Bolgheri's coastal reds with Brunello di Montalcino, centered on a visit to one of Bolgheri's most celebrated wineries.
summaryBullets: Guided tour of the winery cellar and barrique cellar, including a preview taste of the Sondraia Bolgheri Superiore straight from the barrel and a look at the estate's terracotta amphorae
Wine tasting directly from the barrels plus a vertical tasting of top wines from both the Bolgheri and Montalcino estates
Full Tuscan lunch with wine pairing at an exclusive tavern in the village of Bolgheri, followed by a relaxing guided tour of the vineyards
Includes round-trip chauffeured transport from the hotel and a private on-site guide/Ambassador for the entire visit; private experience runs about 6 hours

tours.tour: Wine experience in CERBAIE winery with wine tasting and lunch 054 with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: An exclusive private wine experience centered on a rare vertical tasting of Brunello di Montalcino 1998 (ranked 27th in Wine Spectator's 2003 Top 100) at a small, no-frills Montalcino winemaking estate.
summaryBullets: Guided tour of the farm, winery, cellars, and vineyards led by a professional sommelier, with wine tasting held out in the vineyards
Vertical tasting of old vintages back at the winery, including exclusive bottles from the owner's personal collection
Transfer to a panoramic restaurant overlooking the UNESCO World Heritage Val d'Orcia for a full Tuscan lunch with a custom wine pairing menu (meat, fish, vegetarian, and celiac options)
Includes round-trip chauffeured transport from the hotel and a dedicated on-site guide/sommelier; private experience runs about 6 hours

tours.tour: Wine experience in CERBAIE winery with wine tasting and lunch 054 with Sedan - Toscana Resort Castelfalfi
tours.summaryIntro: A private, sommelier-guided Brunello di Montalcino wine experience at the Cerbaie estate near Montalcino, pairing a rare 1998 vintage tasting with a custom Tuscan lunch overlooking the Val d'Orcia -- worth booking for the exclusive access to the owner's personal wine cellar.
summaryBullets: Vertical tasting of the winery's rare Brunello di Montalcino 1998 (ranked 27th in Wine Spectator's 2003 Top 100), poured from the owner's personal cellar and guided by a professional sommelier.
Guided walk through the vineyards and cellars, followed by lunch at a panoramic restaurant overlooking the UNESCO World Heritage Site of Val d'Orcia.
Custom Tuscan menu designed jointly by Marco Tenerini and the chef, paired with Casanuova delle Cerbaie wines (meat, fish, vegetarian, and celiac options available).
Includes round-trip transfer in a luxe sedan or minivan with English-speaking chauffeur, a private on-site guide, welcome drink, and full lunch with wine pairing; total experience runs about 8 hours.

tours.tour: Wine experience to the LE CHIUSE estate 1888 with tasting and lunch 031 with Sedan - Borgo San Felice
tours.summaryIntro: A private wine experience at Le Chiuse, the estate credited with originating Brunello di Montalcino and ranked #5 in Wine Spectator's 2021 Top 100 -- worth booking for the rare chance to taste straight from the barrel with the owner and sample vintages found nowhere else.
summaryBullets: Visit the original vineyards where the Brunello di Montalcino grape variety was first selected, with mother-vines still growing today.
Taste directly from the barrels with the estate owner, plus a guided vertical tasting of 3 Brunello vintages described as only possible here.
Full Tuscan lunch paired with Le Chiuse wines, following a short scenic transfer to the restaurant.
Includes round-trip transfer with English-speaking chauffeur and a private on-site guide, often a member of the family; total experience runs about 6 hours.

tours.tour: Wine experience to the LE CHIUSE estate 1888 with tasting and lunch 031 with Sedan - Florence Hotel
tours.summaryIntro: A private, approximately 7 hours wine day at the historic Le Chiuse estate in Montalcino (Brunello di Montalcino's Wine Spectator 2021 Top 100 #5), worth booking for guests who want cellar and barrel access no public tour offers.
summaryBullets: Guests walk the historic vineyards where the original Brunello grape variety was first selected and the mother-vines still grow, with guided tours of the winery, farm, and cellars
A member of the owning family (an "Ambassador") pours wine tasted directly from the barrel and leads a guided vertical tasting of three vintages of Brunello only available at this estate

Includes round-trip transfer from Florence Hotel in a private luxe sedan with an English-speaking chauffeur, a dedicated on-site guide, and a full Tuscan lunch with wine pairing at a restaurant about 10 minutes away
Welcome touches include a personalized welcome sign, tissues, and cold bottled water; gratuities and alcohol for under-18s are not included

tours.tour: 3 Hours Private Escort
6 Hours Private English Speaking Guide
tours.summaryIntro: 6 Hours Private English speaking guide. The tour English speaking guide is a licensed professional able to provide the passenger with deep insights about the place(s) of visit regarding art; history; landscape; culture.

tours.tour: 6 Hours Private Escort
Chocolate Factory Amedei Turscany Materclass 004 with Sedan - Hotel Byron
tours.summaryIntro: A rare behind-the-scenes visit to the Amedei chocolate factory near Pisa, pairing a professional tasting masterclass with a full Tuscan lunch — a memorable, only-here experience for chocolate lovers.
summaryBullets: Guided PRO tour of the Amedei factory with a hot chocolate welcome and explanation of the production process
PRO masterclass on "how to recognize a quality chocolate," tasting dark chocolate paired with wines and spirits
Includes chauffeured hotel transport, a dedicated on-site Ambassador guide, and a full Tuscan lunch with Wine Spectator Top 100 wines at a historic restaurant (about a 35-minute scenic drive away)

tours.tour: Cooking Class and Guided our of COLTIBUONO Abbery and Winery with lunch 025 with Sedan - Hotel Byron
tours.summaryIntro: A day at Badia a Coltibuono, the 1,000-year-old abbey and winery where Lorenza de' Medici (of the Florentine Medici dynasty) founded her famous cooking school — great for clients who want a real hands-on class plus historic pedigree.
summaryBullets: Cooking class led by a professional chef with a wine-food pairing lesson, ending with a "Tuscan Cooking" diploma to take home
Guided tour of the historic Abbey and its cellars, with lunch served in the owner's private Villa dining room
Includes chauffeured hotel transport, a dedicated on-site Ambassador, the 3-hour class, and a 4-course lunch with Wine Spectator Top 100 wines

tours.tour: Cooking School Experience in AVIGNONESI 008 with Sedan - Hotel Byron
tours.summaryIntro: A hands-on Tuscan cooking day at Avignonesi, the winery behind the "Under the Tuscan Sun" valley, where guests harvest their own ingredients and cook a full menu with the winery chef.
summaryBullets: Pick ingredients straight from the winery's garden and cook a "primo to dessert" menu, including handmade pici pasta and torta della nonna
Exclusive tasting of Avignonesi's Supertuscans and Vino Nobile di Montepulciano — bottles not sold anywhere else in the world
Includes chauffeured hotel transport, a dedicated on-site chef/guide, the cooking class and wine-paired lunch, plus a gift bag with apron, corkscrew, and recipe book

tours.tour: Cooking and wine pairing class in a Renainissance Villa at RUFFINO 039 with Sedan - Hotel Byron
tours.summaryIntro: A cooking class inside Ruffino's Renaissance villa kitchens, where guests cook classic Tuscan dishes "for nobles and for peasants" and then dine on their own creations, wine-paired course by course.
summaryBullets: Guided tour of the vineyards and cellars, followed by a hands-on cooking class and wine-food pairing lesson with a professional chef
Lunch at La Locanda Le Tre Rane Ruffino, with a different wine paired to each course, including the Wine Spectator Top 100 Supertuscan Modus
Includes chauffeured hotel transport and a dedicated on-site Ambassador for the full 8-hour experience

tours.tour: Dessert Cooking class experience with LORY PASTRY 032 with Sedan - Hotel Byron
tours.summaryIntro: A dessert masterclass with Loretta Fanella, former pastry chef at El Bulli, Cracco Peck, and Enoteca Pinchiorri, taught inside her own working pastry lab — a name-drop worth using with dessert-loving clients.
summaryBullets: Hands-on pastry lesson in a real, active laboratory, ending with a light business lunch featuring the desserts and savory pastries made in class
Guests take home the recipes and their own Pastry Chef apron
Includes chauffeured hotel transport, a dedicated on-site guide, and the full class plus lunch

tours.tour: Exclusive Private 046 Savini the Truffle Academy in Tuscany - Truffle Hunting and Cooking Experience with Sedan - Hotel Byron
tours.summaryIntro: A guided truffle hunt through the Tuscan woods near Pisa, followed by a hands-on cooking class that turns the day's find into a full truffle-themed lunch — a memorable, active outing beyond the usual winery visit.
summaryBullets: Guided truffle hunting with an expert hunter, searching for scorzone, bianchetto, or fine white truffles depending on the season
Mini cooking class with the chef, then a show-cooking lunch of truffle aperitif, fresh truffle pasta, truffle egg, and truffle dessert, paired with local wines
Includes chauffeured hotel transport, a dedicated on-site truffle-hunter guide, the hunt, lesson, and lunch with wine pairing, plus a surprise gift

tours.tour: Exclusive Private 061 San Polo Wine Experience with Sedan - Hotel Byron
tours.summaryIntro: A deep dive into Brunello di Montalcino at San Polo, from barrel tastings to a rare vertical of five vintages, capped with a five-course wine-paired Tuscan lunch — ideal for serious wine clients.
summaryBullets: Barrel tasting of two future Brunello vintages, plus a vertical tasting of five vintages (2015-2019) of the winery's single-vineyard Podernovi cru
Five-course Tuscan lunch paired with three San Polo wines, followed by a vineyard walk with the Hospitality Manager
Includes chauffeured hotel transport and a dedicated on-site Ambassador/winemaker for the full day

tours.tour: Exclusive Private 073 IL Borro S Ferragamo Wine Experience with Sedan - Hotel Byron

tours.tour: Exclusive Private 076 Castello DAlbola Wine Experience with Sedan - Hotel Byron

tours.tour: Exclusive Private 086 Castello DAlbola Wine Experience with Sedan - Hotel Byron

summaryBullets: Private visit of the Marquis's residence, Chapel, and Italian Garden, plus the underground cellars once used as the castle's armory

Guests learn how to tell a genuine truffle from inferior "fake" or artificial ones

4-course wine-paired lunch at "La Vinsantaia" with seasonal menus matched to the full Capezzana wine line

Vertical tasting of old vintages 2000, 2003, 2006, and 2009 poured on the private terrace overlooking Barolo castle

summaryBullets: Explore 28 sections across 40,000 square metres and roughly 15,000 pieces, housed in a former 16th-century Olivetan monastery plus dedicated Rail and Air & Sea Transport buildings
See models built from Leonardo da Vinci's own drawings, including cannons, a war machine, glider, parachute, self-propelled car, revolving crane, and drilling machine
View the museum's reproduction of "The Last Supper"
Includes transportation, driver, entrance tickets, and private guide (3 hours)

tours.tour: Romantic Verona and Lake Garda with Guide (#6a) by Presidential Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day pairing of Romeo and Juliet's Verona with the scenery of Italy's largest lake, good for guests wanting romance and lake views in one trip.
summaryBullets: Visit Verona's Roman Arena in Piazza Bra, the Giusti Gardens, Romeo and Juliet's balcony, and Piazza delle Erbe
Continue north to Lake Garda, the largest of the Italian lakes
See Roman ruins and mosaics in Sirmione and Desenzano
Includes transportation, driver, entrance tickets, and a private guide in Verona and Sirmione, 5 of the 12 hours guided

Finish with shopping at the Fidenza Chic Outlet

tours.summaryIntro: A visit to the legendary San Siro Stadium, appealing to any sports fan wanting to see AC Milan and Inter's shared home turf and museum.
summaryBullets: Tour the San Siro Stadium, built in 1926 and holding about 85,000 people
Visit Italy's only stadium-based football museum, with memorabilia from FC Inter and AC Milan, photos from the clubs' first match against each other, and ceramic busts of AC Milan players
See the evolution of football boots on display, then browse official club merchandise in the San Siro store
Includes transportation, driver, entrance tickets, and English-speaking escort (2 hours)

tours.tour: Tremezzo - Full day grand Tour of Lake Como

tours.tour: Valpolicella Region Wine Tour with Guide (#18) by Presidential Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day guided wine tour through Valpolicella, home of Amarone, for guests who want an authentic Italian wine country experience near Verona.
summaryBullets: Located just northwest of Verona and east of Lake Garda, in a region producing wine since Roman times
The name Valpolicella means "valley of many cellars," reflecting its dense concentration of wine estates
Visits two contrasting high-end small-estate wineries
Includes transportation, driver, wine tasting fees, and a private guide for the 12-hour day departing 7:00am

tours.summaryIntro: A guided walking tour through Como's historic center, ideal for guests who want context on the city's architecture rather than just a photo stop.
summaryBullets: Visits the Cathedral and Basilica of St. Fedele, and the fortified Porta Torre gate
Passes through Piazza Cavour, Piazza Duomo, Piazza San Fedele, Piazza Volta, and Piazza Mazzini
Includes an English-speaking guide for the 2-hour walk, starting from the guest's hotel in Como

tours.tour: Villa Melzi and Bellagio with Guide (#14) by Presidential Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A guided day trip to Lake Como's fashionable town of Bellagio, pairing shopping and dining with a visit to a landmark villa garden.
summaryBullets: Time to shop and dine in Bellagio before walking to the neoclassical Villa Melzi, built in 1808
Villa Melzi's gardens feature Japanese maples, American redwoods, and azaleas overlooking the lake
Includes transportation, driver, non-refundable Villa Melzi entrance tickets, and a private guide on site (lunch not included)
8-hour day departing 9:00am from the guest's hotel in Milan

tours.tour: 6 Hours Private Escort
Amalfi - Archeological Museum of Naples with Guide (#4) by Sedan
tours.duration: 6 hours - 3 hours travel - 3 hours English speaking guide
tours.summaryIntro: A half-day visit to Naples' Archeological Museum, Italy's most important collection of antiquities pulled straight from Pompeii, Herculaneum, and Stabiae.
summaryBullets: See the country's largest collection of Greek antiquities and Roman artifacts recovered from Pompeii, Stabiae, and Herculaneum
Runs 6 hours total — about 3 hours of travel plus 3 hours in the museum with the guide
Includes private Sedan transportation with driver, museum entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide (guide meets the group in Naples)
Pickup is from the guest's hotel in Amalfi

tours.tour: Amalfi - Full Day Capri Island Tour with Guide (#21e) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A bucket-list full day on Capri that pairs a private boat tour of the Blue Grotto with lunch and free time in the famous Piazzetta.
summaryBullets: Hydrofoil from Sorrento Pier (tickets included) over to Capri, then a 3-hour private boat tour with a captain that stops at the Blue Grotto for a swim, with fruit and Prosecco served onboard
3-course lunch of fresh fish (beverages not included), followed by a chairlift ride with the guide to the island's highest point
Free time to shop in the Capri Piazzetta before heading back
Includes roundtrip hotel-to-Sorrento-Pier transfer by Sedan, private car in Capri, English-speaking guide, hydrofoil tickets, and Blue Grotto entrance

tours.tour: Amalfi - Full Day Herculaneum and Vesuvius (#20-3) with Guide by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: Pairs the remarkably intact ruins of Herculaneum with a hike up Mount Vesuvius for views over the Bay of Naples — a great pick for clients who want Pompeii's story without the crowds.
summaryBullets: Herculaneum's patrician villas still show original wood and rope details, plus brickwork, mosaics, and frescoes, despite the volcanic flows that buried the city
Drive up 3,000 feet through Vesuvius's old crater, then a 25-minute hike up volcanic gravel to the summit
At the top, look into the 700-foot-deep, 2,000-foot-wide crater with views over the Sorrento Peninsula
Includes private car and driver by Sedan, entrance tickets to Herculaneum and Vesuvius, and an English-speaking guide (meets group in Ercolano); pickup from the hotel in Praiano

tours.tour: Amalfi - Full Day Pompeii Herculaneum and Vesuvius (#20-1) with Guide by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: The complete Vesuvius-eruption story in one long day — Pompeii, Herculaneum, and the volcano itself — ideal for history-minded clients who want the full picture.
summaryBullets: Pompeii's ruins, buried in ash and undiscovered until 1748, let visitors walk streets much as they existed 2,000 years ago
Herculaneum's preserved patrician villas still show original wood, ropes, brickwork, mosaics, and frescoes
Climb 3,000 feet up Vesuvius's old crater with a 25-minute hike to the summit for sweeping views
Includes private car and driver by Sedan, entrance tickets to all three sites, and an English-speaking guide (meets group in Pompeii); pickup from the hotel in Praiano; runs 10 hours total

tours.tour: Amalfi - Full Day Pompeii and Vesuvius (#20-2) with Guide by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: Combines Pompeii's open-air ruins with a climb up Vesuvius for those who want the volcano without adding Herculaneum to the day.
summaryBullets: Pompeii's ruins, buried in ash and undiscovered until 1748, let visitors walk the city much as it existed 2,000 years ago
Drive 3,000 feet up Vesuvius's old crater, then a 25-minute hike to the summit for views over the Sorrento Peninsula and the islands of Capri, Ischia, and Procida
At the top, look into the 700-foot-deep, 2,000-foot-wide crater
Includes private car and driver by Sedan, entrance tickets to Pompeii and Vesuvius, and an English-speaking guide (meets group in Pompeii); pickup from the hotel in Praiano; runs 8 hours

tours.tour: Amalfi - Learn to Cook in Ravello (#17)
tours.summaryIntro: A hands-on cooking class in Ravello that's as much about the setting and terrace views as it is about the food — a memorable half-day for foodie clients.
summaryBullets: Held in an outdoor kitchen on a terrace in Ravello, with a kitchen garden just below where guests learn about growing the organic vegetables used in the class
Menu covers antipasti, pastas, breads, seasonal vegetable dishes, meat dishes, plus cakes and jams
After class, guests sit down to share the meal they made along with local Amalfi-region wines
Includes transportation, driver, and the English-led cooking class; runs 5 hours with morning (11am) or afternoon (3pm) class times

tours.tour: Amalfi - Mount Vesuvius Volcano with Guide (#8) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A short, scenic climb to the crater of Mount Vesuvius — the only active volcano in continental Europe — for a big payoff in a half day.
summaryBullets: Vesuvius is known as the "terror and pride of Naples," the most iconic landmark on the Neapolitan skyline
One of the smallest active volcanoes in the world, and the only one currently active in continental Europe
From the crater rim, enjoy sweeping views up to the Gulf of Naples
Includes transportation and driver by Sedan, Vesuvius entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide; runs 4.5 hours from the Amalfi hotel

tours.tour: Amalfi - Naples and Pompeii with Guide (#1) by Sedan
tours.duration: 8 hours - 3 hours travel + 5 hours English speaking guide (2 hours in Pompeii and 3 hours in Naples)
tours.summaryIntro: A full day covering Naples' landmark monuments and the ancient ruins of Pompeii — good for clients who want both city history and archaeology in one outing.
summaryBullets: In Naples: the Cathedral, Treasure Chapel, and 4th-century S. Restituta Basilica, plus Plebiscite Square, the Royal Palace, Basilica di Francesco di Paola, and Castel Nuovo (Maschio Angioino), built by the Angevin dynasty
In Pompeii: the ruins from the 79 A.D. Vesuvius eruption that buried the Roman city in ash

Includes transportation, driver, entrance tickets for the San Gennaro Treasure Museum, Castelnuovo Museum, and Pompeii, plus a private English-speaking guide; runs 8 hours (about 3 hours travel, 5 hours guided) from the Amalfi hotel
Note: per a vendor advisory, the Posillipo viewpoint stop is currently not included in this Naples-to-Amalfi program

tours.tour: Amalfi - National Gallery of Capodimonte with Guide (#5) by Sedan
tours.duration: 6 hours - 3 hours travel - 3 hours English speaking guide
tours.summaryIntro: A half day pairing Naples' historic center with the masterpieces of the National Gallery of Capodimonte, in the grand former royal residence of the Bourbon kings.
summaryBullets: Walk past Piazza Plebiscito to see the exteriors of the Royal Palace, San Carlo Opera House, and Galleria Umberto I
Visit the Capodimonte Palace — once the Bourbon kings' summer residence and hunting lodge — whose name means "top of the hill"
Finish in the palace's lush park for a view over the Bay of Naples
Includes transportation, driver, entrance tickets to the National Gallery of Capodimonte, and a private English-speaking guide; runs 6 hours (3 travel, 3 guided) by Sedan from the Amalfi hotel

tours.tour: Amalfi - Paestum and Vietri Sul Mare with Guide (#7) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A day trip into Magna Graecia, pairing the ancient Greek temples of Paestum with the ceramics town of Vietri Sul Mare on the way back.
summaryBullets: Paestum's fortified walls and temples survive in excellent condition, including sacred wells, bathhouses, an amphitheater, and the ancient homes and shops of the "Sacred Way"
See the Temple of Hera (Juno), built in the 6th century B.C. with a peristyle of 50 archaic fluted columns
Vietri Sul Mare, famous for its ceramic arts and crafts, offers a picturesque medieval borgo with a museum and shops dedicated to the local pottery
Includes transportation, driver, entrance tickets to Paestum, and a private English-speaking guide; runs 8 hours by Sedan from the Amalfi hotel

tours.tour: Amalfi - Panoramic Naples with Guide (#2) by Sedan
tours.duration: 6 hours - 3 hours travel + 3 hours English speaking guide
tours.summaryIntro: An easy, scenic half day along the Posillipo coast road, best for clients who want the postcard Naples views without a packed itinerary.
summaryBullets: Drive the panoramic coastal road up the hill of Posillipo for views of Ischia, Procida, and Capri on the horizon, with Vesuvius in the background
Short stroll to Piazza Plebiscito to admire the exteriors of the Royal Palace, San Carlo Opera House, and Galleria Umberto I
Walk through Piazza del Municipio with free time before returning to the hotel
Includes transportation, driver, and a private English-speaking escort (meeting point in Naples); runs 6 hours (3 travel, 3 guided) by Sedan from the Amalfi hotel

tours.tour: Amalfi - Pompeii and Gragnano by Sedan and Escort
tours.summaryIntro: An unusual pairing of ancient history and modern industry — Pompeii's ruins followed by a hands-on look at how Gragnano's famous pasta is made.
summaryBullets: Explore Pompeii's ruins from the 79 A.D. Vesuvius eruption, including surviving mosaic floors, baths, and temples
In Gragnano, the "City of Pasta," a 4D virtual experience introduces the town's history before touring the modern pasta-making and packaging factory
Finish with an "Aperipasta" — an Italian-style aperitif with pasta tastings

Includes transportation, driver, Pompeii entrance tickets, and an on-site guide (max 2 hours), plus the private pasta factory visit with aperitif; by Sedan, minimum 4 guests, departs 8:00am from the Amalfi hotel

tours.tour: Amalfi - Private Exclusive Cooking Class in Sorrento
tours.summaryIntro: A private cooking class set in a beautifully manicured private garden estate in Sorrento — sells itself on the setting as much as the menu.
summaryBullets: Held in private grounds with manicured gardens, orange and lemon trees, a swimming pool, a "Pergolato," and ceramic decorations
Guests arrive through a lineup of old palms and English lawns full of flowers and fountains, on a fully private property
Welcome refreshments on arrival include fresh orange juice, plum cake, and Neapolitan coffee
Includes transportation, driver, and the English-led cooking class; runs 8 hours with morning (9:30am) or afternoon (4:00pm) class start times

tours.tour: Amalfi - Rome Day Trip with Guide (#6) by Sedan
tours.duration: 14 hours - 7 hours travel time + 7 hours in Rome
tours.summaryIntro: A long but iconic day trip that hits Rome's must-see landmarks in a single guided outing from the Amalfi Coast.
summaryBullets: See the Spanish Steps, Mausoleum of Augustus, and the Pantheon, then the Roman Forum viewed from Capitoline Hill
Stop at Piazza Venezia for the Monument to Italy's first king and Mussolini's balcony, then the Trevi Fountain for the coin-toss tradition
Visit the Colosseum, then the Appian Way catacombs and cobblestones (lunch stop available but meal not included)
Includes transportation, driver, and a private English-speaking guide; runs 14 hours (7 hours travel, 7 hours in Rome) by Sedan from the Amalfi hotel

tours.tour: Amalfi - Ruins of Pompeii with Guide (#15) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A focused, half-day walk through Pompeii's ruins for clients who want the highlights without a full-day commitment.
summaryBullets: Walk the Forum, the heart of the ancient city, surrounded by temples and residences, plus streets lined with former shops, villas, and schools
See the amphitheater where gladiators once fought, and wall paintings and frescoes that decorated wealthy patrician mansions
May include a stop at a cameo carver's workshop to watch local artisans at their centuries-old craft
Includes transportation, driver, Pompeii entrance tickets, and a guide met on site (max 2 hours); runs 4.5 hours by Sedan from the Praiano hotel

tours.tour: Amalfi - Shared Half Day Cooking Class in Ravello
tours.summaryIntro: A shared cooking class in Ravello built around a hands-on garden harvest and a visit to a medieval prayer grotto — a good value option for foodie clients.
summaryBullets: Guests gather vegetables from an organic garden while the chef shares history and nutritional background on the ingredients
Visit an ancient grotto with a medieval chapel dedicated to Archangel Michael, once used by farmers for prayer breaks
The roughly 3-hour class in a rustic kitchen covers an appetizer, first course, main course, vegetables, and dessert (dessert enjoyed but not prepared)
Includes transportation, driver, and the English-led cooking class; runs 5 hours with morning (11am) or afternoon (3pm) class start times

tours.tour: Amalfi - Souvenir of Naples with Guide (#3) by Sedan
tours.duration: 7 hours - 3 hours travel + 4 hours English speaking guide
tours.summaryIntro: A comprehensive Naples day covering monumental landmarks, the historic center, and the panoramic coast road, anchored by the famous liquefying blood of San Gennaro.
summaryBullets: Monumental Naples: Piazza del Plebiscito, the Royal Palace, San Francesco di Paola church, Galleria Umberto I, San Carlo Theatre (one of the world's oldest), and Castel Nuovo (Maschio Angioino)

Historical Naples: the Spaccanapoli street, Gesù Nuovo Church, Santa Chiara Church, and the Duomo, home to San Gennaro's relics, whose blood is said to liquefy twice a year (first Saturday in May and September 19)
Panoramic Naples: the Via Posillipo lookout starting from Mergellina

Includes transportation, driver, entrance tickets to the Castelnuovo Museum and San Carlo Theatre, and a private English-speaking guide; runs 7 hours (3 travel, 4 guided) by Sedan from the Amalfi hotel

tours.tour: Capri - Full Day Capri Island Tour with Guide including Private Cruise (#23b) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day, once-in-a-lifetime private cruise and island tour of Capri that pairs the Blue Grotto with lunch and free time — this version departs right from a Capri hotel.
summaryBullets: Meet the Harbour staff and boat captain at Capri Pier for a 3-hour private boat tour that includes the Blue Grotto with a brief swim, plus fruit and sparkling wine onboard
After lunch, take the chairlift with the guide to the island's highest point
Free time to shop in the Capri Piazzetta and walk to the Augustus Garden
Includes a private English-speaking guide (included in vehicle occupancy); recommended to wear comfortable shoes, and sunglasses/sunhats in summer; runs 7 hours by Sedan from the Capri hotel

tours.tour: Capri - Full Day Herculaneum and Vesuvius (#20-3) with Guide by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: Pairs the remarkably intact ruins of Herculaneum with a hike up Mount Vesuvius, departing by hydrofoil for clients already staying on Capri.
summaryBullets: Herculaneum's patrician villas still show original wood and rope details, plus brickwork, mosaics, and frescoes, despite the volcanic flows that buried the city
Drive up 3,000 feet through Vesuvius's old crater, then a 25-minute hike up volcanic gravel to a summit with 700-foot-deep crater views over the Sorrento Peninsula
Includes roundtrip transport from the Capri hotel to the Sorrento Pier, hydrofoil tickets, a private car and driver, entrance tickets, and an English-speaking guide; runs 8 hours by Sedan

tours.tour: Capri - Full Day Pompeii Herculaneum and Vesuvius (#20-1) with Guide by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: The complete Vesuvius-eruption story — Pompeii, Herculaneum, and the volcano itself — for clients staying on Capri who don't mind a long day via hydrofoil.
summaryBullets: Pompeii's ruins, buried in ash and undiscovered until 1748, let visitors walk streets much as they existed 2,000 years ago
Herculaneum's preserved patrician villas still show original wood, ropes, brickwork, mosaics, and frescoes
Climb 3,000 feet up Vesuvius's old crater with a 25-minute hike to the summit

Includes roundtrip transport from the Capri hotel to Sorrento Pier, hydrofoil tickets, private car and driver, entrance tickets to Pompeii, Vesuvius, and Herculaneum, and a guide met in Pompeii; runs 10 hours by Sedan

tours.tour: Capri - Full Day Pompeii and Vesuvius (#20-2) with Guide by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: Combines Pompeii's ruins with a climb up Vesuvius for Capri-based clients, without adding Herculaneum to the day.
summaryBullets: Pompeii's ruins, buried in ash and undiscovered until 1748, let visitors walk the city much as it existed 2,000 years ago
Drive 3,000 feet up Vesuvius's old crater, then a 25-minute hike to the summit for views over the Sorrento Peninsula and the islands of Capri, Ischia, and Procida
At the top, look into the 700-foot-deep, 2,000-foot-wide crater

Includes roundtrip transport from the Capri hotel to Sorrento Pier, hydrofoil tickets, private car and driver, entrance tickets to Pompeii and Vesuvius, and a guide met in Pompeii; runs 8 hours by Sedan

tours.tour: Capri - Half Day Capri Island Tour with Guide including Private Cruise (#23) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A half-day private tour of Capri Island combining a boat cruise and land sightseeing, giving guests both the sea and the island's famous piazzetta in one outing.
summaryBullets: 3-hour private gozzo boat tour around Capri with a stop at the Blue Grotto for a swim, plus fruit and Prosecco onboard
Chairlift ride to the highest point on the island with an English-speaking guide
Free time to stroll Capri's famous "Piazzetta" and walk to the Augustus Gardens
Includes private car, driver, English-speaking guide, and entrance tickets to the Blue Grotto (5 hours, departs 9:00am or 2:00pm)

tours.tour: Capri excursion by private boat and transfer from Positano to Capri by Presidential Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A full day at sea from Positano aboard a private speedboat to explore Capri's dramatic sea caves.
summaryBullets: Private speedboat tour to Capri, passing the Green, Blue, and White sea caves
Boat comes equipped with chairs, pillows, towels, and an outdoor shower
Water, beer, soft drinks, and a bottle of white wine and Prosecco included onboard
Includes private car, private driver, and private speedboat; 8-hour day departing 9:45am from Positano

tours.tour: Exclusive Private 103 ST Andrea Kosher Wine Experience with Sedan - Naples
tours.summaryIntro: A private, family-hosted kosher wine experience at Cantina Sant'Andrea (also known as Cantina Gabriele) near Naples, guided by the winery's own owners.
summaryBullets: Exclusively guided by a member of the Pandolfo family, whose winemaking history traces back to 1850 on the Sicilian island of Pantelleria
Includes a welcome aperitif of Riflessi Rosato Spumante Extra Dry with appetizers, plus a vertical tasting of at least 3 wines from different vintages
Ends with a wine-paired country-gourmet lunch, each course matched to a different top wine
Includes round-trip transport in a luxe sedan or minivan with an English-speaking chauffeur, plus an on-site guide (9 hours)

tours.tour: Naples - Amalfi Coast with Escort (#16) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A scenic full-day drive along the legendary Amalfi Coast, taking in the string of cliffside towns that made the coastline famous.
summaryBullets: Visits the famous towns of Amalfi, Positano, Ravello, and Praiano along the coastal road
Includes a private English-speaking escort for the day
Includes transportation and driver, 8 hours departing from your Naples hotel based on your requested time

tours.tour: Naples - Archeological Museum of Naples with Guide (#4) by Sedan
tours.duration: 4 hours ( 3 hours guide + 4 hours vehicle and driver as directed )
tours.summaryIntro: A guided visit to Naples' National Archeological Museum, Italy's most important collection of antiquities from the cities buried by Vesuvius.
summaryBullets: See Greek antiquities and Roman artifacts recovered from Pompeii, Stabiae, and Herculaneum
Includes a private English-speaking guide for 3 hours inside the museum
Includes round-trip transportation, driver, and museum entrance tickets (4 hours total)

tours.tour: Naples - Campania Wine Tour with Guide (#19) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A half-day wine tour through Campania pairing ancient history with modern winemaking, starting at the Pompeii ruins and ending at a working wine farm.
summaryBullets: Visits Pompeii's Dove Amphitheater area, where 2,000-year-old vines have been reproduced through archaeobotanical study
Tours a Campania wine farm's vineyard and aging rooms, where wine is still made in terracotta amphorae as in Roman times
Tastes local wines including Falanghina, Asprino di Aversa, and Lacryma Cristi
Includes transportation, driver, Pompeii entrance tickets, a wine tasting with light lunch (starters, first course, dessert), and a private English-speaking guide (6 hours, departs 9:00am)

tours.tour: Naples - Full Day Capri Island Tour with Guide (#21d) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day private excursion to Capri from Naples, combining a hydrofoil crossing, a boat tour of the island's coastline, and a proper lunch.
summaryBullets: 20-minute hydrofoil crossing from Sorrento Pier to Capri, with tickets included
3-hour private boat tour with a stop at the Blue Grotto for swimming, plus fruit and Prosecco onboard
Chairlift ride to the highest point of Capri with an English-speaking guide, followed by free time in the famous Capri "Piazzetta"
Includes a 3-course lunch (fresh fish based on availability, beverages excluded), round-trip transfer, and all entrance/hydrofoil tickets (9 hours total)

tours.tour: Naples - Mount Vesuvius Volcano with Guide (#8) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A guided climb up Mount Vesuvius, the only active volcano on the European mainland, for sweeping views over the Gulf of Naples.
summaryBullets: Reach the crater rim of Vesuvius, known locally as the "terror and pride of Naples," for panoramic views of the Gulf of Naples
Includes transportation, driver, entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide (3 hours)
Comfortable walking shoes are recommended, and tickets require each guest's full name, date of birth, and nationality in advance
Tickets are non-refundable within 60 days of the tour (19 euros per person), so it's worth confirming dates early

tours.tour: Naples - Naples Underworld with Guide (#11) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: An underground tour of Naples' hidden "underworld," descending forty meters below the historic center to explore ancient ruins and local legend.
summaryBullets: Explore catacombs, Roman theaters, and caverns once used as shelters during bombing raids, forty meters below the city streets
Hear the legend of Munaciello, the endearing house ghost said to have originated from families living in these subterranean caves
Includes transportation, driver, entrance tickets to Naples Underground, and a private English-speaking guide (3 hours)

tours.tour: Naples - Naples and Pompeii Gardens with Guide (#12) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A garden-focused tour pairing the tranquil cloister of Naples' Santa Chiara church with the excavated gardens of Pompeii.
summaryBullets: Visit the inner cloister and gardens of the Santa Chiara church, a peaceful oasis in the center of Naples
See Pompeii's ancient gardens, replanted based on frescoes found on the walls of surrounding buildings
Includes transportation, driver, entrance tickets to the Santa Chiara Complex and Pompeii, and a private English-speaking guide (4 hours)

tours.tour: Naples - Naples and Pompeii with Guide (#1) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A combined city-and-ruins tour visiting Naples' major monuments alongside the ancient site of Pompeii, buried by Vesuvius in 79 AD.
summaryBullets: Step inside the Cathedral, Treasure Chapel, and the 4th-century Santa Restituta Basilica
See the Castel Nuovo (Maschio Angioino), built by the Angevin dynasty, plus Piazza del Plebiscito and the Royal Palace exterior
Explore Pompeii's ruins, preserved since Vesuvius's eruption in 79 AD
Includes transportation, driver, entrance tickets to the San Gennaro Treasure Museum, Castelnuovo Museum, and Pompeii, plus a private English-speaking guide (5 hours)

tours.tour: Naples - National Gallery of Capodimonte with Guide (#5) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A tour of Naples' historic center and the National Gallery of Capodimonte, the former Bourbon royal palace overlooking the Bay of Naples.
summaryBullets: Pass by Piazza del Plebiscito to see the Royal Palace, San Carlo Opera House, and Galleria Umberto I from the outside
Visit Capodimonte Palace, once the summer residence and hunting lodge of the kings of the Two Sicilies
Take in views of the Bay of Naples from the palace's surrounding park
Includes transportation, driver, entrance tickets to the National Gallery of Capodimonte, and a private English-speaking guide (3 hours)

tours.tour: Naples - Paestum and Vietri Sul Mare with Guide (#7) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day journey to ancient Magna Graecia, exploring the extraordinarily preserved Greek temples of Paestum before a stop in the ceramics town of Vietri sul Mare.
summaryBullets: Walk the "Sacred Way" at Paestum to see the Temple of Hera, built in the 6th century B.C. with a peristyle of 50 archaic fluted columns
Explore Paestum's fortified walls, ancient homes, shops, and amphitheater
Stop in Vietri sul Mare, famous for its ceramic arts and crafts, on the way back
Includes transportation, driver, entrance tickets to Paestum, and a private English-speaking guide (8 hours)

tours.tour: Naples - Panoramic Naples with Escort (#2) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A scenic drive through Naples' most photogenic viewpoints, taking in the coastline of Posillipo and the city's grand piazzas.
summaryBullets: Drive along the panoramic coastal road of Posillipo with views of Ischia, Procida, Capri, and Mount Vesuvius
Stroll through Piazza del Plebiscito to see the Royal Palace, San Carlo Opera House, and Galleria Umberto I, then walk through Piazza del Municipio
Includes transportation, driver, and a private English-speaking escort (3 hours)

tours.tour: Naples - Pompeii and Gragnano by Sedan and Escort
tours.summaryIntro: A day pairing ancient Pompeii with a taste of local culture in Gragnano, Italy's "City of Pasta."
summaryBullets: Explore Pompeii's ruins, including mosaic floors, baths, and temples preserved since the 79 AD eruption
Experience a 4D virtual introduction to Gragnano's old city and its centuries-old pasta-making traditions, then watch pasta made and packaged at a modern factory
Finish with an "Aperipasta" - an Italian-style aperitif paired with pasta tastings
Includes transportation, driver, Pompeii entrance tickets, and an English-speaking guide on site (max 2 hours); requires a minimum of 4 travelers (5.5 hours, departs 8:00am)

tours.tour: Naples - Pompeii and Villa Poppaea Tour (#10) By Mercedes E class and guide
tours.summaryIntro: A tour combining the ruins of Pompeii with the lesser-visited Villa Poppaea, an imperial Roman seaside villa believed to have belonged to Emperor Nero's wife.
summaryBullets: Visit Villa Poppaea (Villa Oplontis), a Roman seaside villa in ancient Oplontis (modern Torre Annunziata) believed to have been Emperor Nero's wife Poppaea Sabina's main residence
Explore Pompeii's preserved mosaic floors, baths, and temples
Includes a licensed English-speaking guide who meets you in Pompeii
Includes private car, private driver, and entrance tickets to both Pompeii and Oplontis (4 hours)

tours.tour: Naples - Pompeii and Villa Poppaea Tour (#10) By Presidential Sedan and guide
tours.summaryIntro: A tour combining the ruins of Pompeii with the lesser-visited Villa Poppaea, an imperial Roman seaside villa believed to have belonged to Emperor Nero's wife.
summaryBullets: Visit Villa Poppaea (Villa Oplontis), a Roman seaside villa in ancient Oplontis (modern Torre Annunziata) believed to have been Emperor Nero's wife Poppaea Sabina's main residence
Explore Pompeii's preserved mosaic floors, baths, and temples
Includes a licensed English-speaking guide who meets you in Pompeii
Includes private car, private driver, and entrance tickets to both Pompeii and Oplontis (4 hours)

tours.tour: Naples - Private Exclusive Cooking Class in Sorrento
tours.summaryIntro: A private cooking class held in a beautifully landscaped private estate in Sorrento, offering guests full privacy and a proper welcome before the lesson begins.
summaryBullets: Cooking lessons take place in private grounds with manicured gardens, orange and lemon trees, and a swimming pool
Welcomed on arrival with fresh orange juice, plum-cake, and Neapolitan coffee
Class is taught in English and includes transportation and driver
Morning class starts at 9:30am (departs 8:30am) or afternoon class at 4:00pm (departs 3:00pm); full experience runs 8 hours

tours.tour: Naples - Reggia di Caserta with Guide (#13) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A tour of the Reggia di Caserta, the "Versailles of Naples," an 18th-century Bourbon royal palace with over 1,200 rooms and a dramatic waterfall in its gardens.
summaryBullets: Built by Bourbon King Charles III in the 18th century, with over 1,200 rooms featuring handmade chandeliers and gilded frescoes
The 3km Park and Gardens are crowned by a 75-meter-high waterfall visible from the palace
Includes transportation, driver, entrance tickets to the Royal Palace and Garden, and a private English-speaking guide (4 hours)

tours.tour: Naples - Rome Day Trip with Guide (#6) by Sedan
tours.duration: 12 hours - 5 hours travel time + 7 hours in Rome
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day trip from Naples to Rome hitting the city's essential landmarks, from the Colosseum to the Trevi Fountain.
summaryBullets: Visit the Colosseum, Roman Forum, Pantheon, and the Spanish Steps along Via Sistina
Toss a coin in the Trevi Fountain for good luck to return to Rome, and see the Catacombs and Appian Way
Includes entrance tickets to the Colosseum and Forum, plus a private English-speaking guide in Rome
Includes transportation and driver for the full 12-hour day (5 hours travel, 7 hours in Rome); lunch not included

tours.tour: Naples - Ruins of Pompeii with Guide (#15) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A guided walk through the ruins of Pompeii, the ancient Roman city preserved by the 79 AD eruption of Vesuvius.
summaryBullets: Explore the Forum, the heart of the ancient city, and the amphitheater where gladiators once battled
See preserved wall paintings, frescoes, and former shops, villas, and schools along the ancient streets
Time may be allotted for a cameo carver's workshop, where local artisans still work in a centuries-old tradition
Includes transportation, driver, Pompeii entrance tickets, and an English-speaking guide on site (max 2 hours), 4 hours total

tours.tour: Naples - Souvenir of Naples with Guide (#3) by Sedan
tours.duration: 5 hours English speaking guide and driver
tours.summaryIntro: A comprehensive walking tour of Naples' monumental and historic center, from the grand Piazza del Plebiscito to the legend of San Gennaro's liquefying blood.
summaryBullets: Visit Piazza del Plebiscito, the city's largest square, and enter the New Castle (Maschio Angioino), an Angevin citadel
Step inside the San Carlo Theatre, one of the oldest theaters in the world
Walk the historic "Spaccanapoli" street, passing the Gesu Nuovo and Santa Chiara churches, then visit the Duomo, home to the relic of San Gennaro's blood said to liquefy twice a year
Includes transportation, driver, entrance tickets to the Castelnuovo Museum and San Carlo Theatre, and a private English-speaking guide (5 hours)

tours.tour: Positano - Archeological Museum of Naples with Guide (#4) by Sedan
tours.duration: 6 hours - 3 hours travel - 3 hours English speaking guide
tours.summaryIntro: Half-day trip from Positano to Naples' Archeological Museum, Italy's most important museum for Greek and Roman antiquities.
summaryBullets: See artifacts recovered from Pompeii, Stabiae, and Herculaneum
Includes private transportation, driver, entrance tickets, and a 3-hour English-speaking guide
6-hour round trip: about 3 hours travel each way plus 3 hours with the guide in Naples

tours.tour: Positano - Full Day Capri Island Tour with Guide (#21b) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: Full-day private excursion from Positano to the island of Capri, crossing by hydrofoil for a private boat tour and a ride to the island's highest point.
summaryBullets: Hydrofoil crossing to Capri (about 20 minutes) followed by a 3-hour private boat tour with a swim stop at the Blue Grotto
Chairlift ride to the highest point of the island with an English-speaking guide
Includes roundtrip transfer, hydrofoil tickets, private car in Capri, guide, Blue Grotto entrance, chairlift ticket, and a 3-course lunch featuring fresh fish (beverages not included)
Free time to explore Capri's famous "Piazzetta" for shopping

tours.tour: Positano - Full Day Herculaneum and Vesuvius (#20-3) with Guide by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: Full-day tour combining ancient Herculaneum with a hike up Mount Vesuvius, the volcano that buried it.
summaryBullets: Explore Herculaneum's remarkably preserved patrician villas, with original wood, ropes, mosaics and frescoes still on display
Hike 25 minutes up volcanic gravel paths to peer into Vesuvius's crater — 700 feet deep and 2,000 feet wide
Includes private car, driver, entrance tickets to both Herculaneum and Vesuvius, and an English-speaking guide (meeting point in Ercolano)

tours.tour: Positano - Full Day Pompeii Herculaneum and Vesuvius (#20-1) with Guide by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: Full-day combination tour covering all three legendary sites of the Bay of Naples — Pompeii, Herculaneum, and Vesuvius.
summaryBullets: Walk the ruins of Pompeii, the Roman city buried in ash and rediscovered in 1748
Visit Herculaneum's exceptionally preserved villas with original wood and mosaics
Hike up Vesuvius to the crater rim for sweeping views over the Sorrento Peninsula
Includes private car, driver, entrance tickets to all three sites, and an English-speaking guide (10-hour day, meeting point in Pompeii)

tours.tour: Positano - Full Day Pompeii and Vesuvius (#20-2) with Guide by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: Full-day tour pairing the ruins of Pompeii with a hike up Mount Vesuvius.
summaryBullets: Explore Pompeii, the Roman city buried in ash and hidden until its rediscovery in 1748
Hike up Vesuvius's volcanic gravel path to the crater rim for views of Capri, Ischia, and Procida
Includes private car, driver, entrance tickets to Pompeii and Vesuvius, and an English-speaking guide (meeting point in Pompeii)

tours.tour: Positano - Learn to Cook in Ravello (#17)
tours.summaryIntro: A hands-on Italian cooking class held on a terrace in Ravello overlooking the Amalfi Coast.
summaryBullets: Learn to make antipasti, pasta, bread, seasonal vegetable dishes, meat courses, plus cakes and jams
Visit the kitchen garden below the terrace to see where the organic vegetables are grown
Enjoy the meal you prepared paired with local Amalfi wines afterward
Includes transportation, driver, and the English-language cooking class; morning (11am) or afternoon (3pm) sessions available

tours.tour: Positano - Mount Vesuvius Volcano with Guide (#8) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A half-day trip up Mount Vesuvius, the only active volcano on continental Europe.
summaryBullets: Reach the crater rim for panoramic views over the Gulf of Naples
Vesuvius is known locally as the "terror and pride of Naples" and is one of the smallest active volcanoes in the world
Includes transportation, driver, entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide
Compact 4.5-hour outing, ideal for a shorter excursion day

tours.tour: Positano - Naples and Pompeii with Guide (#1) by Sedan
tours.duration: 8 hours - 3 hours travel + 5 hours English speaking guide (2 hours in Pompeii and 3 hours in Naples)
tours.summaryIntro: Full-day tour combining Naples' historic monuments with the ancient ruins of Pompeii.

Includes private car, driver, entrance tickets to Pompeii and Vesuvius, and an English-speaking guide met in Pompeii

tours.tour: Sorrento - Learn to Cook in Ravello (#17)
tours.summaryIntro: A full culinary immersion on the Amalfi Coast, held in an outdoor kitchen on a terrace in Ravello.
summaryBullets: Learn about the organic kitchen garden below the terrace before cooking antipasti, pasta, bread, seasonal vegetables, and meat dishes
Finish with homemade cakes and jams, then enjoy the meal with local Amalfi region wines
Morning (11:00 am) or afternoon (3:00 pm) class times available
Includes transportation, driver, and the English-language cooking class

tours.tour: Sorrento - Mount Vesuvius Volcano with Guide (#8) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A half-day visit to Mount Vesuvius, the only active volcano on the European mainland.
summaryBullets: Known locally as the "terror and pride of Naples," Vesuvius is one of the smallest active volcanoes in the world
Take in views of the Gulf of Naples from the crater's rim
Includes transportation, driver, Vesuvius entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide

tours.tour: Sorrento - Naples and Pompeii with Guide (#1) by Sedan
tours.duration: 8 hours - 3 hours travel + 5 hours English speaking guide (2 hours in Pompeii and 3 hours in Naples)
tours.summaryIntro: Combine the highlights of Naples with a visit to the ruins of Pompeii in one day.
summaryBullets: Visit the Cathedral, Treasure Chapel, and the 4th-century Santa Restituta Basilica in Naples
See Plebiscite Square with the Royal Palace and Castel Nuovo (Maschio Angioino), built by the Angevin dynasty
Explore the ruins of Pompeii, buried by Vesuvius's eruption in 79 AD
Includes transportation, driver, entrance tickets to the San Gennaro Treasure Museum, Castelnuovo Museum, and Pompeii, plus a private English-speaking guide

tours.tour: Sorrento - National Gallery of Capodimonte with Guide (#5) by Sedan
tours.duration: 6 hours - 3 hours travel - 3 hours English speaking guide
tours.summaryIntro: Discover Naples' art treasures at the National Gallery of Capodimonte, once the summer palace of the Bourbon kings.
summaryBullets: Tour the Capodimonte Palace, the former summer residence and hunting lodge of the kings of the Two Sicilies (the name means "top of the hill")
View the Royal Palace, San Carlo Opera House, and Galleria Umberto I from Piazza Plebiscito
Finish in the palace's park with sweeping views over the Bay of Naples
Includes transportation, driver, gallery entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide

tours.tour: Sorrento - Paestum and Vietri Sul Mare with Guide (#7) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: Step into ancient Magna Graecia at Paestum, then browse the ceramics of Vietri sul Mare on the way back.
summaryBullets: Walk the Sacred Way to the Temple of Hera, built in the 6th century BC with a peristyle of 50 archaic fluted columns
Explore Paestum's fortified walls, temples, bathhouses, and amphitheater
Visit the medieval town of Vietri sul Mare, famous for its ceramic arts and crafts
Includes transportation, driver, Paestum entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide

tours.tour: Sorrento - Panoramic Naples with Guide (#2) by Sedan
tours.duration: 6 hours - 3 hours travel + 3 hours English speaking guide
tours.summaryIntro: A scenic drive through Naples' most photogenic viewpoints along the hill of Posillipo.
summaryBullets: Drive the panoramic coastal road of Posillipo with views of Ischia, Procida, and Capri, with Mount Vesuvius in the background
Stroll past the Royal Palace, San Carlo Opera House, and Galleria Umberto I at Piazza Plebiscito
Free time to explore Piazza del Municipio before returning to your hotel
Includes transportation, driver, and a private English-speaking escort met in Naples

tours.tour: Sorrento - Pompeii and Gragnano by Sedan and Escort
tours.summaryIntro: Pair the ruins of Pompeii with a hands-on visit to Gragnano, Italy's "City of Pasta."
summaryBullets: Explore Pompeii's preserved ruins, including mosaic floors, baths, and temples, buried by Vesuvius in 79 AD
Experience a 4D virtual tour of Gragnano's history, then watch pasta being made and packaged at a modern factory
Finish with an "Aperipasta" - an Italian-style aperitif paired with pasta tastings
Includes transportation, driver, Pompeii entrance tickets, and a private guide met on site (up to 2 hours); minimum 4 people required

tours.tour: Sorrento - Private Exclusive Cooking Class in Sorrento
tours.summaryIntro: A private cooking class in Sorrento held on a manicured estate reserved exclusively for your group.
summaryBullets: Arrive to a welcome of fresh orange juice, a slice of plum cake, and Neapolitan coffee
Cook in a private setting with gardens, orange and lemon trees, a pool, and a traditional pergola
Morning (9:30 am) or afternoon (4:00 pm) class times available
Includes transportation, driver, and the English-language cooking class

tours.tour: Sorrento - Rome Day Trip with Guide (#6) by Sedan
tours.duration: 14 hours - 7 hours travel time + 7 hours in Rome
tours.summaryIntro: A full day trip from your hotel in Sorrento to Rome, hitting the ancient city's greatest icons in a single day.
summaryBullets: See the Spanish Steps, throw a coin in the Trevi Fountain, and step into the Colosseum
Walk the Roman Forum from atop Capitoline Hill and visit the Pantheon and the Mausoleum of Augustus
Stop for lunch on the Appian Way or a city sidewalk cafe (meal not included), then visit the catacombs
Includes round-trip transportation, driver, and a private English-speaking guide for the day

tours.tour: Sorrento - Ruins of Pompeii with Guide (#15) by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A half-day visit to the ruins of Pompeii, the ancient Roman city buried by Mount Vesuvius's eruption in 79 AD and preserved in astonishing detail.
summaryBullets: Walk the Forum, the heart of the ancient city, and the amphitheater where gladiators once battled
See preserved mosaic floors, baths, temples, and frescoes throughout the site
Optional stop at a cameo carver's workshop to watch local artisans at work
Includes transportation, driver, Pompeii entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide met on site (up to 2 hours)

tours.tour: Sorrento - Shared Half Day Cooking Class in Ravello
tours.summaryIntro: A hands-on Italian cooking class in Ravello that starts in the organic garden and ends with a chef-prepared feast.
summaryBullets: Gather your own vegetables from an organic garden before the Chef walks you through preparing an appetizer, first course, main course, and dessert
Visit an ancient grotto housing a medieval chapel dedicated to the Archangel Michael, once used by local farmers for prayer breaks
Class runs about 3 hours in a rustic kitchen, with morning (11:00 am) or afternoon (3:00 pm) session options
Includes transportation, driver, and the English-language cooking class

tours.tour: Sorrento - Souvenir of Naples with Guide (#3) by Sedan
tours.duration: 7 hours - 3 hours travel + 4 hours English speaking guide
tours.summaryIntro: A comprehensive tour of Naples covering its monumental squares, historic old town, and panoramic coastal views.
summaryBullets: Visit Piazza del Plebiscito, the Royal Palace, and the New Castle (Maschio Angioino), an Angevin citadel
Walk the historic Spaccanapoli street and see the Duomo, home to the relics of patron saint San Gennaro, whose blood is said to liquefy twice a year
Ends with panoramic views along Via Posillipo overlooking the Bay of Naples
Includes transportation, driver, a private English-speaking guide, plus entrance tickets to Castelnuovo Museum and San Carlo Theatre

tours.tour: Unguided - Amalfi - 10 Hours Amalfi Coast Tour and Pompeii by Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: An unguided full-day drive along the Amalfi Coast covering Amalfi, Positano, Ravello, and Pompeii at your own pace.
summaryBullets: Visit Amalfi's 9th-century Cathedral and stroll its charming streets
Shop the boutiques of Positano, then see Ravello's Villa Cimbrone and its park (entrance tickets not included)
Explore the excavations of Pompeii on your own (entrance tickets not included)
Includes only a private car and driver; no guide and no entrance tickets are included

summaryBullets: In Amalfi, visit the magnificent 9th-century Cathedral and stroll the town's charming streets

tours.tour: Erice and Segesta (#4) with MPV and guide
tours.summaryIntro: An 8-hour double-header pairing Segesta's ancient Doric temple with the hilltop medieval town of Erice, mixing archaeology with Sicily's famous pastry tradition.
summaryBullets: See the unfinished 5th-century BC Doric temple at Segesta, still with its full peristyle and architrave
Take the shuttle up Mount Barbaro to the ancient Theatre for views over the Castellamare Gulf
Explore hilltop Erice, overlooking Trapani and the Egadi Islands, with stops at bakeries famous for marzipan, almond and pistachio pastries
Includes MPV transportation, driver, entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide

tours.tour: Marsala (#5) with MPV
tours.summaryIntro: A day trip to Marsala, Sicily's "City of Wine," pairing a cellar tour and tasting with a stroll through the baroque old town.
summaryBullets: Cellar tour and tasting of four different Marsala wines paired with local snacks
Walk the baroque city centre, with the scents of local specialties like fish couscous, pane e panelle, and Sicilian cassata along the way
Photo stop at the saltpans facing Mozia island on the drive back
Includes MPV transportation, driver, and wine tasting fees — lunch is not included

tours.tour: Palermo and its puppets (#2) with MPV and guide
tours.summaryIntro: A Palermo walking tour centered on the city's UNESCO-recognized "Pupi" puppet tradition — a memorable, offbeat half-day for culture-curious travelers.
summaryBullets: Learn the history of hand-carved Pupi puppets, a UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage tradition dating to the early 1800s
Visit the International Marionettes Museum, with a chance to catch a brief puppet show depending on the day's schedule
Stories draw from medieval chivalric tales, Renaissance poems, saints' lives, and bandit legends
Includes MPV transportation, driver, museum entrance, and a private English-speaking guide

See Temple E, the standout structure dominating the western hill
Walk the remains of the Acropolis and surrounding ancient settlement

tours.tour: 6 Hours Private Escort
Acqueducts and Appian Way with Guide (#30) by Presidential Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A deep dive into Rome's ancient engineering and one of its most dramatic power-grab stories, all along the historic Appian Way.
summaryBullets: See the 2nd-century Aqua Claudia, the largest aqueduct ever built in Rome, at the Parco degli Acquedotti.
Tour Villa Quintili, the luxury estate Emperor Commodus seized after having its owners, the Quintili brothers, killed.
Visit the Mausoleum of Cecilia Metella, a well-preserved tomb of a Roman noblewoman contemporary with Julius Caesar.
Includes transportation, driver, private English-speaking guide, and entrance fees to Villa Quintili and the Mausoleum.

tours.tour: Ancient Ostia with Guide (#22b) by Presidential Sedan (pick up from Rome Hotels)
tours.summaryIntro: A well-preserved Roman seaport that gives guests a Pompeii-like experience without leaving the Rome area.
summaryBullets: Explore Ostia Antica, founded in the 4th century BC and once home to over 100,000 residents by the 2nd century AD.
See the Republican Stores, the Thermal Baths of Neptune, and the Piazzale delle Corporazioni leading to the Augustan-era Theatre.
Stroll the balconied Street of Diana and its ancient Thermopolium, a Roman-era restaurant.
Includes transportation, driver, entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide.

tours.tour: Baroque Rome with Guide (#1) by Presidential Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A classic first-timer's Rome walk hitting the city's most famous Baroque landmarks and the tradition behind its best-known fountain.
summaryBullets: Start at Piazza Navona, home to Bernini and Borromini's work including Borromini's Santa Agnese church.
See Caravaggio's paintings in San Luigi dei Francesi, then the Pantheon and Piazza Colonna.
Learn the coin-toss legend at the 1735 Trevi Fountain before ending at Quirinal Hill, once the Pope's summer residence and now home to Italy's President.
Includes transportation, driver, and a private English-speaking guide.

tours.summaryIntro: The Ostia Antica excursion built for cruise guests, timed to fit a Civitavecchia port call.
summaryBullets: Explore the ruins of Ostia Antica, Rome's ancient seaport founded in the 4th century BC.
See the Republican Stores, the Baths of Neptune, and the Augustan-era Theatre off the Piazzale delle Corporazioni.
Direct pickup and drop-off at Civitavecchia Pier, with the excursion wrapping up by 3:00pm.
Includes transportation, driver, entrance tickets, and a private English-speaking guide on site.

tours.tour: CIVITAVECCHIA PIER - Rome Highlights with Guide (#23a) by Presidential Sedan - pick up from Civitavecchia Pier
tours.summaryIntro: The essential one-day Rome sightseeing run for cruise passengers, covering the Colosseum, Forum, and Trevi Fountain in a single port call.
summaryBullets: Tour the Colosseum, site of gladiator contests, mock sea battles, and animal hunts.
See the Roman Forum between the Palatine and Capitoline hills, including the Vestal Virgins' complex.
Toss a coin over your left shoulder at the Trevi Fountain, Rome's largest Baroque fountain, for the legendary return-visit blessing.
Includes transportation, driver, entrance tickets to the Colosseum and Forum, and a private guide — direct from Civitavecchia Pier.

tours.tour: CIVITAVECCHIA PIER - Rome Shopping Tour with Escort (#25) by Presidential Sedan - pick up from Civitavecchia Pier
tours.summaryIntro: A guided shopping run through Rome's elite "quadrilateral" fashion district for cruise guests who want the real designer streets, not tourist shops.
summaryBullets: Shop the "quadrilateral" district's top streets: Piazza di Spagna, Via Bocca di Leone, Via Mario dei Fiori, Via Gregoriana, and Via del Babuino.
Full 8-hour day out from the ship, departing Civitavecchia Pier in the 8:00-9:00am window.
Includes transportation, driver, and an English-speaking escort in Rome.

tours.tour: CIVITAVECCHIA PIER - The Etruscan Tombs with Escort (#27) by Presidential Sedan - pick up from Civitavecchia Pier
tours.summaryIntro: An off-the-beaten-path history excursion to a lesser-known civilization's burial ground, ideal for guests who've already done the big Rome sights.
summaryBullets: Drive up the coast to Cerveteri and its Etruscan necropolis, from a civilization that rose in the 8th century BC and was defeated by Rome in the 3rd century BC.
See streets and squares lined with massive tumuli and tombs carved directly into the rock.
Includes transportation, driver, English-speaking guide, and entrance fees to the Necropolis — pickup direct from Civitavecchia Pier.

tours.tour: CIVITAVECCHIA PIER - The Vatican Tour (#4d) with guide by Sedan - with pick up from Civitavecchia Pier
tours.summaryIntro: The definitive Vatican Museums, Sistine Chapel, and St. Peter's Basilica combination for cruise guests, though it needs advance booking.
summaryBullets: Walk the Vatican Museums' Galleries of Candelabras, Tapestry, and Geographical Maps, plus the Pope's gardens.
See Michelangelo's Sistine Chapel ceiling and Last Judgment fresco, still used today for papal conclaves.
Finish at St. Peter's Basilica, home to Michelangelo's Pieta and the burial site of many past Popes.
Includes transportation, driver, private guide, and entrance fees — not offered Wednesday mornings, book 7 days ahead (30 days for larger groups).

tours.tour: Calcata Tour from Rome (18) by Presidential Sedan and guide
tours.duration: 5 hours (2 hours travel time + 3 hours on spot)
tours.summaryIntro: A hidden medieval hill village that feels frozen in time, good for guests wanting something beyond the standard Rome sights.
summaryBullets: Calcata sits on a tuff-rock outcrop reachable only by an ancient pedestrian path, overlooking the Treja valley.
Abandoned in the early 1930s, it's since been revived by the craftsmen and artists now living and working there.
Includes transportation, driver, and a private English-speaking guide; about 2 hours travel plus 3 hours on site.

tours.tour: Castelli Romani and Medival Villages with Escort (#29) by Presidential Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A countryside day trip through the volcanic lake towns Romans themselves escape to, rich with papal history.
summaryBullets: Pass the Caracalla Baths and the Appian Way's Chapel of Domine Quo Vadis en route to Castelgandolfo, the Pope's summer residence.
Continue through Albano, Ariccia, and Genzano (known for its flower carnival) to Nemi, overlooking the lake called the "Mirror of Goddess Diana."
Route continues via the Via dei Laghi through Rocca di Papa and Grottaferrata.
Includes transportation, driver, and a private English-speaking escort.

tours.tour: Catacombs with Ancient Appian Way with Guide (#2) by Presidential Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A faith-and-history tour pairing Rome's cathedral with the underground world of early Christian martyrs along the Appian Way.
summaryBullets: Visit the Basilica of St. John in Lateran, the cathedral of Rome, and climb the 28 marble Holy Stairs.
See the Chapel of Domine Quo Vadis, where legend says St. Peter met Jesus while fleeing Rome.
Visit Basilica di San Sebastiano fuori le mura, with its Antonio Giorgetti statue of the saint, then the Mausoleum of Cecilia Metella.
Includes transportation, driver, private guide, and entrance fees to the Cecilia Metella Mausoleum.

tours.tour: Churches and Esquiline Hill with Guide (#6) by Presidential Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A churches tour through Rome's highest hill, built around historically major but lesser-visited basilicas.
summaryBullets: Visit the Basilica of Saint Praxedes, home to the Chapel of St. Zeno, the only chapel in Rome fully decorated in mosaics.
See the Basilica of St. Peter in Chains, which holds the apostle's chains and Michelangelo's Moses statue.
Also stops at the Esquiline Hill's major church dedicated to the Virgin Mary, with mosaics dating to the 5th century.
Includes transportation, driver, and a private guide — entrance fees are paid on-site by the client, not included.

tours.tour: Colosseum Arena Experience with private guide and Mercedes E Class
tours.summaryIntro: A premium, behind-the-scenes Colosseum tour with rare access to the Arena floor itself, not just the stands.
summaryBullets: Walk the Colosseum's ground floor, first level, and the exclusive Arena level — plus the Arch of Constantine if time allows.
Continue to the Roman Forum and Imperial Forum, then climb Palatine Hill, called "the birthplace of the Roman Empire."
Includes transportation, entrance tickets covering Colosseum + Arena access and the Forum, and a private English-speaking guide.
Booking requires each passenger's full name, date of birth, and nationality submitted in advance.

tours.tour: Crypts and Catacombs with Guide (#15) by Presidential Sedan
tours.summaryIntro: A macabre-but-fascinating look at Rome's underground Christian history, for guests who want something different from the standard ruins circuit.
summaryBullets: Visit the Capuchin Crypt, decorated with the bones of friars buried there between 1528 and 1870.
See the Crypt of the Resurrection, its image of Jesus raising Lazarus framed entirely in human skeletal remains.
Finish at the St. Domitilla Catacombs, among the oldest and largest underground cemeteries in Rome.
Includes transportation, driver, entrance tickets to the Capuchin Church and St. Domitilla's Catacombs, and a private guide.

tours.tour: Exclusive Private 098 Ruspoli Wine Experience with Sedan - Civitavecchia Hotel
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day private wine and history experience hosted as personal guests of the Marescotti-Ruspoli family — Italian nobility with 15 Popes in their lineage — combining a private castle tour with a sommelier-led tasting and a family chef's lunch.
summaryBullets: Private, family-guided tour of castle areas usually closed to the public, hosted by a member of the Marescotti-Ruspoli family (15 Popes in their history)
Sommelier-led tasting of Prince Ruspoli's Tuscan wines from his Chianti Classico estate, Lilliano

Visit the Three Cities' Gardjola Gardens, the Collachio, and the Inquisitor's Palace, with a snack by the marina
Includes a cruise around the Grand Harbour in a traditional wooden boat, guide, vehicle, and entrances for the 8-hour tour, pickup at the client's hotel at 9am

tours.tour: Full Day Private Guide at Disposal
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day English-speaking private guide at the client's disposal, worth booking for total flexibility to build a custom itinerary.
summaryBullets: English-speaking professional guide available for the full 9-hour day, entirely at the client's preference
Pickup at the client's hotel, timed to the client's preference

tours.tour: Full day on a sailing Yacht including lunch on board
tours.summaryIntro: A full day sailing on a 54ft private yacht with lunch on board, worth booking for a relaxed, exclusive day on the water.
summaryBullets: Private 54ft sailing yacht with skipper and fuel included
Light lunch and wine served on board
Includes transfers between hotel and marina in a Mercedes E-Class (or V-Class/Sprinter for more than 2 passengers) for the 8-hour day, pickup at the client's hotel at 9:45am

tours.tour: HD tour of 3 Cities Includes Harbour Cruise
tours.summaryIntro: A half-day tour of Malta's Three Cities, worth booking for its historic gardens and a scenic Grand Harbour cruise.
summaryBullets: Visit the Gardjola Gardens, the Collachio, and the Inquisitor's Palace, with a snack by the marina
40-minute cruise around the Grand Harbour in a traditional wooden boat
Includes guide, vehicle, the harbour cruise, and entrances for the 4-hour tour, pickup at the client's hotel at 9am or 1pm

tours.tour: HD tour of Hagar Qim Temples and Blue Grotto
tours.summaryIntro: A half-day tour to Malta's prehistoric temples and the Blue Grotto, worth booking for the mix of ancient history and a scenic cave boat ride.
summaryBullets: Entrance to the Hagar Qim and Mnajdra prehistoric temples
Boat tour through the Blue Grotto sea caves
Includes guide, vehicle, entrances, and the cave boat ride for the 4-hour tour, pickup at the client's hotel at 9am or 1pm

tours.tour: HD tour of Mdina and Rabat
tours.summaryIntro: A half-day tour of Mdina and Rabat, worth booking for its concentration of cathedrals, catacombs, and museums in Malta's former capital.
summaryBullets: Entrance to St Paul's Cathedral and Museum, the Wignacourt Museum, and St Paul's Grotto and Roman Catacombs
Time permitting, visit Palazzo Falson
Includes guide, vehicle, and entrances for the 4-hour tour, pickup at the client's hotel at 9am or 1pm

tours.tour: HD tour of Temples and Marsaxlokk Fishing Village
tours.summaryIntro: A half-day tour of Malta's prehistoric temples, worth booking for a deep dive into two more of the island's ancient temple complexes.
summaryBullets: Entrance to the Hagar Qim and Mnajdra Temple complex
Entrance to the Tarxien Temple complex
Includes guide, vehicle, and entrances for the 4-hour tour, pickup at the client's hotel at 9am or 1pm
