tours.summaryIntro: A half-day small-group tour of Istanbul's landmark mosque and ancient Hippodrome.
summaryBullets: Visit the Blue Mosque, named for its turquoise tiles and famed for its six minarets
Stroll Hippodrome Square, once Constantinople's chariot-racing center, and see the Obelisk of Theodosius and the Serpentine Column
Includes car, driver, English-speaking guide, entrance fees, and parking fees (4-hour tour, pickup 8:30 AM or 1:30 PM, drop-off 12:30 PM or 4:30 PM, pickup at your hotel)

tours.tour: Small Group Excursion - Istanbul Highlights
tours.summaryIntro: A small-group tour of Istanbul's landmark mosque and ancient Hippodrome.
summaryBullets: Visit the Blue Mosque, named for its turquoise tiles and famed for its six minarets
Stroll Hippodrome Square, once Constantinople's chariot-racing center, and see the Obelisk of Theodosius and the Serpentine Column
Includes private car, driver, English-speaking guide, and entrance fees (4-hour tour, departs 8:30 AM or 1:30 PM, pickup at your hotel)

tours.tour: Classical Tour of Ephesus Shore Excursion
tours.summaryIntro: A shore excursion to Ephesus, one of antiquity's Seven Wonders sites, with lunch included.
summaryBullets: Visit the 6th-century Temple of Artemis at Selcuk, one of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World
Walk the Marble Road at Ephesus, seeing the Temple of Hadrian, the Library of Celsus, and the Terrace Houses
Tour the Great Theater and later visit the House of Virgin Mary
Includes private car, driver, English-speaking guide, lunch at Bizim Ev Restaurant, and entrance fees (8-hour tour, departs 8:00, 9:00, or 10:00 AM)

tours.tour: Roman Heritage of Ephesus Shore Excursion
tours.summaryIntro: A shore excursion tracing Ephesus's Roman heritage, with a stop to see traditional Turkish carpet weaving.
summaryBullets: Visit the 6th-century Temple of Artemis at Selcuk, one of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World
Walk the Marble Road at Ephesus, seeing the Temple of Hadrian, the Library of Celsus, and the Terrace Houses
Visit a traditional weaving school and the Ephesus Archaeological Museum
Includes private car, driver, English-speaking guide, and entrance fees (8-hour tour, departs 8:00, 9:00, or 10:00 AM)

tours.tour: Roman Life of Ephesus Shore Excursion
tours.summaryIntro: A half-day shore excursion covering the core Roman ruins of Ephesus.
summaryBullets: Visit the 6th-century Temple of Artemis at Selcuk, one of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World
Walk the Marble Road at Ephesus, seeing the Temple of Hadrian, the Library of Celsus, and the Terrace Houses
Tour the Great Theater
Includes private car, driver, English-speaking guide, and entrance fees (4-hour tour, departs 8:00 AM, 9:00 AM, 1:00 PM, or 1:30 PM)

tours.tour: Small Group Excursion - Full Day Ephesus Shore Excursion
tours.summaryIntro: A small-group, full-day shore excursion to Ephesus with lunch and a visit to the House of Virgin Mary.
summaryBullets: Visit the 6th-century Temple of Artemis at Selcuk, one of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World
Walk the Marble Road at Ephesus, seeing the Temple of Hadrian, the Library of Celsus, and the Terrace Houses
Tour the Great Theater, then have lunch at Bizim Ev Restaurant before visiting the House of Virgin Mary
Includes private car, driver, English-speaking guide, lunch, and entrance fees (8-hour tour, departs 8:00, 9:00, or 10:00 AM)

tours.tour: Small Group Excursion - Half Day Ephesus Shore Excursion
tours.summaryIntro: A small-group, half-day shore excursion covering the core Roman ruins of Ephesus.
summaryBullets: Visit the 6th-century Temple of Artemis at Selcuk, one of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World
Walk the Marble Road at Ephesus, seeing the Temple of Hadrian, the Library of Celsus, and the Terrace Houses
Tour the Great Theater
Includes private car, driver, English-speaking guide, and entrance fees (4-hour tour, departs 8:00 AM, 9:00 AM, 1:00 PM, or 1:30 PM)

tours.tour: Arts and Crafts in Cappadocia
tours.summaryIntro: A half-day tour of Cappadocia's living crafts tradition, visiting a working pottery studio and weaving center.
summaryBullets: Tour a pottery studio to see how Cappadocia's famed ceramics are made
Visit a weaving center to see Turkish rug-making techniques
Includes English-speaking guide, air-conditioned transportation, and entrance/parking fees (4-hour tour, departs 9:00 AM or 1:30 PM, pickup at your hotel)

tours.tour: Cappadocia Explorations with Hiking
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day hiking tour through Cappadocia's cave-carved valleys, from Pancarlik Valley to the historic town of Sinassos.
summaryBullets: Drive by luxury minivan to Pancarlik Valley, ringed with caves carved into volcanic rock
Hike through Red Valley's vineyards down to Cavusin, visiting the cave church of St. John the Baptist
Visit Sinassos, a former summer resort town with well-preserved rock-carved Byzantine churches
Includes English-speaking guide, air-conditioned transportation, and entrance/parking fees (8-hour tour, departs 9:00 AM, pickup at your hotel)

tours.tour: Full Day Cappadocia
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day sightseeing trip through Cappadocia's surreal volcanic landscape and an underground city, with round-trip transfers included.
summaryBullets: Drive through valleys filled with volcanic pillars and pinnacles
Visit the UNESCO-listed Goreme Open-Air Museum's painted cave churches
Explore the hand-carved tunnels of the Ozkonak underground city
Includes English-speaking guide, air-conditioned transportation, round-trip transfers, and entrance/parking fees (8-hour tour, pickup at your hotel)

tours.tour: Hike Cappadocia
tours.summaryIntro: A guided hike through two of Cappadocia's most scenic valleys.
summaryBullets: Hike through the Ihlara and Sinassos valleys for views of the Cappadocia landscape
Includes English-speaking guide, air-conditioned transportation, and entrance/parking fees (6-hour tour, pickup at your hotel)

tours.tour: Hot Air Ballooning Tour
tours.summaryIntro: A once-in-a-lifetime hot air balloon flight over Cappadocia's valleys, capped with a champagne toast.
summaryBullets: Early pickup at 5:30 AM, with breakfast served before the flight
Glide over Cappadocia's valleys and rock formations by hot air balloon
Celebrate with a glass of champagne after landing, with hotel drop-off by approximately 8:30 AM
Includes English-speaking representative, transportation, and entrance/parking fees (1-hour flight)

tours.tour: Small Group Excursion - Full Day Tour of Cappadocia
tours.summaryIntro: A small-group, full-day tour of Cappadocia's rock-hewn monasteries and surreal valley scenery.
summaryBullets: Tour the Goreme Monastic Center, founded by St. Basil in the 4th century, with its rock-hewn churches and Byzantine frescoes
See Pigeon Valley and Ortahisar's "Three Beauties" rock formations and fairy chimneys
Walk through Zelve, a town of rock-carved houses occupied until 1942, and tour Pasabag Valley
Includes car, driver, English-speaking guide, entrance fees, parking fees, bottled water, and tissue paper (8-hour tour, departs 9:00 AM, drop-off 5:00 PM, pickup at your hotel)

tours.tour: Treasures of Cappadocia
tours.summaryIntro: A full-day tour of Cappadocia's underground cities and rock-cut valleys, tracing the region's early Christian history.
summaryBullets: Visit Derinkuyu Underground City, a subterranean settlement where early Christians once sheltered
Explore Ihlara Valley, a canyon honeycombed with rock-cut dwellings and churches from the Byzantine period
Break for lunch in Belisirma Village, then tour a 13th-century Seljukian caravanserai
Includes English-speaking guide, air-conditioned transportation, and entrance/parking fees (8-hour tour, departs 9:00 AM, pickup at your hotel)

tours.tour: Whirling Dervishes Performance
tours.summaryIntro: An evening cultural performance of the Whirling Dervishes' Sema ceremony, held nightly at the historic Sarihan Caravanserai.
summaryBullets: Watch the Sema (Whirling Dervishes) ceremony, a mystical performance representing man's spiritual ascent
Performed nightly at the Sarihan Caravanserai
Includes English-speaking representative, transportation, and entrance/parking fees (2-hour performance, pickup at your hotel)
